const KPICard = ({
  label,
  value,
  unit,
  sub,
  trend,
  color = C.g500,
  bg = C.g50,
  accent,
}: any) => (
  <div
    style={{
      background: C.surface,
      border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
      borderRadius: 12,
      padding: "14px 16px",
      position: "relative",
      overflow: "hidden",
      boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
    }}
  >
    <div
      style={{
        position: "absolute",
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        right: 0,
        height: 3,
        background: `linear-gradient(90deg,${color},${color}44)`,
        borderRadius: "12px 12px 0 0",
      }}
    />
    <div style={{ marginTop: 4 }}>
      <p
        style={{
          color: C.txl,
          fontSize: 10,
          fontFamily: F,
          fontWeight: 500,
          letterSpacing: "0.08em",
          textTransform: "uppercase",
          margin: "0 0 4px",
        }}
      >
        {label}
      </p>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", gap: 5 }}>
        <span
          style={{
            color: C.tx,
            fontSize: 22,
            fontWeight: 700,
            lineHeight: 1.1,
            fontFamily: F,
          }}
        >
          {value}
        </span>
        {unit && (
          <span
            style={{
              color: C.txl,
              fontSize: 11,
              fontFamily: F,
              fontWeight: 300,
            }}
          >
            {unit}
          </span>
        )}
      </div>
      {sub && (
        <p
          style={{
            color: C.txl,
            fontSize: 10,
            margin: "3px 0 0",
            fontFamily: F,
            fontWeight: 300,
          }}
        >
          {sub}
        </p>
      )}
    </div>
    {trend !== undefined && (
      <div
        style={{ marginTop: 8, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 4 }}
      >
        <span
          style={{
            color: trend >= 0 ? C.g500 : C.r600,
            fontSize: 10,
            fontWeight: 600,
            fontFamily: F,
          }}
        >
          {trend >= 0 ? "↑" : "↓"} {Math.abs(trend)}%
        </span>
        <span
          style={{ color: C.txl, fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F, fontWeight: 300 }}
        >
          vs mes ant.
        </span>
      </div>
    )}
  </div>
);

const Panel = ({ title, subtitle, children, style }: any) => (
  <div
    style={{
      background: C.surface,
      border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
      borderRadius: 12,
      padding: "14px 16px",
      boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
      height: "100%",
      boxSizing: "border-box",
      ...style,
    }}
  >
    {title && (
      <div style={{ marginBottom: 10 }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", gap: 6 }}>
          <p
            style={{
              color: C.txm,
              fontSize: 10,
              fontFamily: F,
              fontWeight: 600,
              letterSpacing: "0.06em",
              textTransform: "uppercase",
              margin: 0,
            }}
          >
            {title}
          </p>
          {subtitle && (
            <p
              style={{
                color: C.txl,
                fontSize: 9.5,
                fontFamily: F,
                fontWeight: 400,
                margin: 0,
              }}
            >
              {subtitle}
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    )}
    {children}
  </div>
);

const PanelWithToggle = ({ title, subtitle, mode, onToggle, children }) => (
  <div
    style={{
      background: C.surface,
      border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
      borderRadius: 12,
      padding: "14px 16px",
      boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
      height: "100%",
      boxSizing: "border-box",
    }}
  >
    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "space-between",
        marginBottom: 12,
      }}
    >
      <div>
        <p
          style={{
            color: C.txm,
            fontSize: 10,
            fontFamily: F,
            fontWeight: 600,
            letterSpacing: "0.06em",
            textTransform: "uppercase",
            margin: 0,
          }}
        >
          {title}
        </p>
        {subtitle && (
          <p
            style={{
              color: C.txl,
              fontSize: 10.5,
              fontFamily: F,
              fontWeight: 300,
              margin: "2px 0 0",
            }}
          >
            {subtitle}
          </p>
        )}
      </div>
      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          alignItems: "center",
          background: C.surfaceAlt,
          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
          borderRadius: 8,
          padding: 3,
          gap: 2,
        }}
      >
        {["consultas", "monto"].map((m) => (
          <button
            key={m}
            onClick={() => onToggle(m)}
            style={{
              background: mode === m ? C.accent : "transparent",
              color: mode === m ? "white" : C.txl,
              border: "none",
              borderRadius: 6,
              padding: "3px 10px",
              cursor: "pointer",
              fontSize: 10,
              fontFamily: F,
              fontWeight: 600,
              transition: "all 0.15s",
            }}
          >
            {m === "consultas" ? "Consultas" : "Monto"}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
    {children}
  </div>
);

const SectionBlock = ({ title, subtitle, children }: any) => (
  <div
    style={{
      background: C.surfaceAlt,
      border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
      borderRadius: 14,
      padding: "14px 16px",
      marginBottom: 0,
    }}
  >
    {title && (
      <div
        style={{
          marginBottom: 14,
          paddingBottom: 10,
          borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
        }}
      >
        <p
          style={{
            color: C.txm,
            fontSize: 11,
            fontFamily: F,
            fontWeight: 600,
            letterSpacing: "0.06em",
            textTransform: "uppercase",
            margin: 0,
          }}
        >
          {title}
        </p>
        {subtitle && (
          <p
            style={{
              color: C.txl,
              fontSize: 10.5,
              fontFamily: F,
              fontWeight: 300,
              margin: "2px 0 0",
            }}
          >
            {subtitle}
          </p>
        )}
      </div>
    )}
    {children}
  </div>
);

// Toggle Switch puro
const Switch = ({ on, onChange }) => (
  <div
    onClick={() => onChange(!on)}
    style={{
      width: 38,
      height: 22,
      borderRadius: 11,
      background: on ? C.g500 : C.border,
      position: "relative",
      cursor: "pointer",
      transition: "background 0.2s",
      flexShrink: 0,
    }}
  >
    <div
      style={{
        width: 16,
        height: 16,
        borderRadius: 8,
        background: C.surface,
        position: "absolute",
        top: 3,
        left: on ? 19 : 3,
        transition: "left 0.2s",
        boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)",
      }}
    />
  </div>
);

// Gauge CO2
const GaugeCO2 = ({ score }) => {
  const pct = (score + 100) / 200;
  const r = 44,
    cx = 70,
    cy = 55;
  const toXY = (deg, rad) => [
    cx + rad * Math.cos((deg * Math.PI) / 180),
    cy + rad * Math.sin((deg * Math.PI) / 180),
  ];
  const arcPath = (s, e, r2) => {
    const [x1, y1] = toXY(s, r2),
      [x2, y2] = toXY(e, r2);
    return `M${x1} ${y1} A${r2} ${r2} 0 ${
      Math.abs(e - s) > 180 ? 1 : 0
    } 1 ${x2} ${y2}`;
  };
  const [nx, ny] = toXY(-90 + pct * 180, 30);
  return (
    <div style={{ textAlign: "center", width: "100%" }}>
      <svg
        viewBox="0 0 140 70"
        style={{
          width: "100%",
          maxWidth: 180,
          display: "block",
          margin: "0 auto",
        }}
      >
        <path
          d={arcPath(-180, 0, r)}
          fill="none"
          stroke={C.txll}
          strokeWidth={10}
          strokeLinecap="butt"
          opacity={0.9}
        />
        <path
          d={arcPath(-180, -180 + pct * 180, r)}
          fill="none"
          stroke={C.g500}
          strokeWidth={10}
          strokeLinecap="butt"
          opacity={0.9}
        />
        <line
          x1={cx}
          y1={cy}
          x2={nx}
          y2={ny}
          stroke={C.tx}
          strokeWidth={2.5}
          strokeLinecap="round"
        />
        <circle cx={cx} cy={cy} r={4} fill={C.tx} />
      </svg>
      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          justifyContent: "space-between",
          paddingInline: 8,
          marginTop: 4,
        }}
      >
        <span
          style={{
            fontSize: 10.5,
            color: C.txl,
            fontFamily: F,
            fontWeight: 500,
          }}
        >
          Emisión
        </span>
        <span
          style={{
            fontSize: 10.5,
            color: C.g600,
            fontFamily: F,
            fontWeight: 500,
          }}
        >
          Captura
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// Gauge lineal
const GaugeBalance = ({ value, max = 100, label }) => {
  const pct = Math.min(value / max, 1),
    r = 52,
    cx = 80,
    cy = 68;
  const toXY = (deg, rad) => [
    cx + rad * Math.cos((deg * Math.PI) / 180),
    cy + rad * Math.sin((deg * Math.PI) / 180),
  ];
  const arcP = (s, e, r2) => {
    const [x1, y1] = toXY(s, r2),
      [x2, y2] = toXY(e, r2);
    return `M${x1} ${y1} A${r2} ${r2} 0 ${
      Math.abs(e - s) > 180 ? 1 : 0
    } 1 ${x2} ${y2}`;
  };
  const color = pct < 0.33 ? C.r600 : pct < 0.66 ? C.a500 : C.g500;
  const [nx, ny] = toXY(-90 + pct * 180, 36);
  return (
    <div style={{ textAlign: "center" }}>
      <svg width={160} height={88} viewBox="0 0 160 88">
        <path
          d={arcP(-180, 0, r)}
          fill="none"
          stroke={C.border}
          strokeWidth={11}
          strokeLinecap="round"
        />
        <path
          d={arcP(-180, -180 + pct * 180, r)}
          fill="none"
          stroke={color}
          strokeWidth={11}
          strokeLinecap="round"
        />
        <line
          x1={cx}
          y1={cy}
          x2={nx}
          y2={ny}
          stroke={C.tx}
          strokeWidth={2.5}
          strokeLinecap="round"
        />
        <circle cx={cx} cy={cy} r={4} fill={C.tx} />
        <text
          x={cx}
          y={cy + 16}
          textAnchor="middle"
          fill={color}
          fontSize={15}
          fontWeight="700"
          fontFamily={F}
        >
          {value}%
        </text>
      </svg>
      <p
        style={{
          color: C.txl,
          fontSize: 10.5,
          fontFamily: F,
          fontWeight: 300,
          marginTop: "-4px",
        }}
      >
        {label}
      </p>
    </div>
  );
};

// Donut
const DonutChart = ({ data, size = 130 }) => {
  const total = data.reduce((s, d) => s + (d.value || 0), 0);
  return (
    <div style={{ width: size, flexShrink: 0 }}>
      <PieChart width={size} height={size}>
        <Pie
          data={data}
          cx={size / 2}
          cy={size / 2}
          innerRadius={size * 0.27}
          outerRadius={size * 0.42}
          dataKey="value"
          strokeWidth={0}
        >
          {data.map((d, i) => (
            <Cell key={i} fill={d.fill} />
          ))}
        </Pie>
        <Tooltip
          contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
          formatter={(v) => [
            `${v.toLocaleString()} (${Math.round((v / total) * 100)}%)`,
          ]}
        />
      </PieChart>
      <p
        style={{
          color: C.txl,
          fontSize: 10,
          fontFamily: F,
          textAlign: "center",
          marginTop: 2,
          fontWeight: 300,
        }}
      >
        Total:{" "}
        <strong style={{ color: C.txm, fontWeight: 600 }}>
          {total.toLocaleString()}
        </strong>
      </p>
    </div>
  );
};

const TreemapContent = ({
  x,
  y,
  width,
  height,
  name,
  value,
  fill,
  modoCartera,
}) => {
  if (width < 28 || height < 18) return null;
  return (
    <g>
      <rect
        x={x + 1}
        y={y + 1}
        width={width - 2}
        height={height - 2}
        rx={4}
        fill={fill}
        fillOpacity={1}
      />
      {width > 52 && (
        <text
          x={x + width / 2}
          y={y + height / 2 - (height > 36 ? 8 : 0)}
          textAnchor="middle"
          fill="#ffffff"
          fontSize={9}
          fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
          fontWeight={400}
          textRendering="geometricPrecision"
        >
          {name}
        </text>
      )}
      {width > 52 && height > 34 && (
        <text
          x={x + width / 2}
          y={y + height / 2 + 10}
          textAnchor="middle"
          fill="#ffffff"
          fillOpacity={0.75}
          fontSize={9}
          fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
          fontWeight={400}
          textRendering="geometricPrecision"
        >
          {value?.toLocaleString()}
        </text>
      )}
    </g>
  );
};

};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TAB: RESUMEN
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const AlertasBarra = ({
  modoGlobal,
  ultimasRevisiones,
  aprobados,
  fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion,
}) => {
  const [alertasOpen, setAlertasOpen] = React.useState(false);
  const [expandedRow, setExpandedRow] = React.useState<number | null>(null);
  const [alertasSearch, setAlertasSearch] = React.useState("");
  const [alertasDrillFinca, setAlertasDrillFinca] = React.useState<any>(null);
  const [alertasFilterRiesgo, setAlertasFilterRiesgo] = React.useState("Todos");
  const [alertasFilterActividad, setAlertasFilterActividad] =
    React.useState("Todas");
  const [alertasFilterRegion, setAlertasFilterRegion] = React.useState("Todas");
  const [alertasSort, setAlertasSort] = React.useState("riesgo_desc");
  const fincasConAlerta = fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion
    .map((r) => aprobados.find((d) => d.id === r.id))
    .filter(Boolean);
  const haConAlerta = fincasConAlerta.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0);
  const montoConAlerta = fincasConAlerta.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0);
  const alertasRegiones = React.useMemo(
    () => [
      "Todas",
      ...Array.from(new Set(fincasConAlerta.map((d: any) => d.region))).sort(),
    ],
    [fincasConAlerta]
  );
  // Insight pills
  const regionMayorRiesgo = React.useMemo(() => {
    const counts: Record<string, number> = {};
    fincasConAlerta.forEach((d: any) => {
      counts[d.region] = (counts[d.region] || 0) + 1;
    });
    const top = Object.entries(counts).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0];
    return top ? { region: top[0], count: top[1] } : null;
  }, [fincasConAlerta]);
  const ndviPromedioAlerta = React.useMemo(() => {
    const vals = fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion
      .map((r: any) => r.indices?.ndvi)
      .filter((v: any) => v != null);
    return vals.length > 0
      ? (vals.reduce((s: number, v: number) => s + v, 0) / vals.length).toFixed(
          2
        )
      : null;
  }, [fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion]);
  const pctConAlerta = React.useMemo(() => {
    if (!ultimasRevisiones.length) return null;
    return Math.round(
      (fincasConAlerta.length / ultimasRevisiones.length) * 100
    );
  }, [fincasConAlerta, ultimasRevisiones]);
  const actividadMasAfectada = React.useMemo(() => {
    const counts: Record<string, { count: number; subActividad: string }> = {};
    fincasConAlerta.forEach((d: any) => {
      const k = d.subActividad || d.actividad || "—";
      if (!counts[k]) counts[k] = { count: 0, subActividad: k };
      counts[k].count++;
    });
    const top = Object.values(counts).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)[0];
    return top || null;
  }, [fincasConAlerta]);
  const alertasFiltered = React.useMemo(() => {
    let r = fincasConAlerta as any[];
    if (alertasSearch.trim()) {
      const q = alertasSearch.trim().toLowerCase();
      r = r.filter(
        (d: any) =>
          d.finca?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          d.productor?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          d.region?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          d.subActividad?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
      );
    }
    if (alertasFilterRiesgo !== "Todos")
      r = r.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === alertasFilterRiesgo);
    if (alertasFilterActividad !== "Todas")
      r = r.filter((d: any) => d.actividad === alertasFilterActividad);
    if (alertasFilterRegion !== "Todas")
      r = r.filter((d: any) => d.region === alertasFilterRegion);
    const rOrder: Record<string, number> = { Alto: 0, Medio: 1, Bajo: 2 };
    if (alertasSort === "riesgo_desc")
      r = [...r].sort(
        (a: any, b: any) => (rOrder[a.riesgo] ?? 3) - (rOrder[b.riesgo] ?? 3)
      );
    else if (alertasSort === "ha_desc")
      r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => b.ha - a.ha);
    else if (alertasSort === "monto_desc")
      r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => b.monto - a.monto);
    else if (alertasSort === "finca_asc")
      r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => a.finca?.localeCompare(b.finca));
    else if (alertasSort === "region_asc")
      r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => a.region?.localeCompare(b.region));
    return r;
  }, [
    fincasConAlerta,
    alertasSearch,
    alertasFilterRiesgo,
    alertasFilterActividad,
    alertasFilterRegion,
    alertasSort,
  ]);

  const ROW_H = 36;
  const VISIBLE = 10;

  return (
    <>
      <div
        style={{
          background: C.surface,
          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
          borderRadius: 12,
          overflow: "hidden",
          minWidth: 0,
          maxWidth: "100%",
          width: "100%",
          boxSizing: "border-box",
        }}
      >
        <div
          onClick={() => setAlertasOpen((o) => !o)}
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            justifyContent: "space-between",
            padding: "10px 18px",
            cursor: "pointer",
            borderLeft: `3px solid ${C.a500}`,
          }}
        >
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 16 }}>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
              <div
                style={{
                  width: 7,
                  height: 7,
                  borderRadius: "50%",
                  background: C.a500,
                  boxShadow: `0 0 6px ${C.a500}`,
                }}
              />
              <span
                style={{
                  color: C.txm,
                  fontSize: 11,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                }}
              >
                Monitoreo Satelital
              </span>
              <span
                style={{
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontSize: 10,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  fontWeight: 300,
                }}
              >
                — Resumen de Alertas Activas
              </span>
            </div>
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                gap: 8,
                flexWrap: "wrap",
                alignItems: "center",
              }}
            >
              <span
                style={{
                  background: C.r100,
                  color: C.r600,
                  borderRadius: 20,
                  padding: "2px 10px",
                  fontSize: 10.5,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                }}
              >
                {fincasConAlerta.length} fincas con alerta
              </span>
              <span
                style={{
                  background: C.r100,
                  color: C.r600,
                  borderRadius: 20,
                  padding: "2px 10px",
                  fontSize: 10.5,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                }}
              >
                {modoGlobal === "consultas"
                  ? `${haConAlerta.toLocaleString()} ha afectadas`
                  : `$${(montoConAlerta / 1000000).toFixed(1)}M en riesgo`}
              </span>
              {pctConAlerta !== null && (
                <span
                  style={{
                    background: C.r100,
                    color: C.r600,
                    borderRadius: 20,
                    padding: "2px 10px",
                    fontSize: 10.5,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                  }}
                >
                  {pctConAlerta}% del total monitoreado
                </span>
              )}
              {regionMayorRiesgo && (
                <span
                  style={{
                    background: C.r100,
                    color: C.r600,
                    borderRadius: 20,
                    padding: "2px 10px",
                    fontSize: 10.5,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                  }}
                >
                  Región más afectada: {regionMayorRiesgo.region} (
                  {regionMayorRiesgo.count} alertas)
                </span>
              )}
              {actividadMasAfectada && (
                <span
                  style={{
                    background: C.r100,
                    color: C.r600,
                    borderRadius: 20,
                    padding: "2px 10px",
                    fontSize: 10.5,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                  }}
                >
                  Actividad con mayor riesgo:{" "}
                  {actividadMasAfectada.subActividad ||
                    actividadMasAfectada.actividad}
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
          <span style={{ color: C.txl, fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}>
            {alertasOpen ? "▲ Cerrar" : "▼ Ver detalle"}
          </span>
        </div>

        {alertasOpen && (
          <div
            style={{
              borderTop: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              padding: "14px 18px",
              minWidth: 0,
              width: "100%",
              boxSizing: "border-box",
            }}
          >
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                gap: 8,
                alignItems: "center",
                flexWrap: "wrap",
                marginBottom: 10,
                background: C.surface,
                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                borderRadius: 10,
                padding: "8px 12px",
              }}
            >
              <input
                value={alertasSearch}
                onChange={(e) => setAlertasSearch(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Buscar finca, productor, región…"
                style={{
                  flex: 1,
                  minWidth: 160,
                  background: "transparent",
                  border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  padding: "5px 10px",
                  fontSize: 10.5,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  color: C.tx,
                  outline: "none",
                }}
              />
              {(
                [
                  {
                    label: "Riesgo",
                    val: alertasFilterRiesgo,
                    set: setAlertasFilterRiesgo,
                    opts: ["Todos", "Bajo", "Medio", "Alto"],
                  },
                  {
                    label: "Actividad",
                    val: alertasFilterActividad,
                    set: setAlertasFilterActividad,
                    opts: ["Todas", "Ganadería", "Cultivos"],
                  },
                  {
                    label: "Región",
                    val: alertasFilterRegion,
                    set: setAlertasFilterRegion,
                    opts: alertasRegiones,
                  },
                ] as any[]
              ).map((f, i) => (
                <div
                  key={i}
                  style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}
                >
                  <span
                    style={{
                      fontSize: 10,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontWeight: 500,
                      fontFamily: F,
                    }}
                  >
                    {f.label}:
                  </span>
                  <select
                    value={f.val}
                    onChange={(e) => f.set(e.target.value)}
                    style={{
                      background: C.surfaceAlt,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                      borderRadius: 8,
                      padding: "5px 8px",
                      fontSize: 10,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      color: C.tx,
                      outline: "none",
                      cursor: "pointer",
                    }}
                  >
                    {f.opts.map((o: string) => (
                      <option key={o}>{o}</option>
                    ))}
                  </select>
                </div>
              ))}
              <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}>
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 10,
                    color: C.txl,
                    fontWeight: 500,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  Orden:
                </span>
                <select
                  value={alertasSort}
                  onChange={(e) => setAlertasSort(e.target.value)}
                  style={{
                    background: C.surfaceAlt,
                    border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                    borderRadius: 8,
                    padding: "5px 8px",
                    fontSize: 10,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    color: C.tx,
                    outline: "none",
                    cursor: "pointer",
                  }}
                >
                  <option value="riesgo_desc">Riesgo ↓</option>
                  <option value="ha_desc">Ha ↓</option>
                  <option value="monto_desc">Monto ↓</option>
                  <option value="finca_asc">Finca A–Z</option>
                  <option value="region_asc">Región A–Z</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <span
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  marginLeft: "auto",
                  whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                }}
              >
                {alertasFiltered.length} de {fincasConAlerta.length} fincas
              </span>
            </div>
            <div
              style={{
                overflowX: "auto",
                overflowY: "scroll",
                maxHeight: ROW_H * VISIBLE,
                width: "100%",
              }}
            >
              <table
                style={{
                  width: "100%",
                  borderCollapse: "collapse",
                  tableLayout: "fixed",
                  minWidth: 1500,
                }}
              >
                <colgroup>
                  <col style={{ width: 28 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 120 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 90 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 130 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 85 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 90 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 50 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 60 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 100 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 95 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 50 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 80 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 70 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 130 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 85 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 65 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 80 }} />
                  <col style={{ width: 80 }} />
                </colgroup>
                <thead
                  style={{
                    position: "sticky",
                    top: 0,
                    zIndex: 2,
                    background: C.surface,
                  }}
                >
                  <tr>
                    {[
                      "",
                      "Productor",
                      "Teléfono",
                      "Finca",
                      "Región",
                      "Actividad",
                      "Ha",
                      "Monto",
                      "Fase Fenológica",
                      "Estado Salud",
                      "NDVI",
                      "Rend. Est.",
                      "P. Cosecha",
                      "Alerta",
                      "Fecha Alerta",
                      "Riesgo",
                      "Inicio Ciclo",
                      "Fin Ciclo",
                    ].map((h) => (
                      <th
                        key={h}
                        style={{
                          textAlign: "left",
                          color: C.txl,
                          fontSize: 10,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          fontWeight: 600,
                          letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                          textTransform: "uppercase",
                          padding: "8px 8px",
                          borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                          whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                        }}
                      >
                        {h}
                      </th>
                    ))}
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {alertasFiltered.map((d, i) => {
                    const uRev = ultimasRevisiones.find((r) => r.id === d.id);
                    const tieneAlertaTele = uRev?.alertaTeledeteccion;
                    const isExpanded = expandedRow === d.id;
                    const revisiones = d.logRevisiones || [];
                    const ndviData = revisiones.map((r) => ({
                      fecha: r.fechaActualizacion?.slice(5),
                      ndvi: r.indices?.ndvi,
                      alerta: !!r.alertaTeledeteccion,
                    }));
                    return (
                      <React.Fragment key={d.id}>
                        <tr
                          onClick={() =>
                            revisiones.length > 0 &&
                            setExpandedRow(isExpanded ? null : d.id)
                          }
                          style={{
                            background: isExpanded
                              ? C.b50
                              : tieneAlertaTele
                              ? "rgba(239,68,68,0.07)"
                              : i % 2 === 0
                              ? "transparent"
                              : C.surfaceAlt,
                            height: ROW_H,
                            borderLeft: tieneAlertaTele
                              ? `3px solid ${C.r400}`
                              : isExpanded
                              ? `3px solid ${C.b400}`
                              : "3px solid transparent",
                            cursor:
                              revisiones.length > 0 ? "pointer" : "default",
                            transition: "background 0.15s",
                          }}
                          onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                            if (revisiones.length > 0)
                              e.currentTarget.style.background = isExpanded
                                ? C.b100
                                : "rgba(0,0,0,0.03)";
                          }}
                          onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                            e.currentTarget.style.background = isExpanded
                              ? C.b50
                              : tieneAlertaTele
                              ? "rgba(239,68,68,0.07)"
                              : i % 2 === 0
                              ? "transparent"
                              : C.surfaceAlt;
                          }}
                        >
                          <td style={{ padding: "0 4px", textAlign: "center" }}>
                            {revisiones.length > 0 && (
                              <span
                                style={{
                                  color: isExpanded ? C.b500 : C.txl,
                                  fontSize: 10,
                                  padding: "2px 4px",
                                  fontFamily: F,
                                  transition: "color 0.15s",
                                  userSelect: "none",
                                }}
                              >
                                {isExpanded ? "▼" : "▶"}
                              </span>
                            )}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px 0 0",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.tx,
                              fontWeight: 500,
                              overflow: "hidden",
                              textOverflow: "ellipsis",
                              whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                            }}
                          >
                            {d.productor}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txl,
                            }}
                          >
                            {d.telefono || "—"}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txm,
                              overflow: "hidden",
                              textOverflow: "ellipsis",
                              whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                            }}
                          >
                            {d.finca}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txm,
                            }}
                          >
                            {d.region}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txm,
                            }}
                          >
                            {d.subActividad}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.tx,
                              fontWeight: 600,
                            }}
                          >
                            {d.ha.toLocaleString()}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.g600,
                              fontWeight: 600,
                            }}
                          >
                            ${(d.monto / 1000000).toFixed(1)}M
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txm,
                            }}
                          >
                            {(() => {
                              const u = ultimasRevisiones.find(
                                (r) => r.id === d.id
                              );
                              return u?.faseFenologica || "—";
                            })()}
                          </td>
                          <td style={{ padding: "0 8px" }}>
                            {(() => {
                              const u = ultimasRevisiones.find(
                                (r) => r.id === d.id
                              );
                              if (!u?.estadoSalud)
                                return (
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      color: C.txll,
                                      fontSize: 10,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    —
                                  </span>
                                );
                              const sc =
                                u.estadoSalud === "Óptimo"
                                  ? C.g500
                                  : u.estadoSalud === "Bueno"
                                  ? C.g400
                                  : u.estadoSalud.includes("Requiere")
                                  ? C.a500
                                  : C.r500;
                              return (
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    background: sc + "22",
                                    color: sc,
                                    borderRadius: 5,
                                    padding: "1px 6px",
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    fontWeight: 600,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {u.estadoSalud}
                                </span>
                              );
                            })()}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txm,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                            }}
                          >
                            {(() => {
                              const u = ultimasRevisiones.find(
                                (r) => r.id === d.id
                              );
                              return u?.indices?.ndvi?.toFixed(3) || "—";
                            })()}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txm,
                            }}
                          >
                            {(() => {
                              const u = ultimasRevisiones.find(
                                (r) => r.id === d.id
                              );
                              return u?.rendimientoEstimado || "—";
                            })()}
                          </td>
                          <td style={{ padding: "0 8px" }}>
                            {(() => {
                              const u = ultimasRevisiones.find(
                                (r) => r.id === d.id
                              );
                              if (!u?.probabilidadCosechaExitosa)
                                return (
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      color: C.txll,
                                      fontSize: 10,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    —
                                  </span>
                                );
                              const pc = u.probabilidadCosechaExitosa;
                              return (
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    background:
                                      pc >= 80
                                        ? C.g50
                                        : pc >= 60
                                        ? C.a100
                                        : C.r100,
                                    color:
                                      pc >= 80
                                        ? C.g600
                                        : pc >= 60
                                        ? C.a600
                                        : C.r600,
                                    borderRadius: 5,
                                    padding: "1px 6px",
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {pc}%
                                </span>
                              );
                            })()}
                          </td>
                          <td style={{ padding: "0 8px" }}>
                            <span
                              style={{
                                background: C.a100,
                                color: C.a700,
                                borderRadius: 6,
                                padding: "2px 6px",
                                fontSize: 10,
                                fontFamily: F,
                                fontWeight: 600,
                                whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                              }}
                            >
                              {d.alerta}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txm,
                            }}
                          >
                            {d.fechaAlerta || "—"}
                          </td>
                          <td style={{ padding: "0 8px" }}>
                            <span
                              style={{
                                color:
                                  d.riesgo === "Alto"
                                    ? C.r600
                                    : d.riesgo === "Medio"
                                    ? C.a500
                                    : C.g500,
                                fontSize: 10,
                                fontFamily: F,
                                fontWeight: 600,
                              }}
                            >
                              {d.riesgo}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txm,
                            }}
                          >
                            {d.inicioCiclo || "—"}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.txm,
                            }}
                          >
                            {d.finCiclo || "—"}
                          </td>
                          <td
                            style={{ padding: "0 6px", textAlign: "center" }}
                            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                          >
                            <button
                              onClick={() => setAlertasDrillFinca(d)}
                              title="Ver ficha completa"
                              style={{
                                background: C.g50,
                                border: `1px solid ${C.g200}`,
                                borderRadius: 6,
                                padding: "2px 7px",
                                fontSize: 9.5,
                                fontWeight: 600,
                                color: C.g600,
                                fontFamily: F,
                                cursor: "pointer",
                                whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                              }}
                              onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                                (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.g100)
                              }
                              onMouseLeave={(e) =>
                                (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.g50)
                              }
                            >
                              ↗ Ficha
                            </button>
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                        {isExpanded && revisiones.length > 0 && (
                          <tr style={{ background: C.b50 }}>
                            <td colSpan={19} style={{ padding: "0" }}>
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  padding: "12px 16px 14px",
                                  borderTop: `1px solid ${C.b200}`,
                                  borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.b200}`,
                                }}
                              >
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    alignItems: "center",
                                    gap: 10,
                                    marginBottom: 10,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 9,
                                      fontWeight: 700,
                                      color: C.b600,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      textTransform: "uppercase",
                                      letterSpacing: "0.07em",
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    📡 Historial de Revisiones Satelitales —{" "}
                                    {d.productor}
                                  </span>
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 9,
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {revisiones.length} revisiones registradas
                                  </span>
                                </div>
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    gap: 16,
                                    alignItems: "flex-start",
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {/* NDVI Satellite image */}
                                  <div
                                    style={{
                                      flexShrink: 0,
                                      display: "flex",
                                      flexDirection: "column",
                                      gap: 4,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    <p
                                      style={{
                                        margin: 0,
                                        fontSize: 8.5,
                                        fontWeight: 600,
                                        color: C.txl,
                                        fontFamily: F,
                                        textTransform: "uppercase",
                                        letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                                      }}
                                    >
                                      Imagen Satelital NDVI
                                    </p>
                                    <div
                                      style={{
                                        position: "relative",
                                        width: 130,
                                        height: 100,
                                        borderRadius: 6,
                                        overflow: "hidden",
                                        background: C.b50,
                                        border: `1px solid ${C.b200}`,
                                      }}
                                    >
                                      <img
                                        src={NDVI_PLACEHOLDER}
                                        alt="NDVI"
                                        style={{
                                          width: "100%",
                                          height: "100%",
                                          objectFit: "cover",
                                          objectPosition: "center",
                                        }}
                                      />
                                      <div
                                        style={{
                                          position: "absolute",
                                          bottom: 0,
                                          left: 0,
                                          right: 0,
                                          background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.45)",
                                          padding: "2px 5px",
                                          display: "flex",
                                          justifyContent: "space-between",
                                          alignItems: "center",
                                        }}
                                      >
                                        <span
                                          style={{
                                            fontSize: 7.5,
                                            color: "#fff",
                                            fontFamily: F,
                                            fontWeight: 600,
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          NDVI
                                        </span>
                                        <span
                                          style={{
                                            fontSize: 7.5,
                                            color: "#aef",
                                            fontFamily: F,
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          {d.ultimaRevision ||
                                            revisiones[0]?.fechaActualizacion ||
                                            "—"}
                                        </span>
                                      </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div
                                      style={{
                                        display: "flex",
                                        gap: 3,
                                        alignItems: "center",
                                      }}
                                    >
                                      {[
                                        ["#c8e6c9", "0"],
                                        ["#81c784", "0.3"],
                                        ["#2e7d32", "0.6"],
                                        ["#1b5e20", "0.9+"],
                                      ].map(([col, lbl]) => (
                                        <div
                                          key={lbl}
                                          style={{
                                            display: "flex",
                                            alignItems: "center",
                                            gap: 2,
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          <div
                                            style={{
                                              width: 8,
                                              height: 8,
                                              background: col,
                                              borderRadius: 1,
                                            }}
                                          />
                                          <span
                                            style={{
                                              fontSize: 7,
                                              color: C.txl,
                                              fontFamily: F,
                                            }}
                                          >
                                            {lbl}
                                          </span>
                                        </div>
                                      ))}
                                    </div>
                                  </div>
                                  {/* Sparkline NDVI */}
                                  <div style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>
                                    <p
                                      style={{
                                        margin: "0 0 4px",
                                        fontSize: 8.5,
                                        fontWeight: 600,
                                        color: C.txl,
                                        fontFamily: F,
                                        textTransform: "uppercase",
                                        letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                                      }}
                                    >
                                      Evolución NDVI
                                    </p>
                                    <LineChart
                                      width={200}
                                      height={70}
                                      data={ndviData}
                                      margin={{
                                        top: 4,
                                        right: 4,
                                        bottom: 0,
                                        left: 0,
                                      }}
                                    >
                                      <Line
                                        type="monotone"
                                        dataKey="ndvi"
                                        stroke={C.g500}
                                        strokeWidth={2}
                                        dot={(props) => {
                                          const { cx, cy, payload } = props;
                                          return (
                                            <circle
                                              key={cx}
                                              cx={cx}
                                              cy={cy}
                                              r={3}
                                              fill={
                                                payload.alerta ? C.r500 : C.g500
                                              }
                                              stroke="none"
                                            />
                                          );
                                        }}
                                      />
                                      <Tooltip
                                        contentStyle={{
                                          fontSize: 9,
                                          fontFamily: F,
                                          padding: "3px 7px",
                                        }}
                                        formatter={(v) => [
                                          Number(v).toFixed(3),
                                          "NDVI",
                                        ]}
                                        labelFormatter={(l) => l}
                                      />
                                      <XAxis
                                        dataKey="fecha"
                                        tick={{
                                          fontSize: 8,
                                          fontFamily: F,
                                          fill: C.txl,
                                        }}
                                        axisLine={false}
                                        tickLine={false}
                                      />
                                    </LineChart>
                                  </div>
                                  {/* Mini-table */}
                                  <div style={{ flex: 1, overflowX: "auto" }}>
                                    <table
                                      style={{
                                        width: "100%",
                                        borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                        minWidth: 600,
                                      }}
                                    >
                                      <thead>
                                        <tr>
                                          {[
                                            "Fecha",
                                            "Fase Fenológica",
                                            "Estado Salud",
                                            "NDVI",
                                            "Anomalía",
                                            "Rend. Est.",
                                            "P. Cosecha",
                                            "Alerta",
                                          ].map((h) => (
                                            <th
                                              key={h}
                                              style={{
                                                textAlign: "left",
                                                fontSize: 8,
                                                fontWeight: 700,
                                                color: C.txl,
                                                fontFamily: F,
                                                textTransform: "uppercase",
                                                letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                                                padding: "3px 8px",
                                                borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.b200}`,
                                                whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                              }}
                                            >
                                              {h}
                                            </th>
                                          ))}
                                        </tr>
                                      </thead>
                                      <tbody>
                                        {[...revisiones]
                                          .reverse()
                                          .map((rev, ri) => {
                                            const anom =
                                              rev.indices?.anomaliaNdvi;
                                            const anomColor =
                                              anom == null
                                                ? C.txl
                                                : anom > 0
                                                ? C.g600
                                                : anom < -5
                                                ? C.r600
                                                : C.a500;
                                            const salud = rev.estadoSalud;
                                            const saludColor =
                                              salud === "Óptimo"
                                                ? C.g500
                                                : salud === "Bueno"
                                                ? C.g400
                                                : salud?.includes("Requiere")
                                                ? C.a500
                                                : C.r500;
                                            const pc =
                                              rev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa;
                                            return (
                                              <tr
                                                key={ri}
                                                style={{
                                                  background:
                                                    ri % 2 === 0
                                                      ? "transparent"
                                                      : "rgba(59,130,246,0.04)",
                                                  borderLeft:
                                                    rev.alertaTeledeteccion
                                                      ? `2px solid ${C.r400}`
                                                      : "2px solid transparent",
                                                }}
                                              >
                                                <td
                                                  style={{
                                                    padding: "4px 8px",
                                                    fontSize: 9.5,
                                                    fontFamily: F,
                                                    color: C.txm,
                                                    whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                                    fontWeight: 600,
                                                  }}
                                                >
                                                  {rev.fechaActualizacion ||
                                                    "—"}
                                                </td>
                                                <td
                                                  style={{
                                                    padding: "4px 8px",
                                                    fontSize: 9.5,
                                                    fontFamily: F,
                                                    color: C.txm,
                                                    whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                                  }}
                                                >
                                                  {rev.faseFenologica || "—"}
                                                </td>
                                                <td
                                                  style={{ padding: "4px 8px" }}
                                                >
                                                  {salud ? (
                                                    <span
                                                      style={{
                                                        background:
                                                          saludColor + "22",
                                                        color: saludColor,
                                                        borderRadius: 4,
                                                        padding: "1px 6px",
                                                        fontSize: 9,
                                                        fontFamily: F,
                                                        fontWeight: 600,
                                                        whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                                      }}
                                                    >
                                                      {salud}
                                                    </span>
                                                  ) : (
                                                    <span
                                                      style={{
                                                        color: C.txl,
                                                        fontSize: 9,
                                                      }}
                                                    >
                                                      —
                                                    </span>
                                                  )}
                                                </td>
                                                <td
                                                  style={{
                                                    padding: "4px 8px",
                                                    fontSize: 9.5,
                                                    fontFamily: F,
                                                    color: C.txm,
                                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                                  }}
                                                >
                                                  {rev.indices?.ndvi?.toFixed(
                                                    3
                                                  ) ?? "—"}
                                                </td>
                                                <td
                                                  style={{
                                                    padding: "4px 8px",
                                                    fontSize: 9.5,
                                                    fontFamily: F,
                                                    color: anomColor,
                                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                                  }}
                                                >
                                                  {anom != null
                                                    ? anom > 0
                                                      ? `+${anom}`
                                                      : `${anom}`
                                                    : "—"}
                                                </td>
                                                <td
                                                  style={{
                                                    padding: "4px 8px",
                                                    fontSize: 9.5,
                                                    fontFamily: F,
                                                    color: C.txm,
                                                  }}
                                                >
                                                  {rev.rendimientoEstimado ||
                                                    "—"}
                                                </td>
                                                <td
                                                  style={{ padding: "4px 8px" }}
                                                >
                                                  {pc != null ? (
                                                    <span
                                                      style={{
                                                        background:
                                                          pc >= 80
                                                            ? C.g50
                                                            : pc >= 60
                                                            ? C.a100
                                                            : C.r100,
                                                        color:
                                                          pc >= 80
                                                            ? C.g600
                                                            : pc >= 60
                                                            ? C.a600
                                                            : C.r600,
                                                        borderRadius: 4,
                                                        padding: "1px 6px",
                                                        fontSize: 9,
                                                        fontFamily: F,
                                                        fontWeight: 700,
                                                      }}
                                                    >
                                                      {pc}%
                                                    </span>
                                                  ) : (
                                                    <span
                                                      style={{
                                                        color: C.txl,
                                                        fontSize: 9,
                                                      }}
                                                    >
                                                      —
                                                    </span>
                                                  )}
                                                </td>
                                                <td
                                                  style={{ padding: "4px 8px" }}
                                                >
                                                  {rev.alertaTeledeteccion ? (
                                                    <span
                                                      style={{
                                                        background: C.r100,
                                                        color: C.r600,
                                                        borderRadius: 4,
                                                        padding: "1px 6px",
                                                        fontSize: 9,
                                                        fontFamily: F,
                                                        fontWeight: 600,
                                                        whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                                      }}
                                                    >
                                                      ⚠{" "}
                                                      {rev.alertaTeledeteccion}
                                                    </span>
                                                  ) : (
                                                    <span
                                                      style={{
                                                        color: C.g500,
                                                        fontSize: 9,
                                                        fontFamily: F,
                                                        fontWeight: 600,
                                                      }}
                                                    >
                                                      ✓ Sin alerta
                                                    </span>
                                                  )}
                                                </td>
                                              </tr>
                                            );
                                          })}
                                      </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            </td>
                          </tr>
                        )}
                      </React.Fragment>
                    );
                  })}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      {alertasDrillFinca && (
        <FincaModal
          finca={alertasDrillFinca}
          onClose={() => setAlertasDrillFinca(null)}
          ultimasRevisiones={ultimasRevisiones}
        />
      )}
    </>
  );
};
const AtlasChat = ({ insights }) => {
  const [chatInput, setChatInput] = React.useState("");
  const [chatMessages, setChatMessages] = React.useState<
    { role: string; text: string; icon?: string; label?: string }[]
  >([]);
  const [chatLoading, setChatLoading] = React.useState(false);
  const messagesBoxRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (insights.length > 0 && chatMessages.length === 0) {
      setChatMessages([
        {
          role: "atlas",
          text: "Soy Atlas, tu asistente agrofinanciero. Estoy aquí para ayudarte a entender el estado de tu cartera. Pregúntame sobre cualquier indicador o tendencia.",
        },
        ...insights.slice(0, 3).map((ins) => ({
          role: "atlas",
          text: ins.text,
          icon: ins.icon,
          label: ins.label,
        })),
      ]);
    }
  }, [insights]);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const box = messagesBoxRef.current;
    if (box) box.scrollTop = box.scrollHeight;
  }, [chatMessages, chatLoading]);

  const sendMessage = () => {
    if (!chatInput.trim()) return;
    setChatMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "user", text: chatInput }]);
    setChatInput("");
    setChatLoading(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setChatMessages((prev) => [
        ...prev,
        {
          role: "atlas",
          text: "Entendido. Estoy analizando tu consulta sobre los datos de la cartera para darte una respuesta precisa.",
        },
      ]);
      setChatLoading(false);
    }, 700);
  };

  return (
    /* gridRow span + position:relative wrapper — inner absolute div fills exactly this cell */
    <div style={{ gridRow: "1 / 3", position: "relative", minHeight: 320 }}>
      <div
        style={{
          position: "absolute",
          inset: 0,
          background: `linear-gradient(155deg, ${C.g50} 0%, ${C.b50} 100%)`,
          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
          borderRadius: 12,
          overflow: "hidden",
          display: "flex",
          flexDirection: "column",
        }}
      >
        {/* Color bar */}
        <div
          style={{
            position: "absolute",
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            height: 3,
            background: `linear-gradient(90deg, ${C.g600}, ${C.b500})`,
            borderRadius: "12px 12px 0 0",
          }}
        />

        {/* Header */}
        <div
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            gap: 6,
            padding: "14px 16px 10px",
            flexShrink: 0,
          }}
        >
          <svg
            width="15"
            height="15"
            viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            fill="none"
            stroke={C.accent}
            strokeWidth="2.5"
          >
            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
            <polygon points="16.24 7.76 14.12 14.12 7.76 16.24 9.88 9.88 16.24 7.76" />
          </svg>
          <p
            style={{
              margin: 0,
              fontSize: 11,
              fontWeight: 800,
              color: C.tx,
              fontFamily: F,
              letterSpacing: "0.06em",
            }}
          >
            ATLAS
          </p>
          <span
            style={{
              fontSize: 10,
              color: C.txl,
              fontFamily: F,
              fontWeight: 400,
            }}
          >
            · Asistente de Cartera
          </span>
          <div
            style={{
              marginLeft: "auto",
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              gap: 4,
              background: C.g50,
              border: `1px solid ${C.g200}`,
              borderRadius: 6,
              padding: "2px 7px",
            }}
          >
            <div
              style={{
                width: 5,
                height: 5,
                borderRadius: "50%",
                background: C.g500,
              }}
            />
            <span
              style={{
                fontSize: 10,
                color: C.g600,
                fontFamily: F,
                fontWeight: 600,
              }}
            >
              EN VIVO
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Messages — scrolls internally */}
        <div
          ref={messagesBoxRef}
          style={{
            flex: 1,
            overflowY: "auto",
            padding: "0 12px 8px",
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "column",
            gap: 8,
            scrollbarWidth: "none",
          }}
        >
          {chatMessages.map((msg, i) => (
            <div
              key={i}
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                flexDirection: "column",
                alignItems: msg.role === "user" ? "flex-end" : "flex-start",
                gap: 2,
              }}
            >
              {msg.role === "atlas" && msg.label && (
                <div
                  style={{
