                    display: "flex",
                    alignItems: "center",
                    gap: 4,
                    paddingLeft: 2,
                  }}
                >
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 11 }}>{msg.icon}</span>
                  <span
                    style={{
                      fontSize: 10,
                      fontWeight: 700,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      textTransform: "uppercase",
                      letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                    }}
                  >
                    {msg.label}
                  </span>
                </div>
              )}
              <div
                style={{
                  maxWidth: "92%",
                  padding: "8px 11px",
                  borderRadius:
                    msg.role === "user"
                      ? "10px 10px 3px 10px"
                      : "3px 10px 10px 10px",
                  background:
                    msg.role === "user" ? C.accent : "rgba(255,255,255,0.82)",
                  border:
                    msg.role === "user" ? "none" : `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                  boxShadow: "0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)",
                }}
              >
                <p
                  style={{
                    margin: 0,
                    fontSize: 11,
                    color: msg.role === "user" ? "#fff" : C.txm,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    lineHeight: 1.55,
                  }}
                >
                  {msg.text}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
          {chatLoading && (
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start" }}>
              <div
                style={{
                  padding: "8px 12px",
                  borderRadius: "3px 10px 10px 10px",
                  background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.82)",
                  border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                }}
              >
                <span style={{ fontSize: 14, letterSpacing: 2 }}>···</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Input */}
        <div
          style={{
            padding: "8px 12px 12px",
            flexShrink: 0,
            borderTop: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
          }}
        >
          <div
            className="atlas-input-glow"
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              gap: 6,
              alignItems: "center",
              background: C.surface,
              borderRadius: 8,
              border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              padding: "4px 6px 4px 10px",
            }}
          >
            <input
              value={chatInput}
              onChange={(e) => setChatInput(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={(e) => {
                if (e.key === "Enter") {
                  e.preventDefault();
                  sendMessage();
                }
              }}
              placeholder="Pregunta sobre la cartera..."
              style={{
                flex: 1,
                border: "none",
                outline: "none",
                fontSize: 11,
                fontFamily: F,
                color: C.tx,
                background: "transparent",
              }}
            />
            <button
              onClick={sendMessage}
              style={{
                background: C.accent,
                color: "#fff",
                border: "none",
                borderRadius: 6,
                padding: "4px 10px",
                cursor: "pointer",
                fontSize: 10,
                fontWeight: 700,
                fontFamily: F,
                flexShrink: 0,
              }}
            >
              ↑
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const TabResumen = ({
  cfg,
  modoGlobal,
  setModoGlobal,
  setModalRiesgo,
  filters,
  setFilters,
  setModalHidrica,
  setModalDeforest,
  setModalMora,
  setModalEmisoras,
  aprobados,
  mixRiesgoData,
  trendData,
  haAprobadas,
  montoAprobado,
  haPromedio,
  montoPromedio,
  totalAprobadas,
  totalConsultas,
  pctHaGanado,
  pctHaCultivos,
  pctMontoGanado,
  pctMontoCultivos,
  haGanado,
  haCultivos,
  montoGanado,
  montoCultivos,
  fincasDeficit,
  haDeficit,
  montoDeficit,
  haNoDeficit,
  montoNoDeficit,
  aguaTotalSuplir,
  fincasConRiego,
  fincasSinRiego,
  haConRiego,
  haSinRiego,
  montoConRiego,
  montoSinRiego,
  pctHaConRiego,
  pctHaDeficit,
  totalEmisiones,
  totalCapturas,
  balanceNetoCO2,
  autosEquiv,
  arbolesEquiv,
  fincasEmisoras,
  fincasCaptoras,
  fincasNeutras,
  haEmisoras,
  haCaptoras,
  montoEmisoras,
  montoCaptoras,
  fincasDeforest,
  fincasReforest,
  haNetaDeforest,
  haNetaReforest,
  balanceForestal,
  pctDeforest,
  pctReforest,
  rankingRiesgo,
  fincasAltoRiesgo,
  haAltoRiesgo,
  enMora,
  fincasEnMora,
  haEnMora,
  montoEnMoraTotal,
  pctHaMora,
  pctMontoMora,
  diasMoraPonderados,
  mora30,
  mora60,
  mora90,
  haMora30,
  haMora60,
  haMora90,
  montoMora30,
  montoMora60,
  montoMora90,
  ultimasRevisiones,
  fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion,
  territoriosData,
}) => {
  const [modoRiesgo, setModoRiesgo] = useState("consultas");
  const [modoActividad, setModoActividad] = useState("consultas");
  const [modoComposicion, setModoComposicion] = useState("monto");
  const [insights, setInsights] = useState([]);

  // ── Compute insights deterministically from portfolio data (no API needed) ──
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const td = territoriosData || [];

    // ── Per-region aggregation ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    const byRegion: Record<string, any> = {};
    td.forEach((d) => {
      if (!byRegion[d.region])
        byRegion[d.region] = {
          ha: 0,
          monto: 0,
          fincas: 0,
          haDeficit: 0,
          altoRiesgo: 0,
          altoRiesgoMonto: 0,
          deforestFincas: 0,
          deforestHa: 0,
          mora1_30: 0,
          mora31_60: 0,
          mora60plus: 0,
          moraMonto: 0,
          cultivos: 0,
          ganaderia: 0,
          cultivosAlto: 0,
          ganaderiaAlto: 0,
        };
      const r = byRegion[d.region];
      r.ha += d.ha;
      r.monto += d.monto;
      r.fincas++;
      if ((d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0) > 0) r.haDeficit += d.ha;
      if (d.riesgo === "Alto") {
        r.altoRiesgo++;
        r.altoRiesgoMonto += d.monto;
      }
      if ((d.haPerdidaDeforestacion || 0) > 0) {
        r.deforestFincas++;
        r.deforestHa += d.haPerdidaDeforestacion || 0;
      }
      if (d.mora === "Si") {
        const dias = d.diasDeMora || 0;
        if (dias <= 30) r.mora1_30++;
        else if (dias <= 60) r.mora31_60++;
        else r.mora60plus++;
        r.moraMonto += d.montoEnMora || 0;
      }
      if (d.actividad === "Cultivos") {
        r.cultivos++;
        if (d.riesgo === "Alto") r.cultivosAlto++;
      }
      if (d.actividad === "Ganadería") {
        r.ganaderia++;
        if (d.riesgo === "Alto") r.ganaderiaAlto++;
      }
    });

    const regions = Object.entries(byRegion).map(([reg, v]: [string, any]) => ({
      reg,
      pctAlto: v.fincas > 0 ? Math.round((v.altoRiesgo / v.fincas) * 100) : 0,
      pctDef: v.ha > 0 ? Math.round((v.haDeficit / v.ha) * 100) : 0,
      ...v,
    }));

    // ── Cross-cuts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const altoMora = td.filter((d) => d.riesgo === "Alto" && d.mora === "Si");
    const altoMoraMonto = altoMora.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0);
    const topRegAlto = [...regions].sort((a, b) => b.pctAlto - a.pctAlto)[0];
    const topRegDef = [...regions].sort((a, b) => b.pctDef - a.pctDef)[0];
    const deforestTotal = td.filter(
      (d) => (d.haPerdidaDeforestacion || 0) > 0
    ).length;
    const cultAlto = td.filter(
      (d) => d.actividad === "Cultivos" && d.riesgo === "Alto"
    ).length;
    const ganAlto = td.filter(
      (d) => d.actividad === "Ganadería" && d.riesgo === "Alto"
    ).length;
    const cultTotal = td.filter((d) => d.actividad === "Cultivos").length;
    const ganTotal = td.filter((d) => d.actividad === "Ganadería").length;
    const mora60plus = td.filter(
      (d) => d.mora === "Si" && (d.diasDeMora || 0) > 60
    );
    const mora60Monto = mora60plus.reduce(
      (s, d) => s + (d.montoEnMora || 0),
      0
    );

    // ── Additional cross-cuts for new insights ────────────────────────────
    // Satellite / NDVI alerts
    const fincasConAlertas = td.filter(
      (d) => d.alertasDetectadas && d.alertasDetectadas.length > 0
    );
    const fincasNdviNeg = td.filter((d) => {
      if (!d.logRevisiones) return false;
      const last = d.logRevisiones[d.logRevisiones.length - 1];
      return last && last.indices && (last.indices.anomaliaNdvi || 0) < -5;
    });
    const fincasIncendio = td.filter((d) => (d.haPerdidaPorIncendio || 0) > 0);
    const haIncendioTotal = fincasIncendio.reduce(
      (s, d) => s + (d.haPerdidaPorIncendio || 0),
      0
    );

    // Portfolio concentration (top region by monto)
    const topRegMonto = [...regions].sort((a, b) => b.monto - a.monto)[0];
    const montoTotal = regions.reduce((s, r) => s + r.monto, 0);
    const topRegPct =
      montoTotal > 0 && topRegMonto
        ? Math.round((topRegMonto.monto / montoTotal) * 100)
        : 0;

    // ── Build 5 insights from real data ───────────────────────────────────
    const result: any[] = [];

    // INSIGHT 1 — Mora x Riesgo Alto (highest priority)
    if (altoMora.length > 0) {
      const pctCartera =
        montoAprobado > 0
          ? ((altoMoraMonto / montoAprobado) * 100).toFixed(1)
          : "0";
      result.push({
        icon: "🔴",
        label: "Mora & Riesgo Alto",
        text: `${altoMora.length} finca${
          altoMora.length > 1 ? "s" : ""
        } concentran Riesgo Alto y mora simultánea ($${(
          altoMoraMonto / 1e6
        ).toFixed(
          1
        )}M, ${pctCartera}% de cartera). Revisar garantías reales y evaluar reestructuración prioritaria.`,
      });
    } else if (mora60plus.length > 0) {
      result.push({
        icon: "🔴",
        label: "Mora Crítica >60d",
        text: `${mora60plus.length} finca${
          mora60plus.length > 1 ? "s" : ""
        } superan 60 días de mora ($${(mora60Monto / 1e6).toFixed(
          1
        )}M). Iniciar proceso de cobranza intensiva y revisión de garantías antes del próximo ciclo.`,
      });
    } else {
      result.push({
        icon: "📊",
        label: "Mora Controlada",
        text: `Mora en tramo 1-30d representa ${pctMontoMora}% del monto total ($${(
          montoEnMoraTotal / 1e6
        ).toFixed(
          1
        )}M). Sin fincas en riesgo alto simultáneo. Monitoreo preventivo recomendado.`,
      });
    }

    // INSIGHT 2 — Territorio x Déficit hídrico
    if (topRegDef && topRegDef.pctDef > 30) {
      result.push({
        icon: "💧",
        label: "Estrés Hídrico",
        text: `${topRegDef.reg} concentra el mayor déficit hídrico (${
          topRegDef.pctDef
        }% del área). Con ${topRegDef.altoRiesgo} finca${
          topRegDef.altoRiesgo !== 1 ? "s" : ""
        } en Riesgo Alto, monitorear capacidad de pago en próximo ciclo de cosecha.`,
      });
    } else if (topRegAlto && topRegAlto.pctAlto > 0) {
      result.push({
        icon: "⚠️",
        label: "Concentración Territorial",
        text: `${topRegAlto.reg} lidera exposición de Riesgo Alto (${
          topRegAlto.pctAlto
        }% de sus fincas, $${(topRegAlto.altoRiesgoMonto / 1e6).toFixed(
          1
        )}M). Revisar garantías reales de las ${
          topRegAlto.altoRiesgo
        } fincas con mayor exposición.`,
      });
    } else {
      result.push({
        icon: "⚠️",
        label: "Déficit Hídrico",
        text: `${pctHaDeficit}% del área total requiere riego suplementario (${(
          aguaTotalSuplir / 1e6
        ).toFixed(
          1
        )}M m³). Verificar cobertura de riego en fincas con mora activa para anticipar deterioro de pago.`,
      });
    }

    // INSIGHT 3 — Actividad x Exposición o Deforestación
    if (deforestTotal > 0) {
      const pctDef =
        td.length > 0 ? ((deforestTotal / td.length) * 100).toFixed(1) : "0";
      result.push({
        icon: "🌳",
        label: "Cumplimiento Ambiental",
        text: `${deforestTotal} finca${
          deforestTotal > 1 ? "s" : ""
        } presentan pérdida de cobertura forestal (${pctDef}% del portafolio). Riesgo legal y de reputación activo. Validar estatus normativo antes de próxima renovación.`,
      });
    } else if (cultAlto > ganAlto && cultTotal > 0) {
      const pct = Math.round((cultAlto / cultTotal) * 100);
      result.push({
        icon: "📊",
        label: "Riesgo en Cultivos",
        text: `Cultivos concentra ${cultAlto} finca${
          cultAlto !== 1 ? "s" : ""
        } en Riesgo Alto (${pct}% del segmento). Mayor exposición relativa que Ganadería. Revisar ciclos de cosecha y flujo de caja proyectado.`,
      });
    } else if (ganAlto > 0) {
      const pct = ganTotal > 0 ? Math.round((ganAlto / ganTotal) * 100) : 0;
      result.push({
        icon: "📊",
        label: "Riesgo en Ganadería",
        text: `Ganadería concentra ${ganAlto} finca${
          ganAlto !== 1 ? "s" : ""
        } en Riesgo Alto (${pct}% del segmento). Evaluar condiciones de pastizales y estrés térmico en zonas con déficit hídrico activo.`,
      });
    } else {
      result.push({
        icon: "📋",
        label: "Cartera Saludable",
        text: `Sin alertas de deforestación activas y riesgo alto distribuido uniformemente entre actividades. Mantener monitoreo satelital trimestral para detección temprana de deterioro.`,
      });
    }

    // INSIGHT 4 — Satellite / NDVI degradation alerts
    if (fincasNdviNeg.length > 0) {
      const montoNdvi = fincasNdviNeg.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0);
      const pctNdvi =
        montoAprobado > 0
          ? ((montoNdvi / montoAprobado) * 100).toFixed(1)
          : "0";
      result.push({
        icon: "🛰️",
        label: "Alerta Satelital NDVI",
        text: `${fincasNdviNeg.length} finca${
          fincasNdviNeg.length > 1 ? "s" : ""
        } muestran anomalía NDVI negativa en última revisión ($${(
          montoNdvi / 1e6
        ).toFixed(
          1
        )}M, ${pctNdvi}% de cartera). Deterioro de cobertura vegetal puede anticipar caída de rendimiento en próxima cosecha.`,
      });
    } else if (fincasConAlertas.length > 0) {
      const montoAlertas = fincasConAlertas.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0);
      result.push({
        icon: "🛰️",
        label: "Alertas Teledetección",
        text: `${fincasConAlertas.length} finca${
          fincasConAlertas.length > 1 ? "s" : ""
        } con alertas activas detectadas vía satélite ($${(
          montoAlertas / 1e6
        ).toFixed(
          1
        )}M). Incluye déficit hídrico, estrés térmico o cambio de cobertura. Priorizar visita técnica en las de Riesgo Alto.`,
      });
    } else if (fincasIncendio.length > 0) {
      result.push({
        icon: "🔥",
        label: "Pérdida por Incendio",
        text: `${fincasIncendio.length} finca${
          fincasIncendio.length > 1 ? "s" : ""
        } registran ${haIncendioTotal.toFixed(
          1
        )} ha afectadas por incendio. Evaluar impacto sobre garantía real y capacidad de pago del productor en el ciclo actual.`,
      });
    } else {
      result.push({
        icon: "🛰️",
        label: "Monitoreo Satelital OK",
        text: `Sin anomalías NDVI ni alertas de teledetección activas en el portafolio. Cobertura vegetal estable. Mantener revisiones trimestrales para detección temprana de estrés hídrico o cambio de uso de suelo.`,
      });
    }

    // INSIGHT 5 — Concentración geográfica de cartera
    if (topRegMonto && topRegPct >= 40) {
      result.push({
        icon: "📍",
        label: "Concentración Geográfica",
        text: `${topRegMonto.reg} concentra el ${topRegPct}% de la cartera ($${(
          topRegMonto.monto / 1e6
        ).toFixed(1)}M en ${
          topRegMonto.fincas
        } fincas). Alta exposición territorial ante eventos climáticos o de mercado localizados. Diversificación regional recomendada.`,
      });
    } else if (topRegMonto) {
      const top2 = [...regions].sort((a, b) => b.monto - a.monto).slice(0, 2);
      const top2Pct =
        montoTotal > 0
          ? Math.round(
              (top2.reduce((s, r) => s + r.monto, 0) / montoTotal) * 100
            )
          : 0;
      result.push({
        icon: "📍",
        label: "Distribución Territorial",
        text: `Las 2 regiones principales (${top2
          .map((r) => r.reg)
          .join(
            " y "
          )}) agrupan el ${top2Pct}% de cartera. Distribución moderada. ${
          topRegMonto.reg
        } lidera con $${(topRegMonto.monto / 1e6).toFixed(
          1
        )}M (${topRegPct}%). Monitorear correlación de riesgo climático entre regiones.`,
      });
    }

    setInsights(result);
  }, [
    territoriosData,
    montoAprobado,
    montoEnMoraTotal,
    pctMontoMora,
    pctHaDeficit,
    aguaTotalSuplir,
  ]);

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        gap: 14,
        minWidth: 0,
        width: "100%",
      }}
    >
      {cfg.kpi_resumen !== false && (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6 }}>
          {/* ── Active filters bar ── */}
          {(() => {
            const hasFilters =
              filters.region !== "Todas" ||
              filters.sucursal !== "Todas" ||
              filters.agente ||
              filters.desde !== "2024-01-01" ||
              filters.hasta !== "2024-12-31" ||
              filters.estadoSolicitud !== "Todos";
            return (
              <div
                style={{
                  display: "flex",
                  alignItems: "center",
                  gap: 6,
                  flexWrap: "wrap",
                  padding: "4px 2px",
                }}
              >
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 10.5,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    color: C.txl,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    textTransform: "uppercase",
                    letterSpacing: "0.07em",
                    flexShrink: 0,
                  }}
                >
                  Vista:
                </span>
                {!hasFilters && (
                  <span
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      gap: 4,
                      background: C.surfaceAlt,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                      borderRadius: 20,
                      padding: "2px 9px",
                      fontSize: 10,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      fontWeight: 500,
                    }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{
                        width: 5,
                        height: 5,
                        borderRadius: "50%",
                        background: C.txll,
                        flexShrink: 0,
                      }}
                    />
                    Toda la cartera · {filters.desde.slice(0, 4)}
                  </span>
                )}
                {filters.region !== "Todas" && (
                  <span
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      gap: 4,
                      background: C.g50,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.g200}`,
                      borderRadius: 20,
                      padding: "2px 9px",
                      fontSize: 10,
                      color: C.g700,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      fontWeight: 600,
                    }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{
                        width: 5,
                        height: 5,

                        flexShrink: 0,
                      }}
                    />
                    Región: {filters.region}
                  </span>
                )}
                {filters.sucursal !== "Todas" && (
                  <span
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      gap: 4,
                      background: C.g50,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.g200}`,
                      borderRadius: 20,
                      padding: "2px 9px",
                      fontSize: 10,
                      color: C.g700,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      fontWeight: 600,
                    }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{

                        borderRadius: "50%",

                      }}
                    />

                  </span>
                )}
                {filters.agente && (
                  <span
                    style={{

                      border: `1px solid ${C.g200}`,

                      padding: "2px 9px",

                      color: C.g700,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      fontWeight: 600,
                    }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{
                        width: 5,
                        height: 5,
                        borderRadius: "50%",
                        background: C.g500,
                        flexShrink: 0,
                      }}
                    />
                    Agente: {filters.agente}
                  </span>
                )}
                {filters.estadoSolicitud !== "Todos" && (
                  <span
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      gap: 4,
                      background: C.a100,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.a200}`,
                      borderRadius: 20,
                      padding: "2px 9px",
                      fontSize: 10,
                      color: C.a700,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      fontWeight: 600,
                    }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{
                        width: 5,
                        height: 5,
                        borderRadius: "50%",
                        background: C.a500,
                        flexShrink: 0,
                      }}
                    />
                    Estado: {filters.estadoSolicitud}
                  </span>
                )}
                {(filters.desde !== "2024-01-01" ||
                  filters.hasta !== "2024-12-31") && (
                  <span
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      gap: 4,
                      background: C.b100,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.b300}`,
                      borderRadius: 20,
                      padding: "2px 9px",
                      fontSize: 10,
                      color: C.b700,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      fontWeight: 600,
                    }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{
                        width: 5,
                        height: 5,
                        borderRadius: "50%",
                        background: C.b500,
                        flexShrink: 0,
                      }}
                    />
                    {filters.desde !== "2024-01-01" ? filters.desde : "inicio"}{" "}
                    → {filters.hasta !== "2024-12-31" ? filters.hasta : "fin"}
                  </span>
                )}
                {hasFilters && (
                  <button
                    onClick={() =>
                      setFilters({
                        desde: "2024-01-01",
                        hasta: "2024-12-31",
                        region: "Todas",
                        sucursal: "Todas",
                        agente: "",
                        estadoSolicitud: "Aprobado",
                      })
                    }
                    style={{
                      marginLeft: "auto",
                      background: "none",
                      border: "none",

                      fontSize: 10.5,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      fontWeight: 600,
                      padding: "2px 6px",
                      borderRadius: 6,
                      textDecoration: "underline",
                    }}
                  >
                    Limpiar filtros
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
            );
          })()}
          <div
            style={{
              display: "grid",
              gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3,1fr)",
              gridTemplateRows: "auto auto",
              gap: 10,
            }}
          >
            {/* Col1 Row1: Cartera */}
            <div
              style={{
                background: C.surface,
                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                borderRadius: 12,
                padding: "14px 16px",
                position: "relative",
                overflow: "hidden",

                flexDirection: "column",
                gap: 8,
              }}
            >
              <div
                style={{
                  position: "absolute",

                  left: 0,

                  background: C.g500,
                  borderRadius: "12px 12px 0 0",
                }}
              />
              {/* Header: card title only */}
              <p
                style={{

              >

              </p>
              {/* Two-column layout: KPIs left, trend chart right */}
              <div
                style={{
                  display: "flex",

                  alignItems: "stretch",
                  flex: 1,
                  minHeight: 180,
                }}
              >
                {/* LEFT: KPIs */}
                <div
                  style={{
                    display: "flex",
                    flexDirection: "column",
                    gap: 8,
                    flexShrink: 0,
                    minWidth: 130,
                  }}
                >
                  {/* KPI principal */}
                  <div>
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        alignItems: "baseline",
                        gap: 4,
                      }}
                    >
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 26,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          color: C.tx,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          lineHeight: 1,
                        }}
                      >
                        {modoGlobal === "consultas"
                          ? haAprobadas.toLocaleString()
                          : `$${(montoAprobado / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`}
                      </span>
                      {modoGlobal === "consultas" && (
                        <span
                          style={{ fontSize: 11, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          ha
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <p
                      style={{
                        margin: "3px 0 4px",
                        fontSize: 10,
                        color: C.txl,
                        fontFamily: F,
                      }}
                    >
                      {totalAprobadas} fincas aprobadas
                    </p>
                    <div
                      style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}
                    >
                      <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: C.g500 }}>↑</span>
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 13,
                          fontWeight: 800,
                          color: C.g600,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        {modoGlobal === "consultas" ? "9.8%" : "11.2%"}
                      </span>
                      <span
                        style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                      >
                        vs mes ant.
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ height: 1, background: C.border }} />
                  {/* Promedio */}
                  <div>
                    <p
                      style={{
                        margin: "0 0 2px",
                        fontSize: 10,
                        fontWeight: 600,
                        color: C.txl,
                        fontFamily: F,
                        textTransform: "uppercase",
                        letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                      }}
                    >
                      Promedio por Finca
                    </p>
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        alignItems: "baseline",
                        gap: 3,
                      }}
                    >
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 17,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          color: C.txm,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          lineHeight: 1,
                        }}
                      >
                        {modoGlobal === "consultas"
                          ? haPromedio.toLocaleString()
                          : `$${(montoPromedio / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`}
                      </span>
                      {modoGlobal === "consultas" && (
                        <span
                          style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          ha
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        alignItems: "center",
                        gap: 6,
                        marginTop: 3,
                      }}
                    >
                      <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.g500 }}>↑</span>
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 12,
                          fontWeight: 800,
                          color: C.g600,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        {modoGlobal === "consultas" ? "2.1%" : "2.8%"}
                      </span>
                      <span
                        style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                      >
                        vs mes ant.
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                {/* RIGHT: Trend chart */}
                <div
                  style={{
                    flex: 1,
                    minWidth: 0,
                    display: "flex",
                    flexDirection: "column",
                  }}
                >
                  <p
                    style={{
                      margin: "0 0 6px",
                      fontSize: 9.5,
                      fontWeight: 600,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      textTransform: "uppercase",
                      letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                      textAlign: "center",
                    }}
                  >
                    Colocaciones por nivel de riesgo
                  </p>
                  <div style={{ flex: 1, minHeight: 0 }}>
                    <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
                      <AreaChart
                        data={trendData}
                        margin={{ top: 2, right: 4, bottom: 0, left: -18 }}
                      >
                        <defs>
                          <linearGradient
                            id="tBajo"
                            x1="0"
                            y1="0"
                            x2="0"
                            y2="1"
                          >
                            <stop
                              offset="5%"
                              stopColor={C.g400}
                              stopOpacity={0.3}
                            />
                            <stop
                              offset="95%"
                              stopColor={C.g400}
                              stopOpacity={0}
                            />
                          </linearGradient>
                          <linearGradient
                            id="tMedio"
                            x1="0"
                            y1="0"
                            x2="0"
                            y2="1"
                          >
                            <stop
                              offset="5%"
                              stopColor={C.a400}
                              stopOpacity={0.3}
                            />
                            <stop
                              offset="95%"
                              stopColor={C.a400}
                              stopOpacity={0}
                            />
                          </linearGradient>
                          <linearGradient
                            id="tAlto"
                            x1="0"
                            y1="0"
                            x2="0"
                            y2="1"
                          >
                            <stop
                              offset="5%"
                              stopColor={C.r500}
                              stopOpacity={0.3}
                            />
                            <stop
                              offset="95%"
                              stopColor={C.r500}
                              stopOpacity={0}
                            />
                          </linearGradient>
                        </defs>
                        <XAxis

                          axisLine={false}
                          tickLine={false}
                        />
                        <YAxis
                          tick={{ fontSize: 7.5, fontFamily: F, fill: C.txl }}

                        <Tooltip
                          contentStyle={{

                          formatter={(v, name) => [
                            modoGlobal === "consultas"

                        />
                        <Area

                            modoGlobal === "consultas" ? "Bajo" : "BajoM"

                          fill="url(#tBajo)"
                          strokeWidth={1.5}

                        />
                        <Area

                          name="Medio"

                          strokeWidth={1.5}

                        />
                        <Area

                          }
                          name="Alto"
                          stroke={C.r500}
                          fill="url(#tAlto)"
                          strokeWidth={1.5}
                          dot={false}
                        />
                      </AreaChart>
                    </ResponsiveContainer>
                  </div>
                  {/* Legend centered */}
                  <div
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      gap: 10,
                      marginTop: 4,
                      justifyContent: "center",
                    }}
                  >
                    {[
                      ["Bajo", C.g400],
                      ["Medio", C.a400],
                      ["Alto", C.r500],
                    ].map(([label, color]) => (
                      <div
                        key={label}

                          display: "flex",

                      >
                        <div
                          style={{

                        />
                        <span
                          style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          {label}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Col2 Row1: Alto Riesgo */}
            <div
              style={{
                background: C.surface,
                border: `1px solid ${C.r200}`,
                borderRadius: 12,
                padding: "14px 16px",
                position: "relative",
                overflow: "hidden",
                display: "flex",
                flexDirection: "column",
                gap: 6,
              }}
            >
              <div
                style={{
                  position: "absolute",
                  top: 0,
                  left: 0,
                  right: 0,
                  height: 3,
                  background: C.r500,
                  borderRadius: "12px 12px 0 0",
                }}
              />
              <p
                style={{
                  margin: 0,
                  fontSize: 10.5,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  color: C.r500,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                  letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                }}
              >
                En Alto Riesgo
              </p>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6 }}>
                <div>
                  <div
                    style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", gap: 8 }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{
                        fontSize: 26,
                        fontWeight: 700,
                        color: C.r600,
                        fontFamily: F,
                        lineHeight: 1,
                      }}
                    >
                      {modoGlobal === "consultas"
                        ? haAltoRiesgo.toLocaleString()
                        : `$${(
                            aprobados
                              .filter((d) => d.riesgo === "Alto")
                              .reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0) / 1e6
                          ).toFixed(1)}M`}
                    </span>
                    {modoGlobal === "consultas" && (
                      <span
                        style={{ fontSize: 11, color: C.r400, fontFamily: F }}
                      >
                        ha
                      </span>
                    )}
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: C.r500 }}>↑</span>
                    <span
                      style={{
                        fontSize: 13,
                        fontWeight: 800,
                        color: C.r600,
                        fontFamily: F,
                      }}
                    >
                      3.2%
                    </span>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}>
                      vs mes ant.
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  {/* Top 3 fincas por mayor monto en riesgo alto */}
                  {(() => {
                    const top3 = [...aprobados]
                      .filter((d) => d.riesgo === "Alto")
                      .sort((a, b) => b.monto - a.monto)
                      .slice(0, 3);
                    if (top3.length === 0) return null;
                    return (
                      <div
                        style={{
                          marginTop: 6,
                          display: "flex",
                          flexDirection: "column",
                          gap: 3,
                        }}
                      >
                        <p
                          style={{
                            margin: 0,
                            fontSize: 10,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            color: C.r400,
                            fontFamily: F,
                            textTransform: "uppercase",
                            letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                          }}
                        >
                          Mayor riesgo por monto
                        </p>
                        {top3.map((f, i) => {
                          const moraMonto = f.montoEnMora || 0;
                          const hasMora = moraMonto > 0;
                          return (
                            <div
                              key={f.id || i}
                              style={{
                                display: "flex",
                                alignItems: "center",
                                justifyContent: "space-between",
                                background: C.r50,
                                border: `1px solid ${C.r100}`,
                                borderRadius: 6,
                                padding: "4px 8px",
                              }}
                            >
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  display: "flex",
                                  alignItems: "center",
                                  gap: 5,
                                  minWidth: 0,
                                }}
                              >
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    fontWeight: 800,
                                    color: C.r400,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    flexShrink: 0,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  #{i + 1}
                                </span>
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10.5,
                                    fontWeight: 600,
                                    color: C.txm,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                    overflow: "hidden",
                                    textOverflow: "ellipsis",
                                    maxWidth: 100,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {f.productor || f.region || "—"}
                                </span>
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10.5,
                                    color: C.txl,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    flexShrink: 0,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {f.region}
                                </span>
                              </div>
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  display: "flex",
                                  alignItems: "center",
                                  gap: 5,
                                  flexShrink: 0,
                                }}
                              >
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                    color: C.r600,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    background: C.r100,
                                    borderRadius: 4,
                                    padding: "1px 5px",
                                  }}
                                >
                                  ${(f.monto / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M
                                </span>
                                {hasMora && (
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10,
                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                      color: C.r400,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      background: C.r50,
                                      border: `1px solid ${C.r200}`,
                                      borderRadius: 4,
                                      padding: "1px 4px",
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    mora
                                  </span>
                                )}
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          );
                        })}
                      </div>
                    );
                  })()}
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setModalRiesgo(true)}
                    style={{
                      marginTop: 8,
                      width: "100%",
                      background: C.r50,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.r200}`,
                      borderRadius: 8,
                      padding: "5px 0",
                      fontSize: 10,
                      fontWeight: 600,
                      color: C.r600,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      cursor: "pointer",
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      justifyContent: "center",
                      gap: 5,
                    }}
                    onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                      (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.r100)
                    }
                    onMouseLeave={(e) =>
                      (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.r50)
                    }
                  >
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 11 }}>⚠</span>
                    Ver fincas de alto riesgo
                    <span
                      style={{
                        background: C.r500,
                        color: "#fff",
                        borderRadius: 10,
                        padding: "1px 6px",
                        fontSize: 10,
                        fontWeight: 700,
                      }}
                    >
                      {fincasAltoRiesgo.length}
                    </span>
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Col3 Rows1+2: ATLAS Chat */}
            <AtlasChat insights={insights} />

            {/* Col1 Row2: Mix */}
            {(() => {
              const isHa = modoGlobal === "consultas";
              const ganTotal = isHa
                ? aprobados
                    .filter((d) => d.actividad === "Ganadería")
                    .reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0)
                : aprobados
                    .filter((d) => d.actividad === "Ganadería")
                    .reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0);
              const culTotal = isHa
                ? aprobados
                    .filter((d) => d.actividad === "Cultivos")
                    .reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0)
                : aprobados
                    .filter((d) => d.actividad === "Cultivos")
                    .reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0);
              const grandTotal = ganTotal + culTotal;
              const actRows = [
                {
                  label: "Ganadería",
                  color: C.a500,
                  total: ganTotal,
                  segments: [
                    {
                      label: "Bajo",
                      color: C.g500,
                      v: isHa
                        ? aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Ganadería" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Bajo"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0)
                        : aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Ganadería" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Bajo"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
                    },
                    {
                      label: "Medio",
                      color: C.a400,
                      v: isHa
                        ? aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Ganadería" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Medio"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0)
                        : aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Ganadería" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Medio"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
                    },
                    {
                      label: "Alto",
                      color: C.r500,
                      v: isHa
                        ? aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Ganadería" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Alto"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0)
                        : aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Ganadería" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Alto"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
                    },
                  ],
                },
                {
                  label: "Cultivos",
                  color: C.b500,
                  total: culTotal,
                  segments: [
                    {
                      label: "Bajo",
                      color: C.g500,
                      v: isHa
                        ? aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Cultivos" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Bajo"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0)
                        : aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Cultivos" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Bajo"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
                    },
                    {
                      label: "Medio",
                      color: C.a400,
                      v: isHa
                        ? aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Cultivos" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Medio"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0)
                        : aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Cultivos" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Medio"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
                    },
                    {
                      label: "Alto",
                      color: C.r500,
                      v: isHa
                        ? aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Cultivos" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Alto"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0)
                        : aprobados
                            .filter(
                              (d) =>
                                d.actividad === "Cultivos" &&
                                d.riesgo === "Alto"
                            )
                            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
                    },
                  ],
                },
              ];
              const riesgoData = mixRiesgoData[modoGlobal];
              const riesgoTotal = riesgoData.reduce((s, x) => s + x.value, 0);
              const fmt = (v) =>
                isHa
                  ? v.toLocaleString() + " ha"
                  : "$" + (v / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M";
              return (
                <div
                  style={{
                    background: C.surface,
                    border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                    borderRadius: 12,
                    padding: "14px 16px",
                    display: "flex",
                    flexDirection: "column",
                    gap: 10,
                  }}
                >
                  <p
                    style={{
                      fontSize: 10,
                      fontWeight: 600,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      margin: 0,
                      textTransform: "uppercase",
                      letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                    }}
                  >
                    Mix de Riesgo
                  </p>
                  {/* ── Riesgo stacked bar ── */}
                  <div
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      flexDirection: "column",
                      gap: 6,
                      paddingBottom: 8,
                      borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                    }}
                  >
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        height: 5,
                        borderRadius: 3,
                        overflow: "hidden",
                        gap: 2,
                      }}
                    >
                      {riesgoData.map((d) => (
                        <div
                          key={d.name}
                          style={{
                            flex:
                              riesgoTotal > 0
                                ? (d.value / riesgoTotal) * 100
                                : 0,
                            background: d.fill,
                            transition: "flex 0.3s",
                          }}
                          title={`${d.name}: ${fmt(d.value)} (${
                            riesgoTotal > 0
                              ? Math.round((d.value / riesgoTotal) * 100)
                              : 0
                          }%)`}
                        />
                      ))}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                      {riesgoData.map((d) => {
                        const pct =
                          riesgoTotal > 0
                            ? Math.round((d.value / riesgoTotal) * 100)
                            : 0;
                        return (
                          <div
                            key={d.name}
                            style={{
                              display: "flex",
                              alignItems: "center",
                              gap: 4,
                            }}
                          >
                            <div
                              style={{
                                width: 6,
                                height: 6,
                                borderRadius: 2,
                                background: d.fill,
                                flexShrink: 0,
                              }}
                            />
                            <span
                              style={{
                                fontSize: 11,
                                color: C.txm,
                                fontFamily: F,
                                fontWeight: 600,
                              }}
                            >
                              {d.name}
                            </span>
                            <span
                              style={{
                                fontSize: 11,
                                fontWeight: 700,
                                color: d.fill,
                                fontFamily: F,
                                background: d.fill + "18",
                                borderRadius: 5,
                                padding: "1px 6px",
                              }}
                            >
                              {pct}%
                            </span>
                            <span
                              style={{
                                fontSize: 10,
                                color: C.txl,
                                fontFamily: F,
                              }}
                            >
                              {fmt(d.value)}
                            </span>
                          </div>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        justifyContent: "space-between",
                      }}
                    >
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 10,
                          color: C.txl,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          fontWeight: 500,
                        }}
                      >
                        Total cartera
                      </span>
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 13,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          color: C.txm,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        {fmt(riesgoTotal)}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  {/* ── Actividad stacked bars ── */}
                  {actRows.map((row) => (
                    <div
                      key={row.label}
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        flexDirection: "column",
                        gap: 5,
                      }}
                    >
                      <div
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          height: 5,
                          borderRadius: 3,
                          overflow: "hidden",
                          gap: 2,
                        }}
                      >
                        {row.segments.map((seg) => (
                          <div
                            key={seg.label}
                            style={{
                              flex:
                                row.total > 0 ? (seg.v / row.total) * 100 : 0,
                              background: seg.color,
                              transition: "flex 0.3s",
                            }}
                            title={`${seg.label}: ${fmt(seg.v)} (${
                              row.total > 0
                                ? Math.round((seg.v / row.total) * 100)
                                : 0
                            }%)`}
                          />
                        ))}
                      </div>
                      <div
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "flex-start",
                          justifyContent: "space-between",
                          gap: 8,
                        }}
                      >
                        {/* Activity label — left, top-aligned */}
                        <div
                          style={{
                            display: "flex",
                            alignItems: "center",
                            gap: 4,
                            flexShrink: 0,
                            paddingTop: 1,
                          }}
                        >
                          <div
                            style={{
                              width: 6,
                              height: 6,
                              borderRadius: 2,
                              background: row.color,
                              flexShrink: 0,
                            }}
                          />
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 11,
                              color: C.txm,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                            }}
                          >
                            {row.label}
                          </span>
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 12,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                              color: row.color,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              background: row.color + "18",
                              borderRadius: 6,
                              padding: "1px 6px",
                            }}
                          >
                            {grandTotal > 0
                              ? Math.round((row.total / grandTotal) * 100)
                              : 0}
                            %
                          </span>
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 10,
                              color: C.txl,
                              fontFamily: F,
                            }}
                          >
                            {fmt(row.total)}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        {/* Segments — right, wrapping */}
                        <div
                          style={{
                            display: "flex",
                            gap: 6,
                            flexWrap: "wrap",
                            justifyContent: "flex-end",
                          }}
                        >
                          {row.segments.map((seg) => {
                            const pct =
                              row.total > 0
                                ? Math.round((seg.v / row.total) * 100)
                                : 0;
                            return (
                              <div
                                key={seg.label}
                                style={{
                                  display: "flex",
                                  alignItems: "center",
                                  gap: 3,
                                }}
                              >
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    width: 6,
                                    height: 6,
                                    borderRadius: 2,
                                    background: seg.color,
                                    flexShrink: 0,
                                  }}
                                />
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    color: C.txm,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    fontWeight: 600,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {seg.label}
                                </span>
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                    color: seg.color,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    background: seg.color + "18",
                                    borderRadius: 4,
                                    padding: "1px 5px",
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {pct}%
                                </span>
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    color: C.txl,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {fmt(seg.v)}
                                </span>
                              </div>
                            );
                          })}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              );
            })()}

            {/* Col2 Row2: Mora */}
            <div
              style={{
                background: C.surface,
                border: `1px solid ${C.r200}`,
                borderRadius: 12,
                padding: "14px 16px",
                display: "flex",
                flexDirection: "column",
                gap: 6,
                position: "relative",
                overflow: "hidden",
              }}
            >
              {/* Acento rojo top */}
              <div
                style={{
                  position: "absolute",
                  top: 0,
                  left: 0,
                  right: 0,
                  height: 3,
                  background: C.r400,
                  borderRadius: "12px 12px 0 0",
                }}
              />

              <p
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  color: C.r500,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  margin: 0,
                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                  letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                }}
              >
                Cartera en Mora
              </p>

              {/* Valor principal */}
              <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", gap: 8 }}>
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 26,
                    fontWeight: 700,
                    color: C.r600,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    lineHeight: 1,
                  }}
                >
                  {modoGlobal === "consultas"
                    ? haEnMora.toLocaleString()
                    : `$${(montoEnMoraTotal / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`}
                </span>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: C.r400, fontFamily: F }}>
                  {modoGlobal === "consultas" ? "ha" : ""}
                </span>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: C.r500 }}>↑</span>
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 13,
                    fontWeight: 800,
                    color: C.r600,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  {modoGlobal === "consultas"
                    ? `${pctHaMora}%`
                    : `${pctMontoMora}%`}
                </span>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}>
                  vs mes ant.
                </span>
              </div>

              {/* Mora vs Sana stacked bar */}
              {(() => {
                const vMora =
                  modoGlobal === "consultas" ? haEnMora : montoEnMoraTotal;
                const vSana =
                  modoGlobal === "consultas"
                    ? haAprobadas - haEnMora
                    : montoAprobado - montoEnMoraTotal;
                const total = vMora + vSana;
                const pMora = total > 0 ? Math.round((vMora / total) * 100) : 0;
                const pSana = 100 - pMora;
                return (
                  <div
                    style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 4 }}
                  >
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        height: 5,
                        borderRadius: 3,
                        overflow: "hidden",
                        gap: 2,
                      }}
                    >
                      <div
                        style={{
                          flex: pMora,
                          background: C.r500,
                          minWidth: pMora > 0 ? 2 : 0,
                          transition: "flex 0.3s",
                        }}
                        title={`Mora: ${
                          modoGlobal === "consultas"
                            ? `${vMora.toLocaleString()} ha`
                            : `$${(vMora / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M`
                        } (${pMora}%)`}
                      />
                      <div
                        style={{
                          flex: pSana,
                          background: C.g400,
                          minWidth: pSana > 0 ? 2 : 0,
                          transition: "flex 0.3s",
                        }}
                        title={`Sana: ${
                          modoGlobal === "consultas"
                            ? `${vSana.toLocaleString()} ha`
                            : `$${(vSana / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M`
                        } (${pSana}%)`}
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        justifyContent: "space-between",
                      }}
                    >
                      <div
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "center",
                          gap: 3,
                        }}
                      >
                        <div
                          style={{
                            width: 6,
                            height: 6,
                            borderRadius: 2,
                            background: C.r500,
                            flexShrink: 0,
                          }}
                        />
                        <span
                          style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txm, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          Mora <strong>{pMora}%</strong> ·{" "}
                          {modoGlobal === "consultas"
                            ? `${vMora.toLocaleString()} ha`
                            : `$${(vMora / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M`}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "center",
                          gap: 3,
                        }}
                      >
                        <div
                          style={{
                            width: 6,
                            height: 6,
                            borderRadius: 2,
                            background: C.g400,
                            flexShrink: 0,
                          }}
                        />
                        <span
                          style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txm, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          Sana <strong>{pSana}%</strong> ·{" "}
                          {modoGlobal === "consultas"
                            ? `${vSana.toLocaleString()} ha`
                            : `$${(vSana / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M`}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })()}

              {/* Separador */}
              <div style={{ height: 1, background: C.r100, margin: "2px 0" }} />

              {/* Días mora ponderados */}
              <div
                style={{
                  display: "flex",
                  justifyContent: "space-between",
                  alignItems: "center",
                }}
              >
                <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}>
                  Días mora pond. por saldo
                </span>
                <div
                  style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", gap: 3 }}
                >
                  <span
                    style={{
                      fontSize: 14,
                      fontWeight: 700,
                      color: C.r600,
                      fontFamily: F,
                    }}
                  >
                    {diasMoraPonderados}
                  </span>
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.r400, fontFamily: F }}>
                    días
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Separador */}
              <div style={{ height: 1, background: C.r100, margin: "2px 0" }} />

              {/* Stacked bar tramos mora */}
              {(() => {
                const total =
                  modoGlobal === "consultas" ? haEnMora : montoEnMoraTotal;
                const v30 = modoGlobal === "consultas" ? haMora30 : montoMora30;
                const v60 = modoGlobal === "consultas" ? haMora60 : montoMora60;
                const v90 = modoGlobal === "consultas" ? haMora90 : montoMora90;
                const p30 = total > 0 ? ((v30 / total) * 100).toFixed(0) : 0;
                const p60 = total > 0 ? ((v60 / total) * 100).toFixed(0) : 0;
                const p90 = total > 0 ? ((v90 / total) * 100).toFixed(0) : 0;
                const tramos = [
                  { label: "1–30 días", pct: +p30, val: v30, color: C.mora1 },
                  { label: "31–60 días", pct: +p60, val: v60, color: C.mora2 },
                  { label: ">60 días", pct: +p90, val: v90, color: C.r600 },
                ];
                return (
                  <div
                    style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 5 }}
                  >
                    <p
                      style={{
                        margin: 0,
                        fontSize: 10.5,
                        fontWeight: 600,
                        color: C.txl,
                        fontFamily: F,
                        textTransform: "uppercase",
                        letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                      }}
                    >
                      Tramos de mora
                    </p>
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        height: 5,
                        borderRadius: 3,
                        overflow: "hidden",
                        gap: 2,
                      }}
                    >
                      {tramos.map(
                        (t) =>
                          t.pct > 0 && (
                            <div
                              key={t.label}
                              style={{
                                flex: t.pct,
                                background: t.color,
                                minWidth: 2,
                                transition: "flex 0.3s",
                              }}
                              title={`${t.label}: ${t.pct}%`}
                            />
                          )
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                      {tramos.map((t) => (
                        <div
                          key={t.label}
                          style={{
                            display: "flex",
                            alignItems: "center",
                            gap: 3,
                          }}
                        >
                          <div
                            style={{
                              width: 6,
                              height: 6,
                              borderRadius: 2,
                              background: t.color,
                              flexShrink: 0,
                            }}
                          />
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 10.5,
                              color: C.txm,
                              fontFamily: F,
                            }}
                          >
                            {t.label}
                          </span>
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 10.5,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                              color: t.color,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              background: t.color + "18",
                              borderRadius: 4,
                              padding: "0 4px",
                            }}
                          >
                            {t.pct}%
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })()}

              {/* Botón modal fincas en mora */}
              <button
                onClick={() => setModalMora(true)}
                style={{
                  width: "100%",
                  background: C.r50,
                  border: `1px solid ${C.r200}`,
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  padding: "5px 0",
                  fontSize: 10,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  color: C.r600,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  cursor: "pointer",
                  display: "flex",
                  alignItems: "center",
                  justifyContent: "center",
                  gap: 5,
                }}
                onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                  (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.r100)
                }
                onMouseLeave={(e) => (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.r50)}
              >
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11 }}>⚠</span>
