                Ver fincas en mora
                <span
                  style={{
                    background: C.r500,
                    color: "#fff",
                    borderRadius: 10,
                    padding: "1px 6px",
                    fontSize: 10,
                    fontWeight: 700,
                  }}
                >
                  {enMora.length}
                </span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
      <AlertasBarra
        modoGlobal={modoGlobal}
        ultimasRevisiones={ultimasRevisiones}
        aprobados={aprobados}
        fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion={fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion}
      />
      <div
        style={{
          display: "grid",
          gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr 1fr",
          gap: 12,
        }}
      >
        {/* ── PANEL 2: Huella Hídrica (compact) ── */}
        {cfg.pie_actividad !== false && (
          <Panel title="Huella Hídrica" subtitle="Déficit · Cobertura de riego">
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                justifyContent: "space-between",
                alignItems: "center",
                gap: 12,
              }}
            >
              {/* Legend + Donut */}
              {(() => {
                const sinRiegoConDef = fincasSinRiego.filter((d) =>
                  fincasDeficit.find((f) => f.id === d.id)
                );
                const sinRiegoSinDef = fincasSinRiego.filter(
                  (d) => !fincasDeficit.find((f) => f.id === d.id)
                );
                const total = totalAprobadas || 1;
                const pctConRiego = Math.round(
                  (fincasConRiego.length / total) * 100
                );
                const pctSinRiegoSinDef = Math.round(
                  (sinRiegoSinDef.length / total) * 100
                );
                const pctSinRiegoConDef = Math.round(
                  (sinRiegoConDef.length / total) * 100
                );
                return (
                  <div
                    style={{
                      flexShrink: 0,
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      gap: 10,
                    }}
                  >
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        flexDirection: "column",
                        gap: 6,
                      }}
                    >
                      {[
                        { label: "Con riego", color: C.hOk, pct: pctConRiego },
                        {
                          label: "Sin riego s/déf.",
                          color: C.cEmision,
                          pct: pctSinRiegoSinDef,
                        },
                        {
                          label: "Sin riego c/déf.",
                          color: C.hDeficit,
                          pct: pctSinRiegoConDef,
                        },
                      ].map((l) => (
                        <div
                          key={l.label}
                          style={{
                            display: "flex",
                            alignItems: "center",
                            gap: 5,
                          }}
                        >
                          <div
                            style={{
                              width: 7,
                              height: 7,
                              borderRadius: "50%",
                              background: l.color,
                              flexShrink: 0,
                            }}
                          />
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 9.5,
                              color: C.txl,
                              fontFamily: F,
                            }}
                          >
                            {l.label}
                          </span>
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 9.5,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                              color: l.color,
                              fontFamily: F,
                            }}
                          >
                            {l.pct}%
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                    <DonutChart
                      size={80}
                      data={[
                        {
                          name: "Con riego",
                          value: fincasConRiego.length,
                          fill: C.hOk,
                        },
                        {
                          name: "Sin riego s/déficit",
                          value: sinRiegoSinDef.length,
                          fill: C.cEmision,
                        },
                        {
                          name: "Sin riego c/déficit",
                          value: sinRiegoConDef.length,
                          fill: C.hDeficit,
                        },
                      ]}
                    />
                  </div>
                );
              })()}
              {/* Stats */}
              <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 5 }}>
                {[
                  {
                    label: "Con riego",
                    pct: pctHaConRiego,
                    color: C.hOk,
                    fincas: fincasConRiego.length,
                    ha: haConRiego,
                    monto: montoConRiego,
                  },
                  {
                    label: "Sin riego",
                    pct: 100 - pctHaConRiego,
                    color: C.cEmision,
                    fincas: fincasSinRiego.length,
                    ha: haSinRiego,
                    monto: montoSinRiego,
                  },
                ].map((s) => (
                  <div
                    key={s.label}
                    style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", gap: 6 }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{
                        fontSize: 10,
                        color: C.txl,
                        fontFamily: F,
                        flexShrink: 0,
                      }}
                    >
                      {s.label}
                    </span>
                    <span
                      style={{
                        fontSize: 11,
                        fontWeight: 700,
                        color: s.color,
                        fontFamily: F,
                      }}
                    >
                      {`${
                        modoGlobal === "consultas"
                          ? `${s.ha.toLocaleString()} ha`
                          : `$${(s.monto / 1e6).toFixed(0)}M`
                      } · ${s.pct}% · ${s.fincas} fincas`}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ))}
                <div
                  style={{ height: 1, background: C.border, margin: "2px 0" }}
                />
                {(() => {
                  const sinRiegoConDef = fincasSinRiego.filter((d) =>
                    fincasDeficit.find((f) => f.id === d.id)
                  );
                  const pctDef =
                    fincasSinRiego.length > 0
                      ? Math.round(
                          (sinRiegoConDef.length / fincasSinRiego.length) * 100
                        )
                      : 0;
                  const haDef = sinRiegoConDef.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0);
                  const montoDef = sinRiegoConDef.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + d.monto,
                    0
                  );
                  const aguaDef = sinRiegoConDef.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + (d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0),
                    0
                  );
                  return (
                    <>
                      <div
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "baseline",
                          gap: 6,
                        }}
                      >
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txl,
                            fontFamily: F,
                            flexShrink: 0,
                          }}
                        >
                          Con déficit
                        </span>
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 11,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            color: C.txl,
                            fontFamily: F,
                          }}
                        >
                          {`${
                            modoGlobal === "consultas"
                              ? `${haDef.toLocaleString()} ha`
                              : `$${(montoDef / 1e6).toFixed(0)}M`
                          } · ${pctDef}% s/riego · ${
                            sinRiegoConDef.length
                          } fincas`}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "baseline",
                          gap: 6,
                        }}
                      >
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txl,
                            fontFamily: F,
                            flexShrink: 0,
                          }}
                        >
                          Déficit total
                        </span>
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 11,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            color: C.cCaptura,
                            fontFamily: F,
                          }}
                        >
                          {aguaDef >= 1e6
                            ? `${(aguaDef / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M m³`
                            : `${(aguaDef / 1e3).toFixed(0)}K m³`}{" "}
                          · {sinRiegoConDef.length} fincas
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </>
                  );
                })()}
              </div>
            </div>
            <button
              onClick={() => setModalHidrica(true)}
              style={{
                marginTop: 10,
                width: "100%",
                background: C.cCapturaBg,
                border: `1px solid ${C.cCapturaBorder}`,
                borderRadius: 8,
                padding: "5px 0",
                fontSize: 10,
                fontWeight: 600,
                color: C.cCaptura,
                fontFamily: F,
                cursor: "pointer",
                display: "flex",
                alignItems: "center",
                justifyContent: "center",
                gap: 5,
              }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.cCapturaBorder)
              }
              onMouseLeave={(e) =>
                (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.cCapturaBg)
              }
            >
              Ver fincas con déficit hídrico
              <span
                style={{
                  background: C.cCaptura,
                  color: "#fff",
                  borderRadius: 10,
                  padding: "1px 6px",
                  fontSize: 10,
                  fontWeight: 700,
                }}
              >
                {fincasDeficit.length}
              </span>
            </button>
          </Panel>
        )}

        {/* ── PANEL 3: Huella de Carbono (compact) ── */}
        {cfg.gauge_co2 !== false && (
          <Panel title="Huella de Carbono" subtitle="Emisiones vs Capturas">
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                justifyContent: "space-between",
                alignItems: "center",
                gap: 12,
              }}
            >
              {/* Legend + Donut */}
              <div
                style={{
                  flexShrink: 0,
                  display: "flex",
                  alignItems: "center",
                  gap: 10,
                }}
              >
                <div
                  style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6 }}
                >
                  {(() => {
                    const total =
                      fincasEmisoras.length +
                      fincasNeutras.length +
                      fincasCaptoras.length;
                    return [
                      {
                        label: "Emisión",
                        color: C.cEmision,
                        pct:
                          total > 0
                            ? Math.round((fincasEmisoras.length / total) * 100)
                            : 0,
                      },
                      {
                        label: "Neutro",
                        color: C.borderStrong,
                        pct:
                          total > 0
                            ? Math.round((fincasNeutras.length / total) * 100)
                            : 0,
                      },
                      {
                        label: "Captura",
                        color: C.cCaptura,
                        pct:
                          total > 0
                            ? Math.round((fincasCaptoras.length / total) * 100)
                            : 0,
                      },
                    ].map((l) => (
                      <div
                        key={l.label}
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "center",
                          gap: 5,
                        }}
                      >
                        <div
                          style={{
                            width: 7,
                            height: 7,
                            borderRadius: "50%",
                            background: l.color,
                            flexShrink: 0,
                          }}
                        />
                        <span
                          style={{ fontSize: 9.5, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          {l.label}
                        </span>
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 9.5,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            color: l.color,
                            fontFamily: F,
                          }}
                        >
                          {l.pct}%
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    ));
                  })()}
                </div>
                <DonutChart
                  size={80}
                  data={[
                    {
                      name: "Emisión",
                      value: fincasEmisoras.length,
                      fill: C.cEmision,
                    },
                    {
                      name: "Neutro",
                      value: fincasNeutras.length,
                      fill: C.borderStrong,
                    },
                    {
                      name: "Captura",
                      value: fincasCaptoras.length,
                      fill: C.cCaptura,
                    },
                  ]}
                />
              </div>
              {/* Stats */}
              <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 5 }}>
                {[
                  {
                    label: "Emisión",
                    val: totalEmisiones,
                    fincas: fincasEmisoras,
                    color: C.cEmision,
                  },
                  {
                    label: "Neutro",
                    val: null,
                    fincas: fincasNeutras,
                    color: C.txl,
                  },
                  {
                    label: "Captura",
                    val: totalCapturas,
                    fincas: fincasCaptoras,
                    color: C.cCaptura,
                  },
                ].map((t) => {
                  const total =
                    fincasEmisoras.length +
                    fincasNeutras.length +
                    fincasCaptoras.length;
                  const pct =
                    total > 0 ? Math.round((t.fincas.length / total) * 100) : 0;
                  return (
                    <div
                      key={t.label}
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        alignItems: "baseline",
                        gap: 6,
                      }}
                    >
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 10,
                          color: C.txl,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          flexShrink: 0,
                        }}
                      >
                        {t.label}
                      </span>
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 11,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          color: t.color,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        {t.val != null
                          ? `${t.val.toLocaleString()} t CO₂e`
                          : "—"}{" "}
                        · {pct}% · {t.fincas.length} fincas
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
                <div
                  style={{
                    display: "flex",
                    alignItems: "baseline",
                    gap: 6,
                    borderTop: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                    paddingTop: 5,
                    marginTop: 2,
                  }}
                >
                  <span
                    style={{
                      fontSize: 10,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      flexShrink: 0,
                    }}
                  >
                    Balance
                  </span>
                  <span
                    style={{
                      fontSize: 12,
                      fontWeight: 700,
                      color: balanceNetoCO2 >= 0 ? C.cCaptura : C.cEmision,
                      fontFamily: F,
                    }}
                  >
                    {balanceNetoCO2 >= 0 ? "+" : ""}
                    {balanceNetoCO2.toLocaleString()} t
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <button
              onClick={() => setModalEmisoras(true)}
              style={{
                marginTop: 10,
                width: "100%",
                background: C.cEmisionBg,
                border: `1px solid ${C.cEmisionBorder}`,
                borderRadius: 8,
                padding: "5px 0",
                fontSize: 10,
                fontWeight: 600,
                color: C.cEmision,
                fontFamily: F,
                cursor: "pointer",
                display: "flex",
                alignItems: "center",
                justifyContent: "center",
                gap: 5,
              }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.cEmisionBorder)
              }
              onMouseLeave={(e) =>
                (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.cEmisionBg)
              }
            >
              Ver fincas con alta emisión
              <span
                style={{
                  background: C.cEmision,
                  color: "#fff",
                  borderRadius: 10,
                  padding: "1px 6px",
                  fontSize: 10,
                  fontWeight: 700,
                }}
              >
                {fincasEmisoras.length}
              </span>
            </button>
          </Panel>
        )}

        {/* ── PANEL 4: Huella Forestal (compact) ── */}
        <Panel
          title="Huella Forestal"
          subtitle="Reforestación vs. Deforestación"
        >
          {(() => {
            const fNeutroF = aprobados.filter(
              (d) => d.categoriaDeforestacion === "Neutro"
            );
            return (
              <div
                style={{
                  display: "flex",
                  justifyContent: "space-between",
                  alignItems: "center",
                  gap: 12,
                }}
              >
                {/* Legend + Donut */}
                <div
                  style={{
                    flexShrink: 0,
                    display: "flex",
                    alignItems: "center",
                    gap: 10,
                  }}
                >
                  <div
                    style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6 }}
                  >
                    {[
                      {
                        label: "Reforest.",
                        color: C.fReforest,
                        pct: pctReforest,
                      },
                      {
                        label: "Neutro",
                        color: C.borderStrong,
                        pct:
                          aprobados.length > 0
                            ? Math.round(
                                (fNeutroF.length / aprobados.length) * 100
                              )
                            : 0,
                      },
                      {
                        label: "Deforest.",
                        color: C.fDeforest,
                        pct: pctDeforest,
                      },
                    ].map((l) => (
                      <div
                        key={l.label}
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "center",
                          gap: 5,
                        }}
                      >
                        <div
                          style={{
                            width: 7,
                            height: 7,
                            borderRadius: "50%",
                            background: l.color,
                            flexShrink: 0,
                          }}
                        />
                        <span
                          style={{ fontSize: 9.5, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          {l.label}
                        </span>
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 9.5,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            color: l.color,
                            fontFamily: F,
                          }}
                        >
                          {l.pct}%
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  <DonutChart
                    size={80}
                    data={[
                      {
                        name: "Reforest.",
                        value: fincasReforest.length,
                        fill: C.fReforest,
                      },
                      {
                        name: "Neutro",
                        value: fNeutroF.length,
                        fill: C.borderStrong,
                      },
                      {
                        name: "Deforest.",
                        value: fincasDeforest.length,
                        fill: C.fDeforest,
                      },
                    ]}
                  />
                </div>
                {/* Stats */}
                <div
                  style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 5 }}
                >
                  {[
                    {
                      label: "Reforestación",
                      ha: `+${haNetaReforest.toFixed(1)}`,
                      fincas: fincasReforest.length,
                      pct: pctReforest,
                      monto: fincasReforest.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
                      color: C.fReforest,
                    },
                    {
                      label: "Neutro",
                      ha: "—",
                      fincas: fNeutroF.length,
                      pct:
                        aprobados.length > 0
                          ? Math.round(
                              (fNeutroF.length / aprobados.length) * 100
                            )
                          : 0,
                      monto: fNeutroF.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
                      color: C.txl,
                    },
                    {
                      label: "Deforestación",
                      ha: `−${haNetaDeforest.toFixed(1)}`,
                      fincas: fincasDeforest.length,
                      pct: pctDeforest,
                      monto: fincasDeforest.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
                      color: C.fDeforest,
                    },
                  ].map((t) => (
                    <div
                      key={t.label}
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        alignItems: "baseline",
                        gap: 6,
                      }}
                    >
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 10,
                          color: C.txl,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          flexShrink: 0,
                        }}
                      >
                        {t.label}
                      </span>
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 11,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          color: t.color,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        {t.ha === "—"
                          ? "—"
                          : `${
                              modoGlobal === "consultas"
                                ? `${t.ha} ha`
                                : `$${(t.monto / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M`
                            }`}{" "}
                        · {t.pct}% · {t.fincas} fincas
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                  <div
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "baseline",
                      gap: 6,
                      borderTop: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                      paddingTop: 5,
                      marginTop: 2,
                    }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{
                        fontSize: 10,
                        color: C.txl,
                        fontFamily: F,
                        flexShrink: 0,
                      }}
                    >
                      Balance neto
                    </span>
                    <span
                      style={{
                        fontSize: 12,
                        fontWeight: 700,
                        color: balanceForestal >= 0 ? C.fReforest : C.fDeforest,
                        fontFamily: F,
                      }}
                    >
                      {balanceForestal >= 0 ? "+" : ""}
                      {balanceForestal.toFixed(1)} ha
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })()}
          <button
            onClick={() => setModalDeforest(true)}
            style={{
              marginTop: 10,
              width: "100%",
              background: C.fDeforestBg,
              border: `1px solid ${C.fDeforestBorder}`,
              borderRadius: 8,
              padding: "5px 0",
              fontSize: 10,
              fontWeight: 600,
              color: C.fDeforest,
              fontFamily: F,
              cursor: "pointer",
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              justifyContent: "center",
              gap: 5,
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) =>
              (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.fDeforestBorder)
            }
            onMouseLeave={(e) =>
              (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.fDeforestBg)
            }
          >
            Ver fincas con deforestación
            <span
              style={{
                background: C.r500,
                color: "#fff",
                borderRadius: 10,
                padding: "1px 6px",
                fontSize: 10,
                fontWeight: 700,
              }}
            >
              {fincasDeforest.length}
            </span>
          </button>
        </Panel>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TAB: CARTERA
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const TabCartera = ({
  cfg,
  aprobados = [],
  haAprobadas = 0,
  montoAprobado = 0,
  totalAprobadas = 0,
  modoGlobal = "consultas",
  territoriosData = [],
}: any) => {
  const td: any[] = territoriosData;

  // ── KPI summary ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const totalFincas = td.length || totalAprobadas;
  const totalHa =
    td.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + (d.ha || 0), 0) || haAprobadas;
  const totalMonto =
    td.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + (d.monto || 0), 0) || montoAprobado;
  const ganFincas = td.filter((d: any) => d.actividad === "Ganadería");
  const cultFincas = td.filter((d: any) => d.actividad === "Cultivos");
  const ganHa = ganFincas.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0);
  const cultHa = cultFincas.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0);
  const ganMonto = ganFincas.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.monto, 0);
  const cultMonto = cultFincas.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.monto, 0);

  const isHa = modoGlobal === "consultas";
  const fmt = (v: number) =>
    isHa ? v.toLocaleString() + " ha" : "$" + (v / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M";

  // ── Treemap data — subActividad grouped ──────────────────────────────────
  const treemapData = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<
      string,
      {
        name: string;
        actividad: string;
        ha: number;
        monto: number;
        fincas: number;
      }
    > = {};
    td.forEach((d: any) => {
      const key = d.subActividad || d.actividad || "Otro";
      if (!map[key])
        map[key] = {
          name: key,
          actividad: d.actividad || "",
          ha: 0,
          monto: 0,
          fincas: 0,
        };
      map[key].ha += d.ha || 0;
      map[key].monto += d.monto || 0;
      map[key].fincas += 1;
    });
    const actColors: Record<string, string[]> = {
      Ganadería: [C.g700, C.g600, C.g500, C.g400, C.g300],
      Cultivos: [C.a700, C.a600, C.a500, C.a400, C.a300],
    };
    const byAct: Record<string, any[]> = {};
    Object.values(map).forEach((d) => {
      if (!byAct[d.actividad]) byAct[d.actividad] = [];
      byAct[d.actividad].push(d);
    });
    let result: any[] = [];
    Object.entries(byAct).forEach(([act, items]) => {
      const palette = actColors[act] || [C.b400, C.b500, C.b600];
      items
        .sort((a, b) => b.ha - a.ha)
        .forEach((item, i) => {
          result.push({
            ...item,
            fill: palette[Math.min(i, palette.length - 1)],
          });
        });
    });
    return result;
  }, [td, modoGlobal]);

  // ── Stacked bar — actividad × nivel de riesgo ────────────────────────────
  const stackedData = useMemo(() => {
    // Get all unique subActividades
    const acts = Array.from(
      new Set(td.map((d: any) => d.subActividad || d.actividad))
    ).sort() as string[];
    return acts
      .map((act: string) => {
        const rows = td.filter(
          (d: any) => (d.subActividad || d.actividad) === act
        );
        const bajo = rows.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Bajo");
        const medio = rows.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Medio");
        const alto = rows.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Alto");
        return {
          actividad: act,
          Bajo: isHa
            ? bajo.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0)
            : bajo.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.monto, 0),
          Medio: isHa
            ? medio.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0)
            : medio.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.monto, 0),
          Alto: isHa
            ? alto.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0)
            : alto.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.monto, 0),
          totalFincas: rows.length,
        };
      })
      .filter((d) => d.Bajo + d.Medio + d.Alto > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.Bajo + b.Medio + b.Alto - (a.Bajo + a.Medio + a.Alto));
  }, [td, modoGlobal]);

  // ── Region breakdown ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const regionData = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, any> = {};
    td.forEach((d: any) => {
      if (!map[d.region])
        map[d.region] = { dpto: d.region, Ganadería: 0, Cultivos: 0 };
      const val = isHa ? d.ha : d.monto;
      if (d.actividad === "Ganadería") map[d.region].Ganadería += val;
      else map[d.region].Cultivos += val;
    });
    return Object.values(map).sort(
      (a: any, b: any) => b.Ganadería + b.Cultivos - (a.Ganadería + a.Cultivos)
    );
  }, [td, modoGlobal]);

  // ── Treemap cell renderer ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const TreeCell = (props: any) => {
    const { x, y, width, height, name, fill, fincas } = props;
    // Recharts passes data fields through root or directly on props
    const haVal = (props.ha ?? props.root?.ha ?? 0) as number;
    const montoVal = (props.monto ?? props.root?.monto ?? 0) as number;
    const gap = 2;
    const rx = x + gap,
      ry = y + gap,
      rw = width - gap * 2,
      rh = height - gap * 2;
    if (rw < 4 || rh < 4) return null;
    if (rw < 28 || rh < 18)
      return (
        <rect
          x={rx}
          y={ry}
          width={rw}
          height={rh}
          fill={fill}
          rx={3}
          shapeRendering="crispEdges"
        />
      );
    return (
      <g>
        <rect
          x={rx}
          y={ry}
          width={rw}
          height={rh}
          fill={fill}
          rx={4}
          shapeRendering="crispEdges"
        />
        <text
          x={rx + 7}
          y={ry + 15}
          fontSize={Math.min(11, rw / 7)}
          fontFamily={F}
          fill="#fff"
          fontWeight={700}
        >
          {name}
        </text>
        {rh > 34 && (
          <text
            x={rx + 7}
            y={ry + 27}
            fontSize={9}
            fontFamily={F}
            fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.82)"
          >
            {isHa
              ? haVal.toLocaleString() + " ha"
              : "$" + (montoVal / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M"}
          </text>
        )}
        {rh > 46 && (
          <text
            x={rx + 7}
            y={ry + 39}
            fontSize={8.5}
            fontFamily={F}
            fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.62)"
          >
            {fincas} fincas
          </text>
        )}
      </g>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 14 }}>
      {/* KPI strip */}
      <div
        style={{
          display: "grid",
          gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4,1fr)",
          gap: 10,
        }}
      >
        {[
          {
            label: "Total fincas",
            value: totalFincas.toLocaleString(),
            unit: "fincas",
            color: C.g500,
          },
          {
            label: isHa ? "Hectáreas" : "Monto colocado",
            value: isHa
              ? totalHa.toLocaleString()
              : "$" + (totalMonto / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M",
            unit: isHa ? "ha" : "",
            color: C.accent,
          },
          {
            label: "Ganadería",
            value: isHa
              ? ganHa.toLocaleString()
              : "$" + (ganMonto / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M",
            unit: isHa ? "ha" : "",
            color: C.g600,
          },
          {
            label: "Cultivos",
            value: isHa
              ? cultHa.toLocaleString()
              : "$" + (cultMonto / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M",
            unit: isHa ? "ha" : "",
            color: C.a500,
          },
        ].map((k, i) => (
          <div
            key={i}
            style={{
              background: C.surface,
              border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              borderRadius: 12,
              padding: "12px 14px",
              boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
            }}
          >
            <div
              style={{
                fontSize: 10,
                textTransform: "uppercase",
                letterSpacing: "0.08em",
                color: C.txl,
                fontWeight: 500,
                fontFamily: F,
                marginBottom: 4,
              }}
            >
              {k.label}
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", gap: 5 }}>
              <span
                style={{
                  fontSize: 22,
                  fontWeight: 700,
                  color: k.color,
                  fontFamily: F,
                }}
              >
                {k.value}
              </span>
              {k.unit && (
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 11,
                    color: C.txl,
                    fontWeight: 300,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  {k.unit}
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* ── Row 1: Treemap + Stacked bars side by side — fixed equal height ── */}
      <div
        style={{
          display: "grid",
          gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr",
          gap: 12,
          alignItems: "stretch",
        }}
      >
        {/* Treemap — fills card, white bg to prevent black gaps */}
        <div
          style={{
            background: "#ffffff",
            border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
            borderRadius: 12,
            padding: "14px 16px",
            boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "column",
          }}
        >
          <p
            style={{
              margin: "0 0 4px",
              fontSize: 11,
              fontWeight: 700,
              color: C.tx,
              fontFamily: F,
            }}
          >
            Distribución de Cartera
          </p>
          <p
            style={{
              margin: "0 0 8px",
              fontSize: 10,
              color: C.txl,
              fontFamily: F,
            }}
          >
            {isHa
              ? "Por hectáreas — subactividad"
              : "Por monto colocado — subactividad"}{" "}
            · {totalFincas} fincas
          </p>
          {/* Treemap fills all remaining space */}
          <div style={{ flex: 1, minHeight: 0 }}>
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
              <Treemap
                data={treemapData.map((d) => ({
                  ...d,
                  value: isHa ? d.ha : d.monto,
                }))}
                dataKey="value"
                aspectRatio={4 / 3}
                stroke="none"
                strokeWidth={0}
                content={TreeCell}
              >
                <Tooltip
                  contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                  formatter={(_: any, __: any, p: any) => [
                    fmt(isHa ? p.payload.ha : p.payload.monto),
                    p.payload.name,
                  ]}
                />
              </Treemap>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
          </div>
          {/* Legend */}
          <div
            style={{ display: "flex", gap: 14, marginTop: 8, flexShrink: 0 }}
          >
            {[
              { label: "Ganadería", color: C.g500 },
              { label: "Cultivos", color: C.a500 },
            ].map((l) => (
              <div
                key={l.label}
                style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}
              >
                <div
                  style={{
                    width: 8,
                    height: 8,
                    borderRadius: 2,
                    background: l.color,
                  }}
                />
                <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txm, fontFamily: F }}>
                  {l.label}
                </span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Mix de Actividades — top 5 visible, rest scrollable, bars relative to global total */}
        {(() => {
          const globalTotal = stackedData.reduce(
            (s: number, r: any) => s + r.Bajo + r.Medio + r.Alto,
            0
          );
          const ROW_H = 68; // approx px per row
          const VISIBLE = 5;
          return (
            <div
              style={{
                background: C.surface,
                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                borderRadius: 12,
                padding: "14px 16px",
                boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
                display: "flex",
                flexDirection: "column",
              }}
            >
              <p
                style={{
                  margin: "0 0 2px",
                  fontSize: 11,
                  fontWeight: 700,
                  color: C.tx,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  flexShrink: 0,
                }}
              >
                Mix de Actividades por Nivel de Riesgo
              </p>
              <p
                style={{
                  margin: "0 0 10px",
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  flexShrink: 0,
                }}
              >
                {isHa ? "Hectáreas" : "Monto"} · barras relativas al total · top{" "}
                {Math.min(VISIBLE, stackedData.length)} de {stackedData.length}{" "}
                actividades
              </p>
              <div
                style={{
                  overflowY: "auto",
                  maxHeight: ROW_H * VISIBLE,
                  flex: 1,
                  paddingRight: 2,
                }}
              >
                <div
                  style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10 }}
                >
                  {stackedData.map((row: any) => {
                    const rowTotal = row.Bajo + row.Medio + row.Alto;
                    // bar width is relative to global total (not 100% stacked)
                    const barPct =
                      globalTotal > 0 ? (rowTotal / globalTotal) * 100 : 0;
                    const segs = [
                      { label: "Bajo", color: C.g400, v: row.Bajo },
                      { label: "Medio", color: C.a400, v: row.Medio },
                      { label: "Alto", color: C.r500, v: row.Alto },
                    ].filter((s) => s.v > 0);
                    return (
                      <div
                        key={row.actividad}
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          flexDirection: "column",
                          gap: 4,
                        }}
                      >
                        <div
                          style={{
                            display: "flex",
                            alignItems: "center",
                            justifyContent: "space-between",
                          }}
                        >
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 10.5,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                              color: C.txm,
                              fontFamily: F,
                            }}
                          >
                            {row.actividad}
                          </span>
                          <div
                            style={{
                              display: "flex",
                              alignItems: "center",
                              gap: 6,
                            }}
                          >
                            <span
                              style={{
                                fontSize: 10,
                                fontWeight: 700,
                                color: C.g600,
                                fontFamily: F,
                                background: C.g50,
                                borderRadius: 5,
                                padding: "1px 6px",
                              }}
                            >
                              {globalTotal > 0
                                ? Math.round((rowTotal / globalTotal) * 100)
                                : 0}
                              % del total
                            </span>
                            <span
                              style={{
                                fontSize: 10,
                                color: C.txl,
                                fontFamily: F,
                              }}
                            >
                              {isHa
                                ? rowTotal.toLocaleString() + " ha"
                                : "$" + (rowTotal / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M"}{" "}
                              · {row.totalFincas} fincas
                            </span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        {/* Outer track (full width = 100% of global total) */}
                        <div
                          style={{
                            width: "100%",
                            height: 6,
                            borderRadius: 4,
                            background: C.surfaceAlt,
                            overflow: "hidden",
                          }}
                        >
                          {/* Inner fill = proportional to global total, itself split by risk */}
                          <div
                            style={{
                              width: barPct + "%",
                              height: "100%",
                              display: "flex",
                              overflow: "hidden",
                              borderRadius: 4,
                            }}
                          >
                            {segs.map((seg) => (
                              <div
                                key={seg.label}
                                style={{
                                  flex: rowTotal > 0 ? seg.v / rowTotal : 0,
                                  background: seg.color,
                                  minWidth: 0,
                                  transition: "flex 0.3s",
                                }}
                                title={`${seg.label}: ${
                                  isHa
                                    ? seg.v.toLocaleString() + " ha"
                                    : "$" + (seg.v / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M"
                                }`}
                              />
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <div
                          style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap" }}
                        >
                          {segs.map((seg) => {
                            const pct =
                              rowTotal > 0
                                ? Math.round((seg.v / rowTotal) * 100)
                                : 0;
                            return (
                              <div
                                key={seg.label}
                                style={{
                                  display: "flex",
                                  alignItems: "center",
                                  gap: 3,
                                }}
                              >
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    width: 6,
                                    height: 6,
                                    borderRadius: 2,
                                    background: seg.color,
                                    flexShrink: 0,
                                  }}
                                />
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    color: C.txm,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    fontWeight: 600,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {seg.label}
                                </span>
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                    color: seg.color,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    background: seg.color + "18",
                                    borderRadius: 4,
                                    padding: "1px 5px",
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {pct}%
                                </span>
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    color: C.txl,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {isHa
                                    ? seg.v.toLocaleString() + " ha"
                                    : "$" + (seg.v / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M"}
                                </span>
                              </div>
                            );
                          })}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              </div>
              {stackedData.length > VISIBLE && (
                <p
                  style={{
                    margin: "8px 0 0",
                    fontSize: 9.5,
                    color: C.txl,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    flexShrink: 0,
                    textAlign: "center",
                  }}
                >
                  ↕ Desplaza para ver las {stackedData.length - VISIBLE}{" "}
                  actividades restantes
                </p>
              )}
            </div>
          );
        })()}
      </div>

      {/* ── Row 2: Actividad por Región (horizontal bars) ── */}
      {cfg.stacked_dpto !== false && (
        <div
          style={{
            background: C.surface,
            border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
            borderRadius: 12,
            padding: "14px 16px",
            boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
          }}
        >
          <p
            style={{
              margin: "0 0 4px",
              fontSize: 11,
              fontWeight: 700,
              color: C.tx,
              fontFamily: F,
            }}
          >
            Actividad por Región
          </p>
          <p
            style={{
              margin: "0 0 12px",
              fontSize: 10,
              color: C.txl,
              fontFamily: F,
            }}
          >
            {isHa
              ? "Ganadería y Cultivos — hectáreas por región"
              : "Ganadería y Cultivos — monto por región"}
          </p>
          <ResponsiveContainer
            width="100%"
            height={Math.max(180, regionData.length * 32)}
          >
            <BarChart data={regionData} layout="vertical" barCategoryGap="22%">
              <XAxis
                type="number"
                tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                axisLine={false}
                tickLine={false}
                tickFormatter={(v: number) =>
                  isHa
                    ? v >= 1000
                      ? (v / 1000).toFixed(0) + "k"
                      : String(v)
                    : "$" + (v / 1e6).toFixed(0) + "M"
                }
              />
              <YAxis
                dataKey="dpto"
                type="category"
                tick={{ fill: C.txm, fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                axisLine={false}
                tickLine={false}
                width={88}
              />
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                formatter={(v: number) => [
                  isHa
                    ? v.toLocaleString() + " ha"
                    : "$" + (v / 1e6).toFixed(1) + "M",
                ]}
              />
              <Legend
                wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F, color: C.txm }}
                iconSize={8}
              />
              <Bar
                dataKey="Ganadería"
                stackId="a"
                fill={C.g500}
                name="Ganadería"
              />
              <Bar
                dataKey="Cultivos"
                stackId="a"
                fill={C.a400}
                name="Cultivos"
                radius={[0, 4, 4, 0]}
              />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TAB: CULTIVOS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// SHARED: DonutPanel — consistent legend→donut→stat-rows layout
// Used by all Cartera sub-tabs
// data: [{name, value, pct, fill}]
// statUnit: suffix after value count (default "fincas")
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const DonutPanel = ({
  title,
  subtitle,
  data,
  size = 120,
  statUnit = "fincas",
  cfg_key = true,
}: any) => {
  if (!cfg_key) return null;
  const total = data.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + (d.value || 0), 0);
  return (
    <Panel
      title={title}
      subtitle={subtitle ?? `Total: ${total.toLocaleString()} ${statUnit}`}
      style={{}}
    >
      {/* Legend */}
      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          flexWrap: "wrap",
          gap: "4px 12px",
          marginBottom: 10,
        }}
      >
        {data.map((d: any, i: number) => (
          <div
            key={i}
            style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}
          >
            <div
              style={{
                width: 7,
                height: 7,
                borderRadius: "50%",
                background: d.fill,
                flexShrink: 0,
              }}
            />
            <span style={{ fontSize: 9.5, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}>
              {d.name}
            </span>
            <span
              style={{
                fontSize: 9.5,
                fontWeight: 700,
                color: d.fill,
                fontFamily: F,
              }}
            >
              {d.pct ?? (total > 0 ? Math.round((d.value / total) * 100) : 0)}%
            </span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      {/* Donut */}
      <div
        style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "center", marginBottom: 10 }}
      >
        <DonutChart data={data} size={size} />
      </div>
      {/* Stat rows */}
      <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 5 }}>
        {data.map((d: any, i: number) => (
          <div
            key={i}
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              justifyContent: "space-between",
              background: C.surfaceAlt,
              border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              borderRadius: 8,
              padding: "6px 10px",
            }}
          >
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}>
              <div
                style={{
                  width: 8,
                  height: 8,
                  borderRadius: 2,
                  background: d.fill,
                  flexShrink: 0,
                }}
              />
              <span
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: C.txm,
                  fontWeight: 500,
                  fontFamily: F,
                }}
              >
                {d.name}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", gap: 5 }}>
              <span
                style={{
                  fontSize: 15,
                  fontWeight: 700,
                  color: d.fill,
                  fontFamily: F,
                }}
              >
                {d.pct ?? (total > 0 ? Math.round((d.value / total) * 100) : 0)}
                %
              </span>
              <span
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  fontWeight: 300,
                }}
              >
                {d.value.toLocaleString()} {statUnit}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </Panel>
  );
};

const TabCultivos = ({ cfg, territoriosData: tdRaw = [] }: any) => {
  const td: any[] = tdRaw;
  const cultFincas = td.filter((d: any) => d.actividad === "Cultivos");
  // Build ha-by-subActividad from real data
  const haCultivosReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const cultColors: Record<string, string> = {
      Arroz: C.b500,
      Maíz: C.a400,
      Café: C.a700,
      "Caña de Azúcar": C.a600,
      Banano: C.a500,
      "Palma Aceitera": C.g400,
      Plátano: C.a300,
      Papa: C.g500,
      Piña: C.a500,
      Sandía: C.r400,
      Ñame: C.g300,
    };
    const map: Record<string, number> = {};
    cultFincas.forEach((d: any) => {
      const k = d.subActividad || "Otro";
      map[k] = (map[k] || 0) + d.ha;
    });
    return Object.entries(map)
      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
      .map(([cultivo, ha]) => ({
        cultivo,
        ha,
        fill: cultColors[cultivo] || C.b400,
      }));
  }, [tdRaw]);
  const totalHaCultivosReal = haCultivosReal.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0);
  // Riesgo fitosanitario from real field
  const fitosanidadReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const acts = Array.from(
      new Set(cultFincas.map((d: any) => d.subActividad || "Otro"))
    ) as string[];
    return acts.map((act: string) => {
      const rows = cultFincas.filter(
        (d: any) => (d.subActividad || "Otro") === act
      );
      const total = rows.length || 1;
      return {
        cultivo: act,
        bajo: Math.round(
          (rows.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Bajo").length / total) * 100
        ),
        medio: Math.round(
          (rows.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Medio").length / total) * 100
        ),
        alto: Math.round(
          (rows.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Alto").length / total) * 100
        ),
      };
    });
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Tenencia tierra from real field
  const tenenciaReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, number> = {};
    cultFincas.forEach((d: any) => {
      const k = d.tenenciaTierra || "Otra";
      map[k] = (map[k] || 0) + 1;
    });
    const total = cultFincas.length || 1;
    const palette = [C.g500, C.b500, C.a400, C.txl];
    return Object.entries(map).map(([name, value], i) => ({
      name,
      value,
      pct: Math.round((value / total) * 100),
      fill: palette[i % palette.length],
    }));
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Tipo de semilla — proxy: riesgoManejo as seed quality indicator
  const geneticaReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const cert = cultFincas.filter(
      (d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Bajo"
    ).length;
    const hibrida = cultFincas.filter(
      (d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Medio"
    ).length;
    const criol = cultFincas.filter(
      (d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Alto"
    ).length;
    const total = cultFincas.length || 1;
    return [
      {
        name: "Semilla Certificada",
        value: cert,
        pct: Math.round((cert / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g500,
      },
      {
        name: "Híbrida",
        value: hibrida,
        pct: Math.round((hibrida / total) * 100),
        fill: C.b500,
      },
      {
        name: "Criolla/No cert.",
        value: criol,
        pct: Math.round((criol / total) * 100),
        fill: C.a400,
      },
    ].filter((d) => d.value > 0);
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Rendimiento potencial: riesgo per subActividad
  const rendimientoReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const acts = Array.from(
      new Set(cultFincas.map((d: any) => d.subActividad || "Otro"))
    ) as string[];
    return acts.map((act: string) => {
      const rows = cultFincas.filter(
        (d: any) => (d.subActividad || "Otro") === act
      );
      const total = rows.length || 1;
      return {
        cultivo: act,
        bajo: Math.round(
          (rows.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Alto").length / total) * 100
        ),
        medio: Math.round(
          (rows.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Medio").length / total) * 100
        ),
        alto: Math.round(
          (rows.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Bajo").length / total) * 100
        ),
      };
    });
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Fenología — días de ciclo by subActividad (from logRevisiones or static mapping)
  const fenologiaReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const cycleDays: Record<string, { p10: number; p50: number; p90: number }> =
      {
        Arroz: { p10: 100, p50: 125, p90: 150 },
        Maíz: { p10: 85, p50: 110, p90: 140 },
        Café: { p10: 240, p50: 300, p90: 365 },
        "Caña de Azúcar": { p10: 300, p50: 365, p90: 420 },
        Banano: { p10: 270, p50: 300, p90: 330 },
        "Palma Aceitera": { p10: 365, p50: 400, p90: 450 },
        Papa: { p10: 90, p50: 110, p90: 135 },
        Piña: { p10: 365, p50: 420, p90: 480 },
        Plátano: { p10: 270, p50: 300, p90: 330 },
        Sandía: { p10: 70, p50: 90, p90: 110 },
        Ñame: { p10: 180, p50: 210, p90: 240 },
      };
    const acts = Array.from(
      new Set(cultFincas.map((d: any) => d.subActividad || "Otro"))
    ) as string[];
    return acts.map((act: string) => ({
      cultivo: act,
      ...(cycleDays[act] || { p10: 90, p50: 120, p90: 180 }),
    }));
  }, [tdRaw]);
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 14 }}>
      {cfg.ha_cultivos !== false &&
        (() => {
          // Build stacked data: x=cultivo, y split by riesgo level
          const stackedCultivos = React.useMemo(() => {
            const acts = Array.from(
              new Set(cultFincas.map((d: any) => d.subActividad || "Otro"))
            ) as string[];
            return acts
              .map((act: string) => {
                const rows = cultFincas.filter(
                  (d: any) => (d.subActividad || "Otro") === act
                );
                return {
                  cultivo: act,
                  Bajo: rows
                    .filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Bajo")
                    .reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0),
                  Medio: rows
                    .filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Medio")
                    .reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0),
                  Alto: rows
                    .filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Alto")
                    .reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0),
                };
              })
              .sort(
                (a, b) =>
                  b.Bajo + b.Medio + b.Alto - (a.Bajo + a.Medio + a.Alto)
              );
          }, [cultFincas]);
          return (
            <Panel
              title="Superficie Sembrada por Cultivo"
              subtitle={`Total: ${totalHaCultivosReal.toLocaleString()} ha · ${
                cultFincas.length
              } fincas — apilado por nivel de riesgo`}
              style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column" }}
            >
              <div style={{ height: 260 }}>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
                  <BarChart data={stackedCultivos} barCategoryGap="22%">
                    <XAxis
                      dataKey="cultivo"
                      tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9.5, fontFamily: F }}
                      axisLine={false}
                      tickLine={false}
                    />
                    <YAxis
                      tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                      axisLine={false}
                      tickLine={false}
                      tickFormatter={(v: number) =>
                        v >= 1000 ? `${(v / 1000).toFixed(0)}k` : String(v)
                      }
                    />
                    <Tooltip
                      contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                      formatter={(v: number) => [`${v.toLocaleString()} ha`]}
                    />
                    <Legend
                      wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                      iconSize={8}
                    />
                    <Bar dataKey="Bajo" stackId="a" fill={C.g500} name="Bajo" />
                    <Bar
                      dataKey="Medio"
                      stackId="a"
                      fill={C.a400}
                      name="Medio"
                    />
                    <Bar
                      dataKey="Alto"
                      stackId="a"
                      fill={C.r500}
                      name="Alto"
                      radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]}
                    />
                  </BarChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>
            </Panel>
          );
        })()}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 12 }}>
        {cfg.genetica !== false && (
          <DonutPanel
            title="Tipo de Semilla"
            subtitle={`Total: ${cultFincas.length} fincas`}
            data={geneticaReal}
            size={120}
          />
        )}
        {cfg.rendimiento !== false && (
          <Panel
            title="Rendimiento Potencial de la semilla"
            subtitle="Distribución por nivel"
          >
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={165}>
              <BarChart data={rendimientoReal} barCategoryGap="22%">
                <XAxis
                  dataKey="cultivo"
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                />
                <YAxis
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                  tickFormatter={(v) => `${v}%`}
                />
                <Tooltip contentStyle={TT_STYLE} formatter={(v) => [`${v}%`]} />
                <Legend
                  wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                  iconSize={8}
                />
                <Bar dataKey="bajo" stackId="a" fill={C.r500} name="Bajo" />
                <Bar dataKey="medio" stackId="a" fill={C.a400} name="Medio" />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="alto"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.g500}
                  name="Alto"
                  radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]}
                />
              </BarChart>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
          </Panel>
        )}
      </div>
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 12 }}>
        {cfg.fitosanidad !== false && (
          <Panel
            title="Riesgo de Plagas o Enfermedades"
            subtitle="Plagas y enfermedades — distribución %"
          >
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={185}>
              <BarChart data={fitosanidadReal} barCategoryGap="22%">
                <XAxis
                  dataKey="cultivo"
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9.5, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                />
                <YAxis
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                  tickFormatter={(v) => `${v}%`}
                />
                <Tooltip contentStyle={TT_STYLE} formatter={(v) => [`${v}%`]} />
                <Legend
                  wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                  iconSize={8}
                />
                <Bar dataKey="bajo" stackId="a" fill={C.g500} name="Bajo" />
                <Bar dataKey="medio" stackId="a" fill={C.a400} name="Medio" />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="alto"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.r500}
                  name="Alto"
                  radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]}
                />
              </BarChart>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
          </Panel>
        )}
        {cfg.fenologia !== false && (
          <Panel
            title="Fenología — Duración del Ciclo"
            subtitle="P10 / Mediana (P50) / P90 — en días"
          >
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={185}>
              <BarChart data={fenologiaReal} barCategoryGap="28%">
                <XAxis
                  dataKey="cultivo"
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9.5, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                />
                <YAxis
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                  unit="d"
                />
                <Tooltip
                  contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                  formatter={(v) => [`${v} días`]}
                />
                <Legend
                  wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                  iconSize={8}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="p10"
                  fill={C.g200}
                  name="P10 (precoces)"
                  radius={[2, 2, 0, 0]}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="p50"
                  fill={C.g500}
                  name="Mediana"
                  radius={[2, 2, 0, 0]}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="p90"
                  fill={C.g700}
                  name="P90 (tardías)"
                  radius={[2, 2, 0, 0]}
                />
              </BarChart>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
          </Panel>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TAB: PRODUCTORES  (rewritten to match Huella Ambiental style)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const TabProductores = ({ cfg, territoriosData: tdRaw = [] }: any) => {
  const td: any[] = tdRaw;
  const totalProductoresReal = td.length;

  const tenenciaProdReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, number> = {};
    td.forEach((d: any) => {
      const k = d.tenenciaTierra || "Otra";
      map[k] = (map[k] || 0) + 1;
    });
    const total = td.length || 1;
    const palette = [C.g500, C.b500, C.a400, C.txl];
    return Object.entries(map).map(([name, value], i) => ({
      name,
      value,
      pct: Math.round((value / total) * 100),
      fill: palette[i % palette.length],
    }));
  }, [tdRaw]);

  const mipReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const yes = td.filter(
      (d: any) => d.riesgoPlagasEnfermedades === "No"
    ).length;
    const no = td.filter(
      (d: any) => d.riesgoPlagasEnfermedades === "Si"
    ).length;
    return [
      {
        name: "Sin riesgo plagas",
        value: yes,
        pct: td.length > 0 ? Math.round((yes / td.length) * 100) : 0,
        fill: C.g500,
      },
      {
        name: "Con riesgo plagas",
        value: no,
        pct: td.length > 0 ? Math.round((no / td.length) * 100) : 0,
        fill: C.r500,
      },
    ];
  }, [tdRaw]);

  const tecnificacionReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const total = td.length || 1;
    const altTec = td.filter(
      (d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Bajo" && d.riesgo === "Bajo"
    ).length;
    const tec = td.filter(
      (d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Bajo" && d.riesgo !== "Bajo"
    ).length;
    const semiTec = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Medio").length;
    const noTec = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Alto").length;
    return [
      {
        nivel: "Alt. Tecnif.",
        value: altTec,
        pct: Math.round((altTec / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g600,
      },
      {
        nivel: "Tecnificado",
        value: tec,
        pct: Math.round((tec / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g400,
      },
      {
        nivel: "Semi Tecnif.",
        value: semiTec,
        pct: Math.round((semiTec / total) * 100),
        fill: C.a400,
      },
      {
        nivel: "No Tecnif.",
        value: noTec,
        pct: Math.round((noTec / total) * 100),
        fill: C.r500,
      },
    ].filter((d) => d.value > 0);
  }, [tdRaw]);

  const areaPercentilReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const sorted = [...td].map((d: any) => d.ha).sort((a, b) => a - b);
    const pct = (p: number) =>
      sorted[Math.max(0, Math.floor((p / 100) * sorted.length) - 1)] || 0;
    return [
      { p: "P10", ha: parseFloat(pct(10).toFixed(1)) },
      { p: "P25", ha: parseFloat(pct(25).toFixed(1)) },
      { p: "P50", ha: parseFloat(pct(50).toFixed(1)) },
      { p: "P75", ha: parseFloat(pct(75).toFixed(1)) },
      { p: "P90", ha: parseFloat(pct(90).toFixed(1)) },
    ];
  }, [tdRaw]);

  // ── Shared donut renderer matching Huella Ambiental style ──────────────────
  const DonutChart = ({
    data,
    total,
    size = 130,
  }: {
    data: { name: string; value: number; pct: number; fill: string }[];
    total: number;
    size?: number;
  }) => {
    const cx = size / 2;
    const cy = size / 2;
    const R = size * 0.38;
    const r = size * 0.22;
    let angle = -Math.PI / 2;

    const slices = data.map((d) => {
      const sweep = (d.value / (total || 1)) * 2 * Math.PI;
      const x1 = cx + R * Math.cos(angle);
      const y1 = cy + R * Math.sin(angle);
      angle += sweep;
      const x2 = cx + R * Math.cos(angle);
      const y2 = cy + R * Math.sin(angle);
      const xi1 = cx + r * Math.cos(angle);
      const yi1 = cy + r * Math.sin(angle);
      const xi2 = cx + r * Math.cos(angle - sweep);
      const yi2 = cy + r * Math.sin(angle - sweep);
      const large = sweep > Math.PI ? 1 : 0;
      return {
        ...d,
        path: `M ${x1} ${y1} A ${R} ${R} 0 ${large} 1 ${x2} ${y2} L ${xi1} ${yi1} A ${r} ${r} 0 ${large} 0 ${xi2} ${yi2} Z`,
      };
    });

    return (
      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          flexDirection: "column",
          alignItems: "center",
          gap: 0,
        }}
      >
        <svg width={size} height={size}>
          {slices.map((s, i) => (
            <path key={i} d={s.path} fill={s.fill} />
          ))}
          {/* white center */}
          <circle cx={cx} cy={cy} r={r - 1} fill="#fff" />
        </svg>
        {/* Total label below chart — matches reference */}
        <span
          style={{ fontSize: 11, fontFamily: F, color: C.txl, marginTop: 2 }}
        >
          Total: <strong style={{ color: C.txd }}>{total}</strong>
        </span>
      </div>
    );
  };

  // ── Shared legend row matching reference (dot · label · pct bold right) ────
  const DonutLegendRows = ({
    data,
  }: {
    data: { name: string; value: number; pct: number; fill: string }[];
  }) => (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        gap: 6,
        width: "100%",
      }}
    >
      {data.map((d, i) => (
        <div
          key={i}
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            justifyContent: "space-between",
            fontSize: 11,
            fontFamily: F,
          }}
        >
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}>
            <span
              style={{
                width: 8,
                height: 8,
                borderRadius: "50%",
                backgroundColor: d.fill,
                flexShrink: 0,
                display: "inline-block",
              }}
            />
            <span style={{ color: C.txl }}>{d.name}</span>
          </div>
          <span style={{ fontWeight: 700, color: d.fill }}>
            {d.pct}%{" "}
            <span style={{ fontWeight: 400, color: C.txl }}>
              {d.value} fincas
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );

  // ── Inline legend for donut header (dot + label + bold % — horizontal) ─────
  const DonutInlineLegend = ({
    data,
  }: {
    data: { name: string; pct: number; fill: string }[];
  }) => (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 14, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
      {data.map((d, i) => (
        <span
          key={i}
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            gap: 5,
            fontSize: 11,
            fontFamily: F,
          }}
        >
          <span
            style={{
              width: 8,
              height: 8,
              borderRadius: "50%",
              backgroundColor: d.fill,
              display: "inline-block",
            }}
          />
          <span style={{ color: C.txl }}>{d.name}</span>
          <strong style={{ color: d.fill }}>{d.pct}%</strong>
        </span>
      ))}
    </div>
  );

  // ── Bar legend row (colored squares) ──────────────────────────────────────
  const BarLegendRow = ({
    data,
  }: {
    data: { nivel: string; value: number; fill: string }[];
  }) => (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        gap: 10,
        flexWrap: "wrap",
        justifyContent: "center",
        marginTop: 6,
      }}
    >
      {data.map((d, i) => (
        <span
          key={i}
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            gap: 4,
            fontSize: 10,
            fontFamily: F,
            color: C.txl,
          }}
        >
          <span
            style={{
              width: 8,
              height: 8,
              borderRadius: 2,
              backgroundColor: d.fill,
              display: "inline-block",
            }}
          />
