          <strong style={{ color: d.fill }}>({d.value})</strong>
        </span>
      ))}
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 14 }}>
      {/* ── KPI row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      {cfg.kpi_prod !== false && (
        <div
          style={{
            display: "grid",
            gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4,1fr)",
            gap: 10,
          }}
        >
          <KPICard
            label="Total Productores en Cartera"
            value={totalProductoresReal.toLocaleString()}
            sub="Fincas activas 2024"
            trend={6.1}
            color={C.g500}
          />
          <KPICard
            label="Tecnificados"
            value={tecnificacionReal
              .slice(0, 2)
              .reduce((s, d) => s + d.value, 0)
              .toLocaleString()}
            sub={`${tecnificacionReal
              .slice(0, 2)
              .reduce((s, d) => s + d.pct, 0)}% del total`}
            color={C.g500}
          />
          <KPICard
            label="Aplican Medidas para el Control de Plagas o Enfermedades"
            value={mipReal[0]?.value.toLocaleString()}
            sub={`${mipReal[0]?.pct ?? 0}% sin riesgo`}
            trend={3.2}
            color={C.g500}
          />
          <KPICard
            label="Tierra Propia"
            value={tenenciaProdReal[0]?.value.toLocaleString()}
            sub={`${tenenciaProdReal[0]?.pct ?? 0}% del total`}
            color={C.b600}
            bg={C.b100}
          />
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── Charts row ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div
        style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr 1fr", gap: 12 }}
      >
        {/* Tecnificación — bar chart */}
        {cfg.tecnificacion !== false && (
          <Panel
            title="Nivel de Tecnificación"
            subtitle={`Total: ${totalProductoresReal.toLocaleString()} fincas`}
          >
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={155}>
              <BarChart data={tecnificacionReal} barCategoryGap="24%">
                <XAxis
                  dataKey="nivel"
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 7.5, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                />
                <YAxis
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                />
                <Tooltip
                  contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                  formatter={(v: any, _n: any, p: any) => [
                    `${v} productores (${p.payload.pct}%)`,
                  ]}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="value"
                  radius={[5, 5, 0, 0]}
                  label={{
                    position: "top",
                    fontSize: 10,
                    fill: C.txl,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  {tecnificacionReal.map((d, i) => (
                    <Cell key={i} fill={d.fill} />
                  ))}
                </Bar>
              </BarChart>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
            <BarLegendRow data={tecnificacionReal} />
          </Panel>
        )}

        {/* Tenencia de la Tierra — donut */}
        {cfg.tenencia !== false && (
          <Panel
            title="Tenencia de la Tierra"
            subtitle={`Total: ${totalProductoresReal.toLocaleString()} fincas`}
          >
            {/* Inline legend above chart */}
            <DonutInlineLegend data={tenenciaProdReal} />

            {/* Donut + breakdown rows side-by-side */}
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                alignItems: "center",
                gap: 16,
                marginTop: 10,
              }}
            >
              <DonutChart
                data={tenenciaProdReal}
                total={totalProductoresReal}
                size={130}
              />
              <DonutLegendRows data={tenenciaProdReal} />
            </div>
          </Panel>
        )}

        {/* Manejo Integrado de Plagas — donut */}
        {cfg.mip !== false && (
          <Panel
            title="Manejo Integrado de Plagas"
            subtitle={`Total: ${totalProductoresReal.toLocaleString()} fincas`}
          >
            {/* Inline legend above chart */}
            <DonutInlineLegend data={mipReal} />

            {/* Donut + breakdown rows side-by-side */}
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                alignItems: "center",
                gap: 16,
                marginTop: 10,
              }}
            >
              <DonutChart
                data={mipReal}
                total={totalProductoresReal}
                size={130}
              />
              <DonutLegendRows data={mipReal} />
            </div>
          </Panel>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ── Area percentil bar chart ─────────────────────────────────────── */}
      {cfg.area_perc !== false && (
        <Panel
          title="Área de Finca Promedio"
          subtitle="Distribución P10 – P95 en hectáreas"
        >
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={170}>
            <BarChart data={areaPercentilReal} barCategoryGap="24%">
              <XAxis
                dataKey="p"
                tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                axisLine={false}
                tickLine={false}
              />
              <YAxis
                tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                axisLine={false}
                tickLine={false}
                unit=" ha"
              />
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                formatter={(v: any) => [`${v} ha`]}
              />
              <Bar
                dataKey="ha"
                radius={[5, 5, 0, 0]}
                label={{
                  position: "top",
                  fontSize: 10,
                  fill: C.txl,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  formatter: (v: any) => `${v}`,
                }}
              >
                {areaPercentilReal.map((d, i) => (
                  <Cell
                    key={i}
                    fill={[C.g200, C.g300, C.g400, C.g500, C.g600][i]}
                  />
                ))}
              </Bar>
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Panel>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TAB: GANADERÍA
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const TabGanaderia = ({ cfg, territoriosData: tdRaw = [] }: any) => {
  const td: any[] = tdRaw;
  const ganFincas = td.filter((d: any) => d.actividad === "Ganadería");
  const totalCabezasReal =
    ganFincas.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + (d.cabezasGanado || 0), 0) ||
    ganFincas.length * 960;
  const totalHaPastosReal = ganFincas.reduce(
    (s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha,
    0
  );
  const propositoReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, number> = {};
    ganFincas.forEach((d: any) => {
      const k = d.propositoHato || "Carne";
      map[k] = (map[k] || 0) + 1;
    });
    const total = ganFincas.length || 1;
    const palette: Record<string, string> = {
      Carne: C.g600,
      Leche: C.b500,
      "Doble propósito": C.a400,
    };
    return Object.entries(map).map(([name, value]) => ({
      name,
      value,
      pct: Math.round((value / total) * 100),
      fill: palette[name] || C.txl,
    }));
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Razas — derived from subActividad as proxy (Gan.Carne→Brahman/Angus, Gan.Leche→Holstein, Doble→Pardo)
  const razasReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const carne = ganFincas.filter((d: any) => d.propositoHato === "Carne");
    const leche = ganFincas.filter((d: any) => d.propositoHato === "Leche");
    const doble = ganFincas.filter(
      (d: any) => d.propositoHato === "Doble propósito"
    );
    const scale = totalCabezasReal / (ganFincas.length || 1);
    return [
      {
        raza: "Brahman",
        count: Math.round(carne.length * scale * 0.55),
        fill: C.g600,
      },
      {
        raza: "Holstein",
        count: Math.round(leche.length * scale * 0.85),
        fill: C.g500,
      },
      {
        raza: "Angus",
        count: Math.round(carne.length * scale * 0.3),
        fill: C.g400,
      },
      {
        raza: "Pardo Suizo",
        count: Math.round(doble.length * scale * 0.6),
        fill: C.a500,
      },
      {
        raza: "Criollo",
        count: Math.round(ganFincas.length * scale * 0.12),
        fill: C.a400,
      },
    ]
      .filter((d) => d.count > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Infraestructura — derived from riesgoManejo
  const infraReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const total = ganFincas.length || 1;
    const alta = ganFincas.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Bajo").length;
    const media = ganFincas.filter(
      (d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Medio"
    ).length;
    const baja = ganFincas.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Alto").length;
    return [
      {
        name: "Alta",
        value: alta,
        pct: Math.round((alta / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g600,
      },
      {
        name: "Media",
        value: media,
        pct: Math.round((media / total) * 100),
        fill: C.a400,
      },
      {
        name: "Baja",
        value: baja,
        pct: Math.round((baja / total) * 100),
        fill: C.r500,
      },
    ].filter((d) => d.value > 0);
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Composición del hato — age groups estimated from propósito distribution
  const composicionReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const baseUnit = Math.round(totalCabezasReal / (ganFincas.length || 1) / 3);
    return [
      {
        grupo: "< 1 año",
        machos: Math.round(baseUnit * 0.45),
        hembras: Math.round(baseUnit * 0.55),
      },
      {
        grupo: "1–3 años",
        machos: Math.round(baseUnit * 0.48),
        hembras: Math.round(baseUnit * 0.52),
      },
      {
        grupo: "> 3 años",
        machos: Math.round(baseUnit * 0.36),
        hembras: Math.round(baseUnit * 0.64),
      },
    ];
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Pastos mix — subActividad breakdown by ha
  const pastosMixReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const pastoColors = [C.g500, C.g600, C.a400, C.a500, C.txl];
    const acts = Array.from(
      new Set(ganFincas.map((d: any) => d.subActividad || "Gan. Carne"))
    ) as string[];
    return acts
      .map((act: string, i: number) => ({
        pasto: act,
        ha: ganFincas
          .filter((d: any) => (d.subActividad || "Gan. Carne") === act)
          .reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0),
        fill: pastoColors[i % pastoColors.length],
      }))
      .sort((a, b) => b.ha - a.ha);
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Semilla de pasto — riesgoSuelo as quality proxy
  const semillaPastoReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const total = ganFincas.length || 1;
    const cert = ganFincas.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoSuelo === "Bajo").length;
    const noCert = total - cert;
    return [
      {
        name: "Certificada",
        value: cert,
        pct: Math.round((cert / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g500,
      },
      {
        name: "No certificada",
        value: noCert,
        pct: Math.round((noCert / total) * 100),
        fill: C.a400,
      },
    ];
  }, [tdRaw]);
  // Riego en pastos — aguaASuplirRiegoM3 as proxy
  const riegoPastoReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const total = ganFincas.length || 1;
    const conRiego = ganFincas.filter(
      (d: any) => (d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0) > 0
    ).length;
    const sinRiego = total - conRiego;
    return [
      {
        name: "Con riego",
        value: conRiego,
        pct: Math.round((conRiego / total) * 100),
        fill: C.b500,
      },
      {
        name: "Sin riego",
        value: sinRiego,
        pct: Math.round((sinRiego / total) * 100),
        fill: C.txll,
      },
    ];
  }, [tdRaw]);

  const razasStacked = React.useMemo(() => {
    return ["Carne", "Leche", "Doble propósito"]
      .map((proposito) => {
        const fincas = ganFincas.filter(
          (d: any) => (d.propositoHato || "Carne") === proposito
        );
        const scale = totalCabezasReal / (ganFincas.length || 1);
        const total = fincas.length;
        return {
          proposito,
          Brahman: proposito === "Carne" ? Math.round(total * scale * 0.55) : 0,
          Angus: proposito === "Carne" ? Math.round(total * scale * 0.3) : 0,
          Holstein:
            proposito === "Leche" ? Math.round(total * scale * 0.85) : 0,
          "Pardo Suizo":
            proposito === "Doble propósito"
              ? Math.round(total * scale * 0.6)
              : 0,
          Criollo: Math.round(total * scale * 0.12),
        };
      })
      .filter((r) =>
        Object.values(r)
          .slice(1)
          .some((v: any) => v > 0)
      );
  }, [tdRaw]);

  const pastosStacked = React.useMemo(() => {
    const acts = Array.from(
      new Set(ganFincas.map((d: any) => d.subActividad || "Gan. Carne"))
    ) as string[];
    return acts
      .map((act: string) => {
        const rows = ganFincas.filter(
          (d: any) => (d.subActividad || "Gan. Carne") === act
        );
        return {
          pasto: act.replace("Ganadería ", "").replace("Gan. ", ""),
          Bajo: rows
            .filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Bajo")
            .reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0),
          Medio: rows
            .filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Medio")
            .reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0),
          Alto: rows
            .filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === "Alto")
            .reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0),
        };
      })
      .sort((a, b) => b.Bajo + b.Medio + b.Alto - (a.Bajo + a.Medio + a.Alto));
  }, [tdRaw]);

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 14 }}>
      <div
        style={{
          display: "grid",
          gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4,1fr)",
          gap: 10,
        }}
      >
        <KPICard
          label="Cabezas de Ganado"
          value={totalCabezasReal.toLocaleString()}
          sub="Total hato registrado"
          trend={6.1}
          color={C.g500}
        />
        <KPICard
          label="Ha en Pastos"
          value={totalHaPastosReal.toLocaleString()}
          unit="ha"
          sub="62% área agropecuaria"
          trend={2.8}
          color={C.g500}
        />
        <KPICard
          label="Con Rotación"
          value="67%"
          sub="Cumplen protocolo"
          trend={-4.2}
          color={C.a600}
          bg={C.a100}
        />
        <KPICard
          label="Riego en Pastos"
          value="44%"
          sub={`${((totalHaPastosReal * 0.44) / 1000).toFixed(
            1
          )}k ha irrigadas`}
          trend={3.1}
          color={C.b600}
          bg={C.b100}
        />
      </div>

      <SectionBlock
        title="Hato Ganadero"
        subtitle={`Total: ${totalCabezasReal.toLocaleString()} cabezas`}
      >
        <div
          style={{
            display: "grid",
            gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4,1fr)",
            gap: 10,
            alignItems: "stretch",
          }}
        >
          {cfg.proposito !== false && (
            <DonutPanel
              title="Propósito del Hato"
              subtitle={`${totalCabezasReal.toLocaleString()} cabezas`}
              data={propositoReal}
              size={115}
              statUnit="fincas"
            />
          )}
          {cfg.razas !== false && (
            <Panel
              title="Mix de Razas"
              subtitle="Cabezas por propósito — apilado"
            >
              <div style={{ height: 220 }}>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
                  <BarChart data={razasStacked} barCategoryGap="30%">
                    <XAxis
                      dataKey="proposito"
                      tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                      axisLine={false}
                      tickLine={false}
                    />
                    <YAxis
                      tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 8.5, fontFamily: F }}
                      axisLine={false}
                      tickLine={false}
                      tickFormatter={(v: number) =>
                        v >= 1000 ? `${(v / 1000).toFixed(0)}k` : String(v)
                      }
                    />
                    <Tooltip
                      contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                      formatter={(v: number) => [
                        `${v.toLocaleString()} cabezas`,
                      ]}
                    />
                    <Legend
                      wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 9.5, fontFamily: F }}
                      iconSize={7}
                    />
                    <Bar
                      dataKey="Brahman"
                      stackId="a"
                      fill={C.g600}
                      name="Brahman"
                    />
                    <Bar
                      dataKey="Angus"
                      stackId="a"
                      fill={C.g400}
                      name="Angus"
                    />
                    <Bar
                      dataKey="Holstein"
                      stackId="a"
                      fill={C.b500}
                      name="Holstein"
                    />
                    <Bar
                      dataKey="Pardo Suizo"
                      stackId="a"
                      fill={C.a500}
                      name="Pardo Suizo"
                    />
                    <Bar
                      dataKey="Criollo"
                      stackId="a"
                      fill={C.a400}
                      name="Criollo"
                      radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]}
                    />
                  </BarChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>
            </Panel>
          )}
          {cfg.infra !== false && (
            <DonutPanel
              title="Infraestructura"
              subtitle="Nivel por finca"
              data={infraReal}
              size={115}
            />
          )}
          {cfg.composicion !== false && (
            <Panel title="Composición del Hato" subtitle="Por grupo etario">
              <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
                <BarChart data={composicionReal}>
                  <XAxis
                    dataKey="grupo"
                    tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 8.5, fontFamily: F }}
                    axisLine={false}
                    tickLine={false}
                  />
                  <YAxis
                    tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                    axisLine={false}
                    tickLine={false}
                  />
                  <Tooltip
                    contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                    formatter={(v) => [`${v} cabezas`]}
                  />
                  <Legend
                    wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                    iconSize={8}
                  />
                  <Bar
                    dataKey="machos"
                    stackId="a"
                    fill={C.b500}
                    name={`Machos (${composicionReal.reduce(
                      (s, d) => s + d.machos,
                      0
                    )})`}
                  />
                  <Bar
                    dataKey="hembras"
                    stackId="a"
                    fill={C.g400}
                    name={`Hembras (${composicionReal.reduce(
                      (s, d) => s + d.hembras,
                      0
                    )})`}
                    radius={[3, 3, 0, 0]}
                  />
                </BarChart>
              </ResponsiveContainer>
            </Panel>
          )}
        </div>
      </SectionBlock>

      <SectionBlock
        title="Manejo de Pastos"
        subtitle={`Total: ${totalHaPastosReal.toLocaleString()} ha`}
      >
        <div
          style={{
            display: "grid",
            gridTemplateColumns: "2fr 1fr 1fr",
            gap: 10,
            alignItems: "stretch",
          }}
        >
          {cfg.pastos_mix !== false && (
            <Panel
              title="Mix de Pastos"
              subtitle={`Total: ${totalHaPastosReal.toLocaleString()} ha — apilado por nivel de riesgo`}
              style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column" }}
            >
              <div style={{ flex: 1, minHeight: 200 }}>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
                  <BarChart data={pastosStacked} barCategoryGap="28%">
                    <XAxis
                      dataKey="pasto"
                      tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                      axisLine={false}
                      tickLine={false}
                    />
                    <YAxis
                      tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                      axisLine={false}
                      tickLine={false}
                      tickFormatter={(v: number) =>
                        v >= 1000 ? `${(v / 1000).toFixed(0)}k` : String(v)
                      }
                    />
                    <Tooltip
                      contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                      formatter={(v: number) => [`${v.toLocaleString()} ha`]}
                    />
                    <Legend
                      wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                      iconSize={8}
                    />
                    <Bar dataKey="Bajo" stackId="a" fill={C.g500} name="Bajo" />
                    <Bar
                      dataKey="Medio"
                      stackId="a"
                      fill={C.a400}
                      name="Medio"
                    />
                    <Bar
                      dataKey="Alto"
                      stackId="a"
                      fill={C.r500}
                      name="Alto"
                      radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]}
                    />
                  </BarChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>
            </Panel>
          )}
          {cfg.semilla_pasto !== false && (
            <DonutPanel
              title="Semilla de Pasto"
              subtitle={`${totalHaPastosReal.toLocaleString()} ha`}
              data={semillaPastoReal}
              size={110}
            />
          )}
          {cfg.riego_pasto !== false && (
            <DonutPanel
              title="Riego en Pastos"
              subtitle={`${totalHaPastosReal.toLocaleString()} ha`}
              data={riegoPastoReal}
              size={110}
            />
          )}
        </div>
      </SectionBlock>
    </div>
  );
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TAB: RIESGOS & SUELO
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const TabRiesgos = ({ cfg, territoriosData: tdRaw = [] }: any) => {
  const td: any[] = tdRaw;
  const climaRiskReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const bajo = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoClimatico === "Bajo").length;
    const medio = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoClimatico === "Medio").length;
    const alto = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoClimatico === "Alto").length;
    const total = td.length || 1;
    return [
      {
        name: "Bajo",
        value: bajo,
        pct: Math.round((bajo / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g400,
      },
      {
        name: "Medio",
        value: medio,
        pct: Math.round((medio / total) * 100),
        fill: C.a400,
      },
      {
        name: "Alto",
        value: alto,
        pct: Math.round((alto / total) * 100),
        fill: C.r500,
      },
    ];
  }, [tdRaw]);
  const sueloRiskReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const bajo = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoSuelo === "Bajo").length;
    const medio = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoSuelo === "Medio").length;
    const alto = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoSuelo === "Alto").length;
    const total = td.length || 1;
    return [
      {
        name: "Bajo",
        value: bajo,
        pct: Math.round((bajo / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g400,
      },
      {
        name: "Medio",
        value: medio,
        pct: Math.round((medio / total) * 100),
        fill: C.a400,
      },
      {
        name: "Alto",
        value: alto,
        pct: Math.round((alto / total) * 100),
        fill: C.r500,
      },
    ];
  }, [tdRaw]);
  const manejoRiskReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const bajo = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Bajo").length;
    const medio = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Medio").length;
    const alto = td.filter((d: any) => d.riesgoManejo === "Alto").length;
    const total = td.length || 1;
    return [
      {
        name: "Bajo",
        value: bajo,
        pct: Math.round((bajo / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g400,
      },
      {
        name: "Medio",
        value: medio,
        pct: Math.round((medio / total) * 100),
        fill: C.a400,
      },
      {
        name: "Alto",
        value: alto,
        pct: Math.round((alto / total) * 100),
        fill: C.r500,
      },
    ];
  }, [tdRaw]);
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 14 }}>
      <div
        style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr 1fr", gap: 12 }}
      >
        {cfg.clima_risk !== false && (
          <DonutPanel
            title="Riesgo Climático"
            data={climaRiskReal}
            size={120}
          />
        )}
        {cfg.suelo_risk !== false && (
          <DonutPanel title="Riesgo de Suelo" data={sueloRiskReal} size={120} />
        )}
        {cfg.manejo_risk !== false && (
          <DonutPanel
            title="Riesgo de Manejo"
            data={manejoRiskReal}
            size={120}
          />
        )}
      </div>
      {cfg.alertas !== false && (
        <Panel
          title="Alertas Agroclimáticas por Región"
          subtitle={`Total: ${alertasData
            .reduce((s, d) => s + d.total, 0)
            .toLocaleString()} alertas`}
        >
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={190}>
            <BarChart data={alertasData} layout="vertical" barCategoryGap="18%">
              <XAxis
                type="number"
                tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                axisLine={false}
                tickLine={false}
              />
              <YAxis
                dataKey="region"
                type="category"
                tick={{ fill: C.txm, fontSize: 9.5, fontFamily: F }}
                axisLine={false}
                tickLine={false}
                width={78}
              />
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                formatter={(v) => [`${v} alertas`]}
              />
              <Legend
                wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10.5, fontFamily: F }}
                iconSize={8}
              />
              <Bar
                dataKey="climaticas"
                stackId="a"
                fill={C.b500}
                name={`Climáticas (${alertasData.reduce(
                  (s, d) => s + d.climaticas,
                  0
                )})`}
              />
              <Bar
                dataKey="edafologicas"
                stackId="a"
                fill={C.a400}
                name={`Edafológicas (${alertasData.reduce(
                  (s, d) => s + d.edafologicas,
                  0
                )})`}
              />
              <Bar
                dataKey="plagasEnf"
                stackId="a"
                fill={C.r500}
                name={`Plagas/Enf. (${alertasData.reduce(
                  (s, d) => s + d.plagasEnf,
                  0
                )})`}
                radius={[0, 5, 5, 0]}
              />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Panel>
      )}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 12 }}>
        {cfg.tipo_suelo_reg !== false && (
          <Panel
            title="Tipo de Suelo por Región"
            subtitle={`Total: ${tipoSueloRegion
              .reduce(
                (s, d) => s + d.franco + d.arcilloso + d.arenoso + d.mixto,
                0
              )
              .toLocaleString()} registros`}
          >
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={215}>
              <BarChart
                data={tipoSueloRegion}
                layout="vertical"
                barCategoryGap="18%"
              >
                <XAxis
                  type="number"
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                />
                <YAxis
                  dataKey="region"
                  type="category"
                  tick={{ fill: C.txm, fontSize: 9.5, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                  width={78}
                />
                <Tooltip contentStyle={TT_STYLE} formatter={(v) => [`${v}`]} />
                <Legend
                  wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                  iconSize={8}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="franco"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.a500}
                  name={`Franco (${tipoSueloRegion.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + d.franco,
                    0
                  )})`}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="arcilloso"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.a700}
                  name={`Arcilloso (${tipoSueloRegion.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + d.arcilloso,
                    0
                  )})`}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="arenoso"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.a200}
                  name={`Arenoso (${tipoSueloRegion.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + d.arenoso,
                    0
                  )})`}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="mixto"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.a400}
                  name={`Mixto (${tipoSueloRegion.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + d.mixto,
                    0
                  )})`}
                  radius={[0, 5, 5, 0]}
                />
              </BarChart>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
          </Panel>
        )}
        {cfg.vocacion_reg !== false && (
          <Panel
            title="Vocación de Suelo por Región"
            subtitle={`Total: ${vocacionRegion
              .reduce(
                (s, d) => s + d.agricola + d.pecuaria + d.forestal + d.urbana,
                0
              )
              .toLocaleString()} registros`}
          >
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={215}>
              <BarChart
                data={vocacionRegion}
                layout="vertical"
                barCategoryGap="18%"
              >
                <XAxis
                  type="number"
                  tick={{ fill: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                />
                <YAxis
                  dataKey="region"
                  type="category"
                  tick={{ fill: C.txm, fontSize: 9.5, fontFamily: F }}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickLine={false}
                  width={78}
                />
                <Tooltip contentStyle={TT_STYLE} formatter={(v) => [`${v}`]} />
                <Legend
                  wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                  iconSize={8}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="agricola"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.g500}
                  name={`Agrícola (${vocacionRegion.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + d.agricola,
                    0
                  )})`}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="pecuaria"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.a400}
                  name={`Pecuaria (${vocacionRegion.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + d.pecuaria,
                    0
                  )})`}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="forestal"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.g700}
                  name={`Forestal (${vocacionRegion.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + d.forestal,
                    0
                  )})`}
                />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="urbana"
                  stackId="a"
                  fill={C.txl}
                  name={`Urbana (${vocacionRegion.reduce(
                    (s, d) => s + d.urbana,
                    0
                  )})`}
                  radius={[0, 5, 5, 0]}
                />
              </BarChart>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
          </Panel>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TAB: HUELLA AMBIENTAL
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const TabHuella = ({ cfg, territoriosData: tdRaw = [] }: any) => {
  const td: any[] = tdRaw;
  const totalCO2Emisiones = td.reduce(
    (s: number, d: any) => s + (d.co2Emisiones || 0),
    0
  );
  const totalCO2Capturas = td.reduce(
    (s: number, d: any) => s + (d.co2Capturas || 0),
    0
  );
  const balanceCO2Real = totalCO2Capturas - totalCO2Emisiones;
  const haDeforestReal = td.reduce(
    (s: number, d: any) => s + (d.haPerdidaDeforestacion || 0),
    0
  );
  const haIncendioReal = td.reduce(
    (s: number, d: any) => s + (d.haPerdidaPorIncendio || 0),
    0
  );
  const haGananciaReal = td.reduce(
    (s: number, d: any) => s + (d.haGananciaCobertura || 0),
    0
  );
  const aguaDeficitReal = td.reduce(
    (s: number, d: any) => s + (d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0),
    0
  );
  const totalHaReal = td.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + (d.ha || 0), 0);

  // Derived chart data from real records
  const deforestacionPieReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const totalHaImpacto =
      haDeforestReal + haIncendioReal + haGananciaReal || 1;
    return [
      {
        name: "Deforestación",
        ha: haDeforestReal,
        pct: Math.round((haDeforestReal / totalHaImpacto) * 100),
        fill: C.r600,
      },
      {
        name: "Incendio",
        ha: haIncendioReal,
        pct: Math.round((haIncendioReal / totalHaImpacto) * 100),
        fill: C.a500,
      },
      {
        name: "Reforestación",
        ha: haGananciaReal,
        pct: Math.round((haGananciaReal / totalHaImpacto) * 100),
        fill: C.g500,
      },
    ].filter((d) => d.ha > 0);
  }, [tdRaw]);

  const co2ProductoresReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const alto = td.filter((d: any) => (d.co2BalanceNeto || 0) > 500).length;
    const bajo = td.filter(
      (d: any) => (d.co2BalanceNeto || 0) > 0 && (d.co2BalanceNeto || 0) <= 500
    ).length;
    const neutro = td.filter((d: any) => (d.co2BalanceNeto || 0) === 0).length;
    const bajaCap = td.filter(
      (d: any) => (d.co2BalanceNeto || 0) < 0 && (d.co2BalanceNeto || 0) >= -500
    ).length;
    const altaCap = td.filter(
      (d: any) => (d.co2BalanceNeto || 0) < -500
    ).length;
    const total = td.length || 1;
    return [
      {
        name: "Alto emisor",
        value: Math.round((alto / total) * 100),
        fill: C.r500,
      },
      {
        name: "Bajo emisor",
        value: Math.round((bajo / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g400,
      },
      {
        name: "Neutro",
        value: Math.round((neutro / total) * 100),
        fill: C.txl,
      },
      {
        name: "Baja captura",
        value: Math.round((bajaCap / total) * 100),
        fill: C.a400,
      },
      {
        name: "Alta captura",
        value: Math.round((altaCap / total) * 100),
        fill: C.g600,
      },
    ].filter((d) => d.value > 0);
  }, [tdRaw]);

  const origenAguaReal = React.useMemo(() => {
    const conRiego = td.filter((d: any) => (d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0) > 0);
    const sinRiego = td.filter((d: any) => (d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0) === 0);
    const total = td.length || 1;
    return [
      {
        name: "Con riego activo",
        value: Math.round((conRiego.length / total) * 100),
        fincas: conRiego.length,
        fill: C.b500,
      },
      {
        name: "Sin riego",
        value: Math.round((sinRiego.length / total) * 100),
        fincas: sinRiego.length,
        fill: C.txll,
      },
    ];
  }, [tdRaw]);

  const totalFincasDeficitReal = td.filter(
    (d: any) => (d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0) > 0
  ).length;
  const fincasConRiegoReal = td.filter(
    (d: any) => (d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0) > 0
  ).length;
  const aguaTotalM3Real = td.reduce(
    (s: number, d: any) => s + (d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0),
    0
  );

  const [forestalOpen, setForestalOpen] = React.useState(true);
  const [carbonoOpen, setCarbononOpen] = React.useState(true);
  const [aguaOpen, setAguaOpen] = React.useState(true);

  const CollapseHeader = ({ title, open, onToggle }: any) => (
    <div
      onClick={onToggle}
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "space-between",
        padding: "12px 16px",
        cursor: "pointer",
        userSelect: "none",
        borderBottom: open ? `1px solid ${C.border}` : "none",
      }}
    >
      <span
        style={{
          fontSize: 11,
          fontWeight: 700,
          color: C.tx,
          fontFamily: F,
          textTransform: "uppercase",
          letterSpacing: "0.06em",
        }}
      >
        {title}
      </span>
      <span
        style={{
          fontSize: 18,
          color: C.txl,
          fontFamily: F,
          lineHeight: 1,
          fontWeight: 300,
        }}
      >
        {open ? "−" : "+"}
      </span>
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 14 }}>
      {/* FORESTAL */}
      <div
        style={{
          background: C.surface,
          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
          borderRadius: 12,
          overflow: "hidden",
          boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
        }}
      >
        <CollapseHeader
          title="Cobertura Forestal"
          open={forestalOpen}
          onToggle={() => setForestalOpen((o) => !o)}
        />
        {forestalOpen && (
          <div
            style={{
              padding: "0 16px 16px",
              display: "flex",
              flexDirection: "column",
              gap: 12,
            }}
          >
            {cfg.defo_kpi !== false && (
              <div
                style={{
                  display: "grid",
                  gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3,1fr)",
                  gap: 10,
                  marginBottom: 12,
                }}
              >
                <KPICard
                  label="Ha Analizadas"
                  value="12,400"
                  unit="ha"
                  sub="Cobertura forestal"
                  color={C.g500}
                />
                <KPICard
                  label="Ha Deforestadas"
                  value="2,530"
                  unit="ha"
                  sub="Este período"
                  trend={-8.1}
                  color={C.r600}
                  bg={C.r100}
                />
                <KPICard
                  label="Ha Reforestadas"
                  value="1,850"
                  unit="ha"
                  sub="Programas activos"
                  trend={14.2}
                  color={C.g500}
                />
              </div>
            )}
            <div
              style={{
                display: "grid",
                gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr",
                gap: 12,
              }}
            >
              {cfg.gauge_defo !== false && (
                <Panel
                  title="Balance Reforestación / Deforestación"
                  style={{
                    display: "flex",
                    flexDirection: "column",
                    alignItems: "center",
                  }}
                >
                  <GaugeBalance
                    value={Math.round((1850 / 2530) * 100)}
                    label="Reforestado vs. Deforestado (meta ≥ 100%)"
                  />
                  <div
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      gap: 8,
                      marginTop: 10,
                      flexWrap: "wrap",
                      justifyContent: "center",
                    }}
                  >
                    <span
                      style={{
                        background: C.r100,
                        color: C.r600,
                        borderRadius: 7,
                        padding: "3px 11px",
                        fontSize: 10,
                        fontWeight: 600,
                        fontFamily: F,
                      }}
                    >
                      Deforest. 2,530 ha
                    </span>
                    <span
                      style={{
                        background: C.g50,
                        color: C.g600,
                        borderRadius: 7,
                        padding: "3px 11px",
                        fontSize: 10,
                        fontWeight: 600,
                        fontFamily: F,
                      }}
                    >
                      Reforest. 1,850 ha
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <div
                    style={{
                      marginTop: 8,
                      background: C.r100,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.r200}`,
                      borderRadius: 9,
                      padding: "5px 16px",
                    }}
                  >
                    <p
                      style={{
                        color: C.r600,
                        fontSize: 11,
                        fontWeight: 700,
                        fontFamily: F,
                        margin: 0,
                      }}
                    >
                      Balance neto: −680 ha
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </Panel>
              )}
              {cfg.causa_defo !== false && (
                <Panel
                  title="Distribución por Causa"
                  subtitle="Porcentaje y hectáreas"
                >
                  <div
                    style={{
                      display: "grid",
                      gridTemplateColumns: "1fr auto",
                      gap: 10,
                      alignItems: "center",
                    }}
                  >
                    <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={170}>
                      <PieChart>
                        <Pie
                          data={deforestacionPieReal}
                          cx="50%"
                          cy="50%"
                          outerRadius={70}
                          dataKey="ha"
                          strokeWidth={0}
                          label={({ pct }) => `${pct}%`}
                          labelLine
                          style={{ fontSize: 10 }}
                        >
                          {deforestacionPieReal.map((d, i) => (
                            <Cell key={i} fill={d.fill} />
                          ))}
                        </Pie>
                        <Tooltip
                          contentStyle={TT_STYLE}
                          formatter={(v, n, p) => [
                            `${p.payload.pct}% · ${v.toLocaleString()} ha`,
                          ]}
                        />
                      </PieChart>
                    </ResponsiveContainer>
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        flexDirection: "column",
                        gap: 7,
                        minWidth: 140,
                      }}
                    >
                      {deforestacionPieReal.map((d, i) => (
                        <div
                          key={i}
                          style={{
                            background: C.surface,
                            border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                            borderRadius: 9,
                            padding: "7px 11px",
                          }}
                        >
                          <div
                            style={{
                              display: "flex",
                              alignItems: "center",
                              gap: 5,
                            }}
                          >
                            <div
                              style={{
                                width: 7,
                                height: 7,
                                borderRadius: 2,
                                background: d.fill,
                              }}
                            />
                            <span
                              style={{
                                fontSize: 10,
                                color: C.txm,
                                fontWeight: 600,
                                fontFamily: F,
                              }}
                            >
                              {d.name}
                            </span>
                          </div>
                          <div
                            style={{ display: "flex", gap: 7, paddingLeft: 12 }}
                          >
                            <span
                              style={{
                                fontSize: 13,
                                color: d.fill,
                                fontWeight: 700,
                                fontFamily: F,
                              }}
                            >
                              {d.pct}%
                            </span>
                            <span
                              style={{
                                fontSize: 10,
                                color: C.txl,
                                fontFamily: F,
                                fontWeight: 300,
                              }}
                            >
                              {d.ha.toLocaleString()} ha
                            </span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </Panel>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* CARBONO */}
      <div
        style={{
          background: C.surface,
          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
          borderRadius: 12,
          overflow: "hidden",
          boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
        }}
      >
        <CollapseHeader
          title="Balance de Carbono"
          open={carbonoOpen}
          onToggle={() => setCarbononOpen((o) => !o)}
        />
        {carbonoOpen && (
          <div
            style={{
              padding: "0 16px 16px",
              display: "flex",
              flexDirection: "column",
              gap: 12,
            }}
          >
            {cfg.co2_kpi !== false && (
              <div
                style={{
                  display: "grid",
                  gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4,1fr)",
                  gap: 10,
                  marginBottom: 12,
                }}
              >
                <KPICard
                  label="Emisiones Totales"
                  value={totalCO2Emisiones.toLocaleString()}
                  unit="t CO₂e"
                  sub="Año 2024"
                  trend={-6.2}
                  color={C.r600}
                  bg={C.r100}
                />
                <KPICard
                  label="Capturas Totales"
                  value={totalCO2Capturas.toLocaleString()}
                  unit="t CO₂e"
                  sub="Año 2024"
                  trend={12.4}
                  color={C.g500}
                />
                <KPICard
                  label="Balance Neto"
                  value={balanceCO2Real.toLocaleString()}
                  unit="t CO₂e"
                  sub="Capturas − Emisiones"
                  color={C.r600}
                  bg={C.r100}
                />
                <KPICard
                  label="Productores Neutros"
                  value="18%"
                  sub="214 productores"
                  trend={4.1}
                  color={C.a600}
                  bg={C.a100}
                />
              </div>
            )}
            {cfg.co2_prod !== false && (
              <DonutPanel
                title="Mix de Productores: Tasa Captura / Emisión"
                subtitle={`Total: ${td.length.toLocaleString()} fincas`}
                data={co2ProductoresReal.map((d: any) => ({
                  ...d,
                  value: Math.round((d.value / 100) * td.length),
                  pct: d.value,
                }))}
                size={130}
              />
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* AGUA */}
      <div
        style={{
          background: C.surface,
          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
          borderRadius: 12,
          overflow: "hidden",
          boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
        }}
      >
        <CollapseHeader
          title="Gestión del Agua"
          open={aguaOpen}
          onToggle={() => setAguaOpen((o) => !o)}
        />
        {aguaOpen && (
          <div
            style={{
              padding: "0 16px 16px",
              display: "flex",
              flexDirection: "column",
              gap: 12,
            }}
          >
            {cfg.agua_kpi !== false && (
              <div
                style={{
                  display: "grid",
                  gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3,1fr)",
                  gap: 10,
                  marginBottom: 12,
                }}
              >
                <KPICard
                  label="Consumo Total Anual"
                  value={aguaTotalM3Real.toLocaleString()}
                  unit="m³"
                  sub={`Promedio: ${
                    totalHaReal > 0
                      ? Math.round(aguaTotalM3Real / totalHaReal)
                      : 0
                  } m³/ha`}
                  trend={-4.1}
                  color={C.b600}
                  bg={C.b100}
                />
                <KPICard
                  label="Fincas Con Riego"
                  value={fincasConRiegoReal.toLocaleString()}
                  sub={`${
                    td.length > 0
                      ? Math.round((fincasConRiegoReal / td.length) * 100)
                      : 0
                  }% de ${td.length} fincas`}
                  trend={3.8}
                  color={C.b600}
                  bg={C.b100}
                />
                <KPICard
                  label="Fincas con Déficit Hídrico"
                  value={totalFincasDeficitReal.toLocaleString()}
                  sub={`${
                    td.length > 0
                      ? Math.round((totalFincasDeficitReal / td.length) * 100)
                      : 0
                  }% del total de fincas`}
                  trend={2.1}
                  color={C.r600}
                  bg={C.r100}
                />
              </div>
            )}
            {cfg.origen_agua !== false && (
              <DonutPanel
                title="Origen del Agua de Riego"
                subtitle={`Total: ${origenAguaReal
                  .reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.fincas, 0)
                  .toLocaleString()} fincas`}
                data={origenAguaReal.map((d: any) => ({
                  ...d,
                  value: d.fincas,
                }))}
                size={130}
              />
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const riesgoColor = { Bajo: C.g500, Medio: C.a500, Alto: C.r600 };

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TABS DEFINITION
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TAB: TELEDETECCIÓN
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const FincaModal = ({ finca, onClose, ultimasRevisiones = [] }) => {
  if (!finca) return null;
  const rev = ultimasRevisiones.find((r) => r.id === finca.id);
  const sc =
    rev?.estadoSalud === "Óptimo"
      ? C.g500
      : rev?.estadoSalud === "Bueno"
      ? C.g400
      : rev?.estadoSalud?.includes("Requiere")
      ? C.a500
      : C.r500;
  const riesgoCol =
    finca.riesgo === "Alto"
      ? C.r600
      : finca.riesgo === "Medio"
      ? C.a500
      : C.g500;
  const fields = [
    ["Productor", finca.productor],
    ["Teléfono", finca.telefono || "—"],
    ["Finca", finca.finca],
    ["Región", finca.region],
    ["Actividad", finca.subActividad],
    ["Tenencia", finca.tenenciaTierra || "—"],
    ["Tecnificación", finca.nivelTecnificacion || "—"],
    ["Inicio Ciclo", finca.inicioCiclo || "—"],
    ["Fin Ciclo", finca.finCiclo || "—"],
  ];
  return (
    <div
      onClick={onClose}
      style={{
        position: "fixed",
        inset: 0,
        zIndex: 20000,
        background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.5)",
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "center",
        padding: 24,
      }}
    >
      <div
        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
        style={{
          background: C.surface,
          borderRadius: 16,
          width: 680,
          maxHeight: "88vh",
          overflow: "auto",
          boxShadow: "0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)",
          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
        }}
      >
        {/* Header */}
        <div
          style={{
            padding: "18px 22px 14px",
            borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "flex-start",
            justifyContent: "space-between",
          }}
        >
          <div>
            <p
              style={{
                fontSize: 10,
                fontWeight: 600,
                color: C.txl,
                fontFamily: F,
                margin: "0 0 4px",
                textTransform: "uppercase",
                letterSpacing: "0.06em",
              }}
            >
              Ficha de Finca · Monitoreo Activo
            </p>
            <p
              style={{
                fontSize: 18,
                fontWeight: 800,
                color: C.tx,
                fontFamily: F,
                margin: 0,
              }}
            >
              {finca.finca}
            </p>
            <p
              style={{
                fontSize: 11,
                color: C.txl,
                fontFamily: F,
                margin: "3px 0 0",
              }}
            >
              {finca.productor} · {finca.region}
            </p>
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={onClose}
            style={{
              background: "none",
              border: "none",
              fontSize: 18,
              color: C.txl,
              cursor: "pointer",
              padding: "0 4px",
              lineHeight: 1,
            }}
          >
            ✕
          </button>
        </div>
        <div
          style={{
            padding: "16px 22px",
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "column",
            gap: 14,
          }}
        >
          {/* KPIs finca */}
          <div
            style={{
              display: "grid",
              gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3,1fr)",
              gap: 8,
            }}
          >
            <div
              style={{
                background: C.surfaceAlt,
                borderRadius: 10,
                padding: "10px 14px",
              }}
            >
              <p
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  margin: "0 0 3px",
                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                }}
              >
                Hectáreas
              </p>
              <p
                style={{
                  fontSize: 18,
                  fontWeight: 800,
                  color: C.tx,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  margin: 0,
                }}
              >
                {finca.ha.toLocaleString()}{" "}
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 400 }}>ha</span>
              </p>
            </div>
            <div
              style={{
                background: C.surfaceAlt,
                borderRadius: 10,
                padding: "10px 14px",
              }}
            >
              <p
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  margin: "0 0 3px",
                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                }}
              >
                Monto
              </p>
              <p
                style={{
                  fontSize: 18,
                  fontWeight: 800,
                  color: C.g600,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  margin: 0,
                }}
              >
                ${(finca.monto / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M
              </p>
            </div>
            <div
              style={{
                background:
                  finca.riesgo === "Alto"
                    ? C.r100
                    : finca.riesgo === "Medio"
                    ? C.a100
                    : C.g50,
                borderRadius: 10,
                padding: "10px 14px",
              }}
            >
              <p
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  margin: "0 0 3px",
                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                }}
              >
                Riesgo
              </p>
              <p
                style={{
                  fontSize: 18,
                  fontWeight: 800,
                  color: riesgoCol,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  margin: 0,
                }}
              >
                {finca.riesgo}
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          {/* Campos de la finca */}
          <div
            style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 6 }}
          >
            {fields.map(([label, val]) => (
              <div
                key={label}
                style={{
                  display: "flex",
                  justifyContent: "space-between",
                  padding: "6px 10px",
                  background: C.surfaceAlt,
                  borderRadius: 8,
                }}
              >
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 10,
                    color: C.txl,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    textTransform: "uppercase",
                    letterSpacing: "0.04em",
                  }}
                >
                  {label}
                </span>
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 10,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    color: C.tx,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  {val}
                </span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          {/* Última revisión teledetección */}
          {rev && (
            <div
              style={{
                background: C.g50,
                border: `1px solid ${C.g200}`,
                borderRadius: 12,
                padding: "12px 16px",
              }}
            >
              <p
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  fontWeight: 700,
                  color: C.g700,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  margin: "0 0 10px",
                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                  letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                }}
              >
                📡 Última Revisión Teledetección
              </p>
              <div
                style={{ display: "flex", gap: 14, alignItems: "flex-start" }}
              >
                {/* NDVI image */}
                <div
                  style={{
                    flexShrink: 0,
                    display: "flex",
                    flexDirection: "column",
                    gap: 4,
                  }}
                >
                  <div
                    style={{
                      position: "relative",
                      width: 150,
                      height: 115,
                      borderRadius: 8,
                      overflow: "hidden",
                      background: C.b50,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.g200}`,
                    }}
                  >
                    <img
                      src={NDVI_PLACEHOLDER}
                      alt="NDVI"
                      style={{
                        width: "100%",
                        height: "100%",
                        objectFit: "cover",
                        objectPosition: "center",
                      }}
                    />
                    <div
                      style={{
                        position: "absolute",
                        bottom: 0,
                        left: 0,
                        right: 0,
                        background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.5)",
                        padding: "3px 6px",
                        display: "flex",
                        justifyContent: "space-between",
                        alignItems: "center",
                      }}
                    >
                      <span
                        style={{
                          fontSize: 8,
                          color: "#fff",
                          fontFamily: F,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                        }}
                      >
                        NDVI
                      </span>
                      <span
                        style={{ fontSize: 8, color: "#aef", fontFamily: F }}
                      >
                        {rev.fechaActualizacion || "—"}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      gap: 3,
                      alignItems: "center",
                      justifyContent: "center",
                    }}
                  >
                    {[
                      ["#c8e6c9", "0"],
                      ["#81c784", "0.3"],
                      ["#2e7d32", "0.6"],
                      ["#1b5e20", "0.9+"],
                    ].map(([col, lbl]) => (
                      <div
                        key={lbl}
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "center",
                          gap: 2,
                        }}
                      >
                        <div
                          style={{
                            width: 8,
                            height: 8,
                            background: col,
                            borderRadius: 1,
                          }}
                        />
                        <span
                          style={{ fontSize: 7.5, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          {lbl}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
                {/* Data fields */}
                <div
                  style={{
                    flex: 1,
                    display: "flex",
                    flexDirection: "column",
                    gap: 6,
                  }}
                >
                  <div
                    style={{
                      display: "grid",
                      gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr",
                      gap: 6,
                    }}
                  >
                    {[
                      ["Fecha", rev.fechaActualizacion || "—"],
                      ["Fase Fenológica", rev.faseFenologica || "—"],
                      ["Rendimiento Est.", rev.rendimientoEstimado || "—"],
                      [
                        "Área Detectada",
                        rev.areaSiembraDetectadaHa
                          ? `${rev.areaSiembraDetectadaHa} ha`
                          : "—",
                      ],
                    ].map(([l, v]) => (
                      <div
                        key={l}
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          justifyContent: "space-between",
                          padding: "5px 10px",
                          background: C.surface,
                          borderRadius: 7,
                        }}
                      >
                        <span
                          style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          {l}
                        </span>
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 10,
                            fontWeight: 600,
                            color: C.tx,
                            fontFamily: F,
                          }}
                        >
                          {v}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  <div
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      gap: 8,
                      alignItems: "center",
                      flexWrap: "wrap",
                    }}
                  >
                    {rev.estadoSalud && (
                      <span
                        style={{
                          background: sc + "22",
                          color: sc,
                          borderRadius: 7,
                          padding: "3px 10px",
                          fontSize: 10,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        {rev.estadoSalud}
                      </span>
                    )}
                    {rev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa && (
                      <span
                        style={{
                          background:
                            rev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa >= 80
                              ? C.g50
                              : rev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa >= 60
                              ? C.a100
                              : C.r100,
                          color:
                            rev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa >= 80
                              ? C.g600
                              : rev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa >= 60
                              ? C.a600
                              : C.r600,
                          borderRadius: 7,
                          padding: "3px 10px",
                          fontSize: 10,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        🌾 {rev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa}% cosecha
                      </span>
                    )}
                    {rev.indices?.ndvi && (
                      <span
                        style={{
                          background: C.surfaceAlt,
                          color: C.txm,
                          borderRadius: 7,
                          padding: "3px 10px",
                          fontSize: 10,
                          fontWeight: 600,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        NDVI {rev.indices.ndvi.toFixed(3)}
                      </span>
                    )}
                    {rev.alertaTeledeteccion && (
                      <span
                        style={{
                          background: C.r100,
                          color: C.r600,
                          borderRadius: 7,
                          padding: "3px 10px",
                          fontSize: 10,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        ⚠ {rev.alertaTeledeteccion}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          {/* Historial */}
          {finca.logRevisiones?.length > 1 && (
            <div>
              <p
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  margin: "0 0 8px",
                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                }}
              >
                Historial de revisiones
              </p>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 7, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                {finca.logRevisiones.map((r, i) => {
                  const isc =
                    r.estadoSalud === "Óptimo"
                      ? C.g500
                      : r.estadoSalud === "Bueno"
                      ? C.g400
                      : r.estadoSalud?.includes("Requiere")
                      ? C.a500
                      : C.r500;
                  return (
                    <div
                      key={i}
                      style={{
                        background: C.surfaceAlt,
                        borderRadius: 8,
                        padding: "7px 11px",
                        minWidth: 150,
                        display: "flex",
                        flexDirection: "column",
                        gap: 4,
                      }}
                    >
                      <div
                        style={{
                          position: "relative",
                          width: "100%",
                          height: 80,
                          borderRadius: 6,
                          overflow: "hidden",
                          background: C.b50,
                          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                          marginBottom: 2,
                        }}
                      >
                        <img
                          src={NDVI_PLACEHOLDER}
                          alt="NDVI"
                          style={{
                            width: "100%",
                            height: "100%",
                            objectFit: "cover",
                            objectPosition: "center",
                          }}
                        />
                        <div
                          style={{
                            position: "absolute",
                            bottom: 0,
                            left: 0,
                            right: 0,
                            background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.5)",
                            padding: "2px 5px",
                            display: "flex",
                            justifyContent: "space-between",
                          }}
                        >
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 7.5,
                              color: "#fff",
                              fontFamily: F,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                            }}
                          >
                            NDVI
                          </span>
                          <span
                            style={{
                              fontSize: 7.5,
                              color: "#aef",
                              fontFamily: F,
                            }}
                          >
                            {r.fechaActualizacion}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <p
                        style={{
                          margin: 0,
                          fontSize: 10.5,
                          color: C.txl,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        {r.fechaActualizacion}
                      </p>
                      <p
                        style={{
                          margin: "2px 0 0",
                          fontSize: 10,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          color: C.tx,
                        }}
                      >
                        {r.faseFenologica}
                      </p>
                      {r.estadoSalud && (
                        <span
                          style={{
                            background: isc + "18",
                            color: isc,
                            borderRadius: 4,
                            padding: "1px 6px",
                            fontSize: 10.5,
                            fontWeight: 600,
                            fontFamily: F,
                            display: "inline-block",
                            marginTop: 2,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.estadoSalud}
                        </span>
                      )}
                      <p
                        style={{
                          margin: "3px 0 0",
                          fontSize: 10,
                          color: C.txm,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        NDVI {r.indices?.ndvi} · {r.probabilidadCosechaExitosa}%
                        éxito
                      </p>
                      {r.alertaTeledeteccion && (
                        <p
                          style={{
                            margin: "2px 0 0",
                            fontSize: 10.5,
                            color: C.r600,
                            fontFamily: F,
                          }}
                        >
                          ⚠ {r.alertaTeledeteccion}
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const TabTeledeteccion = ({
  cfg,
  fincasConMonitoreo,
  fincasConLogRevisiones,
  ultimasRevisiones,
  todasRevisiones,
  aprobados,
  ndviPromedio,
  fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion,
  saludRealData,
  probCosechaPromedio,
  ndviFaseData,
}) => {
  const [modalFinca, setModalFinca] = React.useState(null);
  const [expandedMonRow, setExpandedMonRow] = React.useState(null);
  const [teleSearch, setTeleSearch] = React.useState("");
  const [teleDrillFinca, setTeleDrillFinca] = React.useState<any>(null);
  const [teleFilterRiesgo, setTeleFilterRiesgo] = React.useState("Todos");
  const [teleFilterActividad, setTeleFilterActividad] = React.useState("Todas");
  const [teleFilterRegion, setTeleFilterRegion] = React.useState("Todas");
  const [teleSort, setTeleSort] = React.useState("riesgo_desc");
  const teleRegiones = React.useMemo(
    () => [
      "Todas",
      ...Array.from(
        new Set(ultimasRevisiones.map((r: any) => r.region))
      ).sort(),
    ],
    [ultimasRevisiones]
  );
  const teleFiltered = React.useMemo(() => {
    let r = ultimasRevisiones as any[];
    if (teleSearch.trim()) {
      const q = teleSearch.trim().toLowerCase();
      r = r.filter(
        (d: any) =>
          d.finca?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          d.productor?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          d.region?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          d.subActividad?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          d.actividad?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
      );
    }
    if (teleFilterRiesgo !== "Todos")
      r = r.filter((d: any) => d.riesgo === teleFilterRiesgo);
    if (teleFilterActividad !== "Todas")
      r = r.filter((d: any) => d.actividad === teleFilterActividad);
    if (teleFilterRegion !== "Todas")
      r = r.filter((d: any) => d.region === teleFilterRegion);
    const rO: Record<string, number> = { Alto: 0, Medio: 1, Bajo: 2 };
    if (teleSort === "riesgo_desc")
      r = [...r].sort(
        (a: any, b: any) => (rO[a.riesgo] ?? 3) - (rO[b.riesgo] ?? 3)
      );
    else if (teleSort === "ndvi_asc")
      r = [...r].sort(
        (a: any, b: any) => (a.indices?.ndvi ?? 1) - (b.indices?.ndvi ?? 1)
      );
    else if (teleSort === "ndvi_desc")
      r = [...r].sort(
        (a: any, b: any) => (b.indices?.ndvi ?? 0) - (a.indices?.ndvi ?? 0)
      );
    else if (teleSort === "ha_desc")
      r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => b.ha - a.ha);
    else if (teleSort === "cosecha_desc")
      r = [...r].sort(
        (a: any, b: any) =>
          (b.probabilidadCosechaExitosa ?? 0) -
          (a.probabilidadCosechaExitosa ?? 0)
      );
    else if (teleSort === "finca_asc")
      r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => a.finca?.localeCompare(b.finca));
    return r;
  }, [
    ultimasRevisiones,
    teleSearch,
    teleFilterRiesgo,
    teleFilterActividad,
    teleFilterRegion,
    teleSort,
  ]);
  const setModalFincaRef = React.useRef(null);
  const teleMapRef = React.useRef(null);
  const teleMapInstanceRef = React.useRef(null);
  const teleMarkersRef = React.useRef([]);
  setModalFincaRef.current = setModalFinca;

  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (!teleMapRef.current) return;
    const map = new maplibregl.Map({
      container: teleMapRef.current,
      style: "https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json",
      center: [-76.0, -9.5],
      zoom: 5.5,
    });
    teleMapInstanceRef.current = map;
    map.on("load", () => {
      teleMarkersRef.current.forEach((m) => m.remove());
      teleMarkersRef.current = [];
      fincasConMonitoreo.forEach((d) => {
        const el = document.createElement("div");
        const rev = ultimasRevisiones.find((r) => r.id === d.id);
        const saludStr = rev?.estadoSalud;
        const col =
          saludStr === "Óptimo"
            ? C.g400
            : saludStr === "Bueno"
            ? C.g300
            : saludStr?.includes("Requiere")
            ? C.a400
            : C.r500;
        const tieneAlerta = !!rev?.alertaTeledeteccion;
        const size = Math.max(20, Math.min(40, d.ha / 40));
        // Outer wrapper: zero-size anchor, never transform this
        el.style.cssText = `width:0;height:0;position:relative;`;
        const dot = document.createElement("div");
        dot.style.cssText = `
