          width:${size}px;height:${size}px;border-radius:50%;
          background:${col};
          border:${tieneAlerta ? "3px solid #ef4444" : "2px solid white"};
          box-shadow:${
            tieneAlerta
              ? "0 0 10px rgba(239,68,68,0.6)"
              : "0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)"
          };
          cursor:pointer;opacity:0.92;transition:transform 0.15s;
          position:absolute;top:${-size / 2}px;left:${-size / 2}px;
        `;
        el.appendChild(dot);

        // Tooltip
        const saludTipColor =
          saludStr === "Óptimo"
            ? "#4ade80"
            : saludStr === "Bueno"
            ? "#86efac"
            : saludStr?.includes("Requiere")
            ? "#fcd34d"
            : "#f87171";
        const tip = document.createElement("div");
        tip.style.cssText = `
          position:absolute;
          bottom:${size / 2 + 10}px;
          left:50%;
          transform:translateX(-50%);
          background:rgba(15,31,20,0.93);
          color:#fff;
          border-radius:9px;
          padding:9px 12px;
          min-width:200px;
          font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;
          font-size:11px;
          pointer-events:none;
          white-space:nowrap;
          box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
          display:none;
          z-index:9999;
        `;
        tip.innerHTML = `
          <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:2px">${
            d.finca
          }</div>
          <div style="color:#b0c8bf;font-size:10px;margin-bottom:7px;padding-bottom:6px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12)">${
            d.productor
          }</div>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px">
              <span style="color:#b0c8bf;font-size:10px">Actividad</span>
              <span style="font-weight:600">${
                d.subActividad || d.actividad || "—"
              }</span>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px">
              <span style="color:#b0c8bf;font-size:10px">Monto</span>
              <span style="font-weight:600;color:#4ade80">$${(
                d.monto / 1e6
              ).toFixed(1)}M</span>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px">
              <span style="color:#b0c8bf;font-size:10px">Estado salud</span>
              <span style="font-weight:600;color:${saludTipColor}">${
          saludStr || "Sin datos"
        }</span>
            </div>
            ${
              tieneAlerta
                ? `<div style="margin-top:3px;padding-top:4px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);color:#fcd34d;font-size:10px">⚠ ${rev.alertaTeledeteccion}</div>`
                : ""
            }
          </div>
        `;
        el.appendChild(tip);

        el.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
          dot.style.transform = "scale(1.25)";
          tip.style.display = "block";
        });
        el.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => {
          dot.style.transform = "scale(1)";
          tip.style.display = "none";
        });
        el.addEventListener("click", () => {
          setModalFincaRef.current && setModalFincaRef.current(d);
        });
        new maplibregl.Marker({ element: el, anchor: "center" })
          .setLngLat([d.lng, d.lat])
          .addTo(map);
        teleMarkersRef.current.push({ remove: () => el.remove() });
      });
    });
    return () => map.remove();
  }, []);

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10 }}>
      {modalFinca && (
        <FincaModal
          finca={modalFinca}
          onClose={() => setModalFinca(null)}
          ultimasRevisiones={ultimasRevisiones}
        />
      )}
      {teleDrillFinca && (
        <FincaModal
          finca={teleDrillFinca}
          onClose={() => setTeleDrillFinca(null)}
          ultimasRevisiones={ultimasRevisiones}
        />
      )}
      {cfg.tele_kpi !== false && (
        <div
          style={{
            display: "grid",
            gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4,1fr)",
            gap: 10,
          }}
        >
          <KPICard
            label="Fincas con Monitoreo Activo"
            value={fincasConMonitoreo.length}
            sub={`${Math.round(
              (fincasConMonitoreo.length / aprobados.length) * 100
            )}% de la cartera`}
            color={C.g500}
          />
          <div
            style={{
              background: C.surface,
              border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              borderRadius: 12,
              padding: "14px 16px",
              display: "flex",
              flexDirection: "column",
              gap: 4,
              position: "relative",
              overflow: "hidden",
            }}
          >
            <div
              style={{
                position: "absolute",
                top: 0,
                left: 0,
                right: 0,
                height: 3,
                background: C.g500,
                borderRadius: "12px 12px 0 0",
              }}
            />
            <p
              style={{
                fontSize: 10,
                fontWeight: 600,
                color: C.txl,
                fontFamily: F,
                margin: 0,
                textTransform: "uppercase",
                letterSpacing: "0.06em",
              }}
            >
              Estado de Salud
            </p>
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                flexDirection: "column",
                gap: 3,
                marginTop: 4,
              }}
            >
              {saludRealData.map((s, i) => {
                const total = saludRealData.reduce((a, x) => a + x.value, 0);
                return (
                  <div
                    key={i}
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      justifyContent: "space-between",
                    }}
                  >
                    <div
                      style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 4 }}
                    >
                      <div
                        style={{
                          width: 7,
                          height: 7,
                          borderRadius: 2,
                          background: s.fill,
                        }}
                      />
                      <span
                        style={{ fontSize: 10.5, color: C.txm, fontFamily: F }}
                      >
                        {s.name}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    <span
                      style={{
                        fontSize: 10,
                        fontWeight: 700,
                        color: s.fill,
                        fontFamily: F,
                        background: s.fill + "18",
                        borderRadius: 5,
                        padding: "1px 5px",
                      }}
                    >
                      {Math.round((s.value / total) * 100)}%
                    </span>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
          <KPICard
            label="Prob. Cosecha Exitosa"
            value={`${probCosechaPromedio}%`}
            sub="Promedio cartera monitoreada"
            color={
              probCosechaPromedio >= 80
                ? C.g500
                : probCosechaPromedio >= 60
                ? C.a500
                : C.r600
            }
            bg={
              probCosechaPromedio >= 80
                ? C.g50
                : probCosechaPromedio >= 60
                ? C.a100
                : C.r100
            }
          />
          <KPICard
            label="Alertas Teledetección Activas"
            value={fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.length}
            sub={`${fincasConLogRevisiones.length} fincas revisadas`}
            color={fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.length > 0 ? C.r600 : C.g500}
            bg={fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.length > 0 ? C.r100 : C.g50}
          />
        </div>
      )}
      {/* Mapa + Alertas — same height, alerts top-5 + scroll */}
      {(() => {
        const ALERT_ROW_H = 72;
        const VISIBLE_ALERTS = 5;
        const mapH = ALERT_ROW_H * VISIBLE_ALERTS + 80;
        return (
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 12, alignItems: "stretch" }}>
            <div
              style={{
                flex: 1,
                borderRadius: 12,
                overflow: "hidden",
                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                position: "relative",
              }}
            >
              <div
                style={{
                  position: "absolute",
                  top: 10,
                  left: 10,
                  zIndex: 10,
                  background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.95)",
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  padding: "6px 10px",
                  boxShadow: "0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)",
                  display: "flex",
                  gap: 8,
                  alignItems: "center",
                }}
              >
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 10,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    color: C.txm,
                  }}
                >
                  Monitoreo Activo · {fincasConMonitoreo.length} fincas
                </span>
                {[
                  { label: "Óptimo", col: C.g400 },
                  { label: "Bueno", col: C.g300 },
                  { label: "Req. atención", col: C.a400 },
                  { label: "Crítico", col: C.r500 },
                ].map((s) => (
                  <div
                    key={s.label}
                    style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 3 }}
                  >
                    <div
                      style={{
                        width: 7,
                        height: 7,
                        borderRadius: "50%",
                        background: s.col,
                      }}
                    />
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}>
                      {s.label}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
              <div ref={teleMapRef} style={{ height: mapH, width: "100%" }} />
            </div>
            {cfg.tele_alerts !== false && (
              <div
                style={{
                  width: 280,
                  flexShrink: 0,
                  background: C.surface,
                  border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                  borderRadius: 12,
                  padding: "14px 14px 10px",
                  boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
                  display: "flex",
                  flexDirection: "column",
                }}
              >
                <p
                  style={{
                    margin: "0 0 2px",
                    fontSize: 11,
                    fontWeight: 700,
                    color: C.tx,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  Alertas por Teledetección
                </p>
                <p
                  style={{
                    margin: "0 0 10px",
                    fontSize: 10,
                    color: C.txl,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  {fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.length > 0
                    ? `${fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.length} finca${
                        fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.length > 1 ? "s" : ""
                      } con alerta activa`
                    : "Sin alertas activas"}
                </p>
                {fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.length === 0 ? (
                  <div
                    style={{
                      flex: 1,
                      display: "flex",
                      flexDirection: "column",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      justifyContent: "center",
                    }}
                  >
                    <p
                      style={{
                        color: C.g500,
                        fontSize: 13,
                        fontFamily: F,
                        fontWeight: 700,
                        margin: 0,
                      }}
                    >
                      ✓ Sin alertas activas
                    </p>
                    <p
                      style={{
                        color: C.txl,
                        fontSize: 10.5,
                        fontFamily: F,
                        fontWeight: 300,
                        margin: "4px 0 0",
                        textAlign: "center",
                      }}
                    >
                      Todas las fincas están en buen estado
                    </p>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <div
                      style={{
                        overflowY: "auto",
                        maxHeight: ALERT_ROW_H * VISIBLE_ALERTS,
                        display: "flex",
                        flexDirection: "column",
                        gap: 6,
                      }}
                    >
                      {fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.map((r: any, i: number) => (
                        <div
                          key={i}
                          onClick={() =>
                            setModalFinca(
                              aprobados.find((d: any) => d.id === r.id) || r
                            )
                          }
                          style={{
                            background: C.a100,
                            border: `1px solid ${C.a400}`,
                            borderRadius: 8,
                            padding: "8px 11px",
                            cursor: "pointer",
                            transition: "box-shadow 0.15s",
                            flexShrink: 0,
                          }}
                          onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                            (e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow =
                              "0 2px 8px rgba(180,83,9,0.18)")
                          }
                          onMouseLeave={(e) =>
                            (e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = "none")
                          }
                        >
                          <p
                            style={{
                              margin: 0,
                              fontSize: 10.5,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              color: C.a700,
                            }}
                          >
                            {r.finca}
                          </p>
                          <p
                            style={{
                              margin: "2px 0 0",
                              fontSize: 9.5,
                              color: C.a600,
                              fontFamily: F,
                            }}
                          >
                            ⚠ {r.alertaTeledeteccion}
                          </p>
                          <p
                            style={{
                              margin: "3px 0 0",
                              fontSize: 9.5,
                              color: C.txl,
                              fontFamily: F,
                            }}
                          >
                            {r.region} · {r.subActividad} · {r.ha} ha
                          </p>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                    {fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.length > VISIBLE_ALERTS && (
                      <p
                        style={{
                          margin: "8px 0 0",
                          fontSize: 9.5,
                          color: C.txl,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          textAlign: "center",
                          flexShrink: 0,
                        }}
                      >
                        ↕ {fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion.length - VISIBLE_ALERTS}{" "}
                        alertas más
                      </p>
                    )}
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        );
      })()}
      {cfg.tele_tabla !== false && (
        <Panel
          title="Monitoreo Satelital — Últimas Revisiones por Finca"
          subtitle={`${teleFiltered.length} de ${ultimasRevisiones.length} fincas · Haz clic en una fila para expandir el historial`}
        >
          <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              gap: 8,
              alignItems: "center",
              flexWrap: "wrap",
              marginBottom: 10,
              background: C.surfaceAlt,
              border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              borderRadius: 10,
              padding: "8px 12px",
            }}
          >
            <input
              value={teleSearch}
              onChange={(e) => {
                setTeleSearch(e.target.value);
                setExpandedMonRow(null);
              }}
              placeholder="Buscar finca, productor, región…"
              style={{
                flex: 1,
                minWidth: 160,
                background: "transparent",
                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                borderRadius: 8,
                padding: "5px 10px",
                fontSize: 10.5,
                fontFamily: F,
                color: C.tx,
                outline: "none",
              }}
            />
            {(
              [
                {
                  label: "Riesgo",
                  val: teleFilterRiesgo,
                  set: (v: string) => {
                    setTeleFilterRiesgo(v);
                    setExpandedMonRow(null);
                  },
                  opts: ["Todos", "Bajo", "Medio", "Alto"],
                },
                {
                  label: "Actividad",
                  val: teleFilterActividad,
                  set: (v: string) => {
                    setTeleFilterActividad(v);
                    setExpandedMonRow(null);
                  },
                  opts: ["Todas", "Ganadería", "Cultivos"],
                },
                {
                  label: "Región",
                  val: teleFilterRegion,
                  set: (v: string) => {
                    setTeleFilterRegion(v);
                    setExpandedMonRow(null);
                  },
                  opts: teleRegiones,
                },
              ] as any[]
            ).map((f, i) => (
              <div
                key={i}
                style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}
              >
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 10,
                    color: C.txl,
                    fontWeight: 500,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  {f.label}:
                </span>
                <select
                  value={f.val}
                  onChange={(e) => f.set(e.target.value)}
                  style={{
                    background: C.surface,
                    border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                    borderRadius: 8,
                    padding: "5px 8px",
                    fontSize: 10,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    color: C.tx,
                    outline: "none",
                    cursor: "pointer",
                  }}
                >
                  {f.opts.map((o: string) => (
                    <option key={o}>{o}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              </div>
            ))}
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}>
              <span
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontWeight: 500,
                  fontFamily: F,
                }}
              >
                Orden:
              </span>
              <select
                value={teleSort}
                onChange={(e) => {
                  setTeleSort(e.target.value);
                  setExpandedMonRow(null);
                }}
                style={{
                  background: C.surface,
                  border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  padding: "5px 8px",
                  fontSize: 10,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  color: C.tx,
                  outline: "none",
                  cursor: "pointer",
                }}
              >
                <option value="riesgo_desc">Riesgo ↓</option>
                <option value="ndvi_asc">NDVI ↑ (peor primero)</option>
                <option value="ndvi_desc">NDVI ↓ (mejor primero)</option>
                <option value="cosecha_desc">P. Cosecha ↓</option>
                <option value="ha_desc">Ha ↓</option>
                <option value="finca_asc">Finca A–Z</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <span
              style={{
                fontSize: 10,
                color: C.txl,
                fontFamily: F,
                marginLeft: "auto",
                whiteSpace: "nowrap",
              }}
            >
              {teleFiltered.length} de {ultimasRevisiones.length} fincas
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ overflowX: "auto" }}>
            <table
              style={{
                width: "100%",
                borderCollapse: "collapse",
                fontFamily: F,
                minWidth: 900,
              }}
            >
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  {[
                    "",
                    "Productor",
                    "Teléfono",
                    "Finca",
                    "Región",
                    "Actividad",
                    "Ha",
                    "Monto",
                    "Fase Fenológica",
                    "Estado Salud",
                    "NDVI",
                    "Δ NDVI",
                    "Área Det.",
                    "Rend. Est.",
                    "P. Cosecha",
                    "Alerta",
                    "Riesgo",
                    "Inicio Ciclo",
                    "Fin Ciclo",
                    "",
                  ].map((col, ci) => (
                    <th
                      key={ci}
                      style={{
                        padding: "8px 10px",
                        textAlign: "left",
                        fontSize: 8.5,
                        fontWeight: 600,
                        color: C.txl,
                        textTransform: "uppercase",
                        letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                        borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                        background: C.surfaceAlt,
                        whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                      }}
                    >
                      {col}
                    </th>
                  ))}
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {teleFiltered.map((r, i) => {
                  const salud = r.estadoSalud || "";
                  const saludColor =
                    salud === "Óptimo"
                      ? C.g500
                      : salud === "Bueno"
                      ? C.g400
                      : salud.includes("Requiere")
                      ? C.a500
                      : C.r500;
                  const anomalia = r.indices?.anomaliaNdvi;
                  const finca = aprobados.find((d) => d.id === r.id);
                  const revisiones = finca?.logRevisiones || [];
                  const isExpanded = expandedMonRow === r.id;
                  const ndviSparkData = revisiones.map((rv) => ({
                    fecha: rv.fechaActualizacion?.slice(5),
                    ndvi: rv.indices?.ndvi,
                    alerta: !!rv.alertaTeledeteccion,
                  }));
                  const tieneAlerta = !!r.alertaTeledeteccion;
                  return (
                    <React.Fragment key={r.id ?? i}>
                      <tr
                        onClick={() =>
                          revisiones.length > 0 &&
                          setExpandedMonRow(isExpanded ? null : r.id)
                        }
                        style={{
                          borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                          background: isExpanded
                            ? C.b50
                            : tieneAlerta
                            ? "rgba(239,68,68,0.07)"
                            : i % 2 === 0
                            ? "transparent"
                            : C.surfaceAlt,
                          cursor: revisiones.length > 0 ? "pointer" : "default",
                          borderLeft: tieneAlerta
                            ? `3px solid ${C.r400}`
                            : isExpanded
                            ? `3px solid ${C.b400}`
                            : "3px solid transparent",
                        }}
                        onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                          e.currentTarget.style.background = isExpanded
                            ? C.b100
                            : "rgba(0,0,0,0.03)";
                        }}
                        onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                          e.currentTarget.style.background = isExpanded
                            ? C.b50
                            : tieneAlerta
                            ? "rgba(239,68,68,0.07)"
                            : i % 2 === 0
                            ? "transparent"
                            : C.surfaceAlt;
                        }}
                      >
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "4px 6px",
                            textAlign: "center",
                            width: 28,
                          }}
                        >
                          {revisiones.length > 0 && (
                            <span
                              style={{
                                color: isExpanded ? C.b500 : C.txl,
                                fontSize: 10,
                                padding: "2px 4px",
                                fontFamily: F,
                                transition: "color 0.15s",
                                userSelect: "none",
                              }}
                            >
                              {isExpanded ? "▼" : "▶"}
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.tx,
                            fontWeight: 600,
                            whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.productor}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txl,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.telefono || "—"}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.tx,
                            fontWeight: 600,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.finca}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txm,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.region}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txm,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.subActividad}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 11,
                            color: C.tx,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.ha.toLocaleString()}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 11,
                            color: C.g600,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                          }}
                        >
                          ${(r.monto / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txm,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.faseFenologica}
                        </td>
                        <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
                          <span
                            style={{
                              background: saludColor + "22",
                              color: saludColor,
                              borderRadius: 6,
                              padding: "2px 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontWeight: 600,
                            }}
                          >
                            {r.estadoSalud}
                          </span>
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color:
                              r.indices?.ndvi >= 0.7
                                ? C.g500
                                : r.indices?.ndvi >= 0.5
                                ? C.a500
                                : C.r500,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.indices?.ndvi?.toFixed(3)}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: anomalia > 0 ? C.g500 : C.r500,
                            fontWeight: 600,
                          }}
                        >
                          {anomalia !== undefined
                            ? `${anomalia > 0 ? "+" : ""}${anomalia}%`
                            : "—"}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txm,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.areaSiembraDetectadaHa} ha
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txm,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.rendimientoEstimado}
                        </td>
                        <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
                          <span
                            style={{
                              background:
                                r.probabilidadCosechaExitosa >= 80
                                  ? C.g50
                                  : r.probabilidadCosechaExitosa >= 60
                                  ? C.a100
                                  : C.r100,
                              color:
                                r.probabilidadCosechaExitosa >= 80
                                  ? C.g600
                                  : r.probabilidadCosechaExitosa >= 60
                                  ? C.a600
                                  : C.r600,
                              borderRadius: 6,
                              padding: "2px 8px",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                            }}
                          >
                            {r.probabilidadCosechaExitosa}%
                          </span>
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: r.alertaTeledeteccion ? C.a600 : C.txll,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.alertaTeledeteccion || "—"}
                        </td>
                        <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
                          <span
                            style={{
                              color:
                                r.riesgo === "Alto"
                                  ? C.r600
                                  : r.riesgo === "Medio"
                                  ? C.a500
                                  : C.g500,
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              fontWeight: 600,
                            }}
                          >
                            {r.riesgo || "—"}
                          </span>
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txm,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.inicioCiclo || "—"}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{
                            padding: "8px 10px",
                            fontSize: 10,
                            color: C.txm,
                          }}
                        >
                          {r.finCiclo || "—"}
                        </td>
                        <td
                          style={{ padding: "4px 8px", textAlign: "center" }}
                          onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                        >
                          {finca && (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => setTeleDrillFinca(finca)}
                              title="Ver ficha completa"
                              style={{
                                background: C.g50,
                                border: `1px solid ${C.g200}`,
                                borderRadius: 6,
                                padding: "2px 7px",
                                fontSize: 9.5,
                                fontWeight: 600,
                                color: C.g600,
                                fontFamily: F,
                                cursor: "pointer",
                                whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                              }}
                              onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                                (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.g100)
                              }
                              onMouseLeave={(e) =>
                                (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.g50)
                              }
                            >
                              ↗ Ficha
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                      {isExpanded && revisiones.length > 0 && (
                        <tr style={{ background: C.b50 }}>
                          <td colSpan={19} style={{ padding: 0 }}>
                            <div
                              style={{
                                padding: "12px 16px 14px",
                                borderTop: `1px solid ${C.b200}`,
                                borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.b200}`,
                              }}
                            >
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  display: "flex",
                                  alignItems: "center",
                                  gap: 10,
                                  marginBottom: 10,
                                }}
                              >
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                    color: C.b600,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    textTransform: "uppercase",
                                    letterSpacing: "0.07em",
                                  }}
                                >
                                  📡 Historial Satelital — {r.productor} ·{" "}
                                  {r.finca}
                                </span>
                                <span
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    color: C.txl,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {revisiones.length} revisiones
                                </span>
                                {finca && (
                                  <button
                                    onClick={(e) => {
                                      e.stopPropagation();
                                      setModalFinca(finca);
                                    }}
                                    style={{
                                      marginLeft: "auto",
                                      background: C.b50,
                                      border: `1px solid ${C.b300}`,
                                      borderRadius: 7,
                                      padding: "3px 10px",
                                      fontSize: 9.5,
                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                      color: C.b600,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      cursor: "pointer",
                                      display: "flex",
                                      alignItems: "center",
                                      gap: 5,
                                    }}
                                    onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                                      (e.currentTarget.style.background =
                                        C.b100)
                                    }
                                    onMouseLeave={(e) =>
                                      (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.b50)
                                    }
                                  >
                                    Ver ficha completa →
                                  </button>
                                )}
                              </div>
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  display: "flex",
                                  gap: 16,
                                  alignItems: "flex-start",
                                }}
                              >
                                {/* NDVI Satellite image */}
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    flexShrink: 0,
                                    display: "flex",
                                    flexDirection: "column",
                                    gap: 4,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  <p
                                    style={{
                                      margin: 0,
                                      fontSize: 8.5,
                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      textTransform: "uppercase",
                                      letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    Imagen Satelital NDVI
                                  </p>
                                  <div
                                    style={{
                                      position: "relative",
                                      width: 140,
                                      height: 110,
                                      borderRadius: 6,
                                      overflow: "hidden",
                                      background: C.b50,
                                      border: `1px solid ${C.b200}`,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    <img
                                      src={NDVI_PLACEHOLDER}
                                      alt="NDVI"
                                      style={{
                                        width: "100%",
                                        height: "100%",
                                        objectFit: "cover",
                                        objectPosition: "center",
                                      }}
                                    />
                                    <div
                                      style={{
                                        position: "absolute",
                                        bottom: 0,
                                        left: 0,
                                        right: 0,
                                        background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.45)",
                                        padding: "2px 5px",
                                        display: "flex",
                                        justifyContent: "space-between",
                                        alignItems: "center",
                                      }}
                                    >
                                      <span
                                        style={{
                                          fontSize: 7.5,
                                          color: "#fff",
                                          fontFamily: F,
                                          fontWeight: 600,
                                        }}
                                      >
                                        NDVI
                                      </span>
                                      <span
                                        style={{
                                          fontSize: 7.5,
                                          color: "#aef",
                                          fontFamily: F,
                                        }}
                                      >
                                        {r.ultimaRevision ||
                                          revisiones[0]?.fechaActualizacion ||
                                          "—"}
                                      </span>
                                    </div>
                                  </div>
                                  <div
                                    style={{
                                      display: "flex",
                                      gap: 3,
                                      alignItems: "center",
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {[
                                      ["#c8e6c9", "0"],
                                      ["#81c784", "0.3"],
                                      ["#2e7d32", "0.6"],
                                      ["#1b5e20", "0.9+"],
                                    ].map(([col, lbl]) => (
                                      <div
                                        key={lbl}
                                        style={{
                                          display: "flex",
                                          alignItems: "center",
                                          gap: 2,
                                        }}
                                      >
                                        <div
                                          style={{
                                            width: 8,
                                            height: 8,
                                            background: col,
                                            borderRadius: 1,
                                          }}
                                        />
                                        <span
                                          style={{
                                            fontSize: 7,
                                            color: C.txl,
                                            fontFamily: F,
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          {lbl}
                                        </span>
                                      </div>
                                    ))}
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                                {/* Sparkline NDVI */}
                                <div style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>
                                  <p
                                    style={{
                                      margin: "0 0 4px",
                                      fontSize: 8.5,
                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      textTransform: "uppercase",
                                      letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    Evolución NDVI
                                  </p>
                                  <LineChart
                                    width={220}
                                    height={75}
                                    data={ndviSparkData}
                                    margin={{
                                      top: 4,
                                      right: 4,
                                      bottom: 0,
                                      left: 0,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    <Line
                                      type="monotone"
                                      dataKey="ndvi"
                                      stroke={C.g500}
                                      strokeWidth={2}
                                      dot={(props) => {
                                        const { cx, cy, payload } = props;
                                        return (
                                          <circle
                                            key={cx + cy}
                                            cx={cx}
                                            cy={cy}
                                            r={3}
                                            fill={
                                              payload.alerta ? C.r500 : C.g500
                                            }
                                            stroke="none"
                                          />
                                        );
                                      }}
                                    />
                                    <Tooltip
                                      contentStyle={{
                                        fontSize: 9,
                                        fontFamily: F,
                                        padding: "3px 7px",
                                      }}
                                      formatter={(v) => [
                                        Number(v).toFixed(3),
                                        "NDVI",
                                      ]}
                                      labelFormatter={(l) => l}
                                    />
                                    <XAxis
                                      dataKey="fecha"
                                      tick={{
                                        fontSize: 8,
                                        fontFamily: F,
                                        fill: C.txl,
                                      }}
                                      axisLine={false}
                                      tickLine={false}
                                    />
                                  </LineChart>
                                </div>
                                {/* History table */}
                                <div style={{ flex: 1, overflowX: "auto" }}>
                                  <table
                                    style={{
                                      width: "100%",
                                      borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                      minWidth: 580,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    <thead>
                                      <tr>
                                        {[
                                          "Fecha",
                                          "Fase Fenológica",
                                          "Estado Salud",
                                          "NDVI",
                                          "Δ NDVI",
                                          "Rend. Est.",
                                          "P. Cosecha",
                                          "Alerta",
                                        ].map((h) => (
                                          <th
                                            key={h}
                                            style={{
                                              textAlign: "left",
                                              fontSize: 8,
                                              fontWeight: 700,
                                              color: C.txl,
                                              fontFamily: F,
                                              textTransform: "uppercase",
                                              letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                                              padding: "3px 8px",
                                              borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.b200}`,
                                              whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                            }}
                                          >
                                            {h}
                                          </th>
                                        ))}
                                      </tr>
                                    </thead>
                                    <tbody>
                                      {[...revisiones]
                                        .reverse()
                                        .map((rev, ri) => {
                                          const anom =
                                            rev.indices?.anomaliaNdvi;
                                          const anomCol =
                                            anom == null
                                              ? C.txl
                                              : anom > 0
                                              ? C.g600
                                              : anom < -5
                                              ? C.r600
                                              : C.a500;
                                          const sc2 =
                                            rev.estadoSalud === "Óptimo"
                                              ? C.g500
                                              : rev.estadoSalud === "Bueno"
                                              ? C.g400
                                              : rev.estadoSalud?.includes(
                                                  "Requiere"
                                                )
                                              ? C.a500
                                              : C.r500;
                                          const pc =
                                            rev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa;
                                          return (
                                            <tr
                                              key={ri}
                                              style={{
                                                background:
                                                  ri % 2 === 0
                                                    ? "transparent"
                                                    : "rgba(59,130,246,0.04)",
                                                borderLeft:
                                                  rev.alertaTeledeteccion
                                                    ? `2px solid ${C.r400}`
                                                    : "2px solid transparent",
                                              }}
                                            >
                                              <td
                                                style={{
                                                  padding: "4px 8px",
                                                  fontSize: 9.5,
                                                  fontFamily: F,
                                                  color: C.txm,
                                                  whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                                  fontWeight: 600,
                                                }}
                                              >
                                                {rev.fechaActualizacion || "—"}
                                              </td>
                                              <td
                                                style={{
                                                  padding: "4px 8px",
                                                  fontSize: 9.5,
                                                  fontFamily: F,
                                                  color: C.txm,
                                                  whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                                }}
                                              >
                                                {rev.faseFenologica || "—"}
                                              </td>
                                              <td
                                                style={{ padding: "4px 8px" }}
                                              >
                                                {rev.estadoSalud ? (
                                                  <span
                                                    style={{
                                                      background: sc2 + "22",
                                                      color: sc2,
                                                      borderRadius: 4,
                                                      padding: "1px 6px",
                                                      fontSize: 9,
                                                      fontFamily: F,
                                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                                      whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                                    }}
                                                  >
                                                    {rev.estadoSalud}
                                                  </span>
                                                ) : (
                                                  <span
                                                    style={{
                                                      color: C.txl,
                                                      fontSize: 9,
                                                    }}
                                                  >
                                                    —
                                                  </span>
                                                )}
                                              </td>
                                              <td
                                                style={{
                                                  padding: "4px 8px",
                                                  fontSize: 9.5,
                                                  fontFamily: F,
                                                  color: C.txm,
                                                  fontWeight: 700,
                                                }}
                                              >
                                                {rev.indices?.ndvi?.toFixed(
                                                  3
                                                ) ?? "—"}
                                              </td>
                                              <td
                                                style={{
                                                  padding: "4px 8px",
                                                  fontSize: 9.5,
                                                  fontFamily: F,
                                                  color: anomCol,
                                                  fontWeight: 700,
                                                }}
                                              >
                                                {anom != null
                                                  ? anom > 0
                                                    ? `+${anom}`
                                                    : String(anom)
                                                  : "—"}
                                              </td>
                                              <td
                                                style={{
                                                  padding: "4px 8px",
                                                  fontSize: 9.5,
                                                  fontFamily: F,
                                                  color: C.txm,
                                                }}
                                              >
                                                {rev.rendimientoEstimado || "—"}
                                              </td>
                                              <td
                                                style={{ padding: "4px 8px" }}
                                              >
                                                {pc != null ? (
                                                  <span
                                                    style={{
                                                      background:
                                                        pc >= 80
                                                          ? C.g50
                                                          : pc >= 60
                                                          ? C.a100
                                                          : C.r100,
                                                      color:
                                                        pc >= 80
                                                          ? C.g600
                                                          : pc >= 60
                                                          ? C.a600
                                                          : C.r600,
                                                      borderRadius: 4,
                                                      padding: "1px 6px",
                                                      fontSize: 9,
                                                      fontFamily: F,
                                                      fontWeight: 700,
                                                    }}
                                                  >
                                                    {pc}%
                                                  </span>
                                                ) : (
                                                  <span
                                                    style={{
                                                      color: C.txl,
                                                      fontSize: 9,
                                                    }}
                                                  >
                                                    —
                                                  </span>
                                                )}
                                              </td>
                                              <td
                                                style={{ padding: "4px 8px" }}
                                              >
                                                {rev.alertaTeledeteccion ? (
                                                  <span
                                                    style={{
                                                      background: C.r100,
                                                      color: C.r600,
                                                      borderRadius: 4,
                                                      padding: "1px 6px",
                                                      fontSize: 9,
                                                      fontFamily: F,
                                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                                      whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                                                    }}
                                                  >
                                                    ⚠ {rev.alertaTeledeteccion}
                                                  </span>
                                                ) : (
                                                  <span
                                                    style={{
                                                      color: C.g500,
                                                      fontSize: 9,
                                                      fontFamily: F,
                                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                                    }}
                                                  >
                                                    ✓ Sin alerta
                                                  </span>
                                                )}
                                              </td>
                                            </tr>
                                          );
                                        })}
                                    </tbody>
                                  </table>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                      )}
                    </React.Fragment>
                  );
                })}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </Panel>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TAB: FINCAS (explorador individual)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const TabFincas = ({ aprobados = [], territoriosData = [] }: any) => {
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [sortKey, setSortKey] = useState("indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico");
  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState<"asc" | "desc">("desc");
  const [filterRiesgo, setFilterRiesgo] = useState("Todos");
  const [filterActividad, setFilterActividad] = useState("Todas");
  const [filterRegion, setFilterRegion] = useState("Todas");
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
  const PAGE_SIZE = 15;

  // Map state
  const fincasMapRef = React.useRef<any>(null);
  const fincasMapInstanceRef = React.useRef<any>(null);
  const fincasMarkersRef = React.useRef<any[]>([]);
  const [fincasMapFiltroRiesgo, setFincasMapFiltroRiesgo] = useState("Todos");
  const [fincasMapFiltroActividad, setFincasMapFiltroActividad] =
    useState("Todos");
  const fincasMapDatos = React.useMemo(() => {
    const td: any[] = territoriosData;
    return td.filter(
      (d: any) =>
        (fincasMapFiltroRiesgo === "Todos" ||
          d.riesgo === fincasMapFiltroRiesgo) &&
        (fincasMapFiltroActividad === "Todos" ||
          d.actividad === fincasMapFiltroActividad)
    );
  }, [territoriosData, fincasMapFiltroRiesgo, fincasMapFiltroActividad]);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (!fincasMapRef.current) return;
    if (!fincasMapInstanceRef.current) {
      const maplibregl = (window as any).maplibregl;
      if (!maplibregl) return;
      const map = new maplibregl.Map({
        container: fincasMapRef.current,
        style: "https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json",
        center: [-80.5, 8.5],
        zoom: 6,
        attributionControl: false,
      });
      fincasMapInstanceRef.current = map;
    }
    const map = fincasMapInstanceRef.current;
    const maplibregl = (window as any).maplibregl;
    if (!maplibregl) return;
    fincasMarkersRef.current.forEach((m) => m.remove());
    fincasMarkersRef.current = [];
    fincasMapDatos.forEach((d: any) => {
      if (!d.lat || !d.lng) return;
      const rCol =
        d.riesgo === "Alto"
          ? "#ef4444"
          : d.riesgo === "Medio"
          ? "#f59e0b"
          : "#22c55e";
      const el = document.createElement("div");
      el.style.cssText = `width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:${rCol};border:2px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);cursor:pointer;transition:transform 0.1s`;
      el.title = `${d.finca} · ${d.productor} · ${d.riesgo}`;
      const marker = new maplibregl.Marker({ element: el, anchor: "center" })
        .setLngLat([d.lng, d.lat])
        .addTo(map);
      fincasMarkersRef.current.push(marker);
    });
  }, [fincasMapDatos]);

  const regiones = useMemo(
    () => [
      "Todas",
      ...Array.from(new Set(aprobados.map((d: any) => d.region))).sort(),
    ],
    [aprobados]
  );

  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    let r = [...aprobados] as any[];
    if (search.trim()) {
      const q = search.trim().toLowerCase();
      r = r.filter(
        (d) =>
          d.finca?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          d.productor?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          d.subActividad?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
      );
    }
    if (filterRiesgo !== "Todos")
      r = r.filter((d) => d.riesgo === filterRiesgo);
    if (filterActividad !== "Todas")
      r = r.filter((d) => d.actividad === filterActividad);
    if (filterRegion !== "Todas")
      r = r.filter((d) => d.region === filterRegion);
    r.sort((a, b) => {
      const va = a[sortKey] ?? 0;
      const vb = b[sortKey] ?? 0;
      if (typeof va === "string")
        return sortDir === "asc" ? va.localeCompare(vb) : vb.localeCompare(va);
      return sortDir === "asc" ? va - vb : vb - va;
    });
    return r;
  }, [
    aprobados,
    search,
    filterRiesgo,
    filterActividad,
    filterRegion,
    sortKey,
    sortDir,
  ]);

  const pageData = filtered.slice(page * PAGE_SIZE, (page + 1) * PAGE_SIZE);
  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filtered.length / PAGE_SIZE);

  const handleSort = (key: string) => {
    if (sortKey === key) setSortDir((d) => (d === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc"));
    else {
      setSortKey(key);
      setSortDir("desc");
    }
    setPage(0);
  };

  const SortIcon = ({ k }: { k: string }) => (
    <span
      style={{
        color: sortKey === k ? C.accent : C.txll,
        fontSize: 9,
        marginLeft: 3,
      }}
    >
      {sortKey === k ? (sortDir === "desc" ? "▼" : "▲") : "↕"}
    </span>
  );

  const rCol = { Bajo: C.g500, Medio: C.a500, Alto: C.r600 } as any;
  const rBg = { Bajo: C.g100, Medio: C.a100, Alto: C.r100 } as any;

  // KPI summary
  const haTotal = filtered.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.ha, 0);
  const montoTotal = filtered.reduce((s: number, d: any) => s + d.monto, 0);
  const alertasCnt = filtered.filter(
    (d: any) => d.alertasDetectadas?.length > 0
  ).length;
  const moraFincas = filtered.filter((d: any) => d.mora === "Si").length;

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 14 }}>
      {/* KPI strip */}
      <div
        style={{
          display: "grid",
          gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4,1fr)",
          gap: 10,
        }}
      >
        {[
          {
            label: "Fincas filtradas",
            value: filtered.length.toLocaleString(),
            unit: "fincas",
            color: C.g500,
          },
          {
            label: "Hectáreas totales",
            value: haTotal.toLocaleString(),
            unit: "ha",
            color: C.accent,
          },
          {
            label: "Monto colocado",
            value: `$${(montoTotal / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M`,
            unit: "",
            color: C.b600,
          },
          {
            label: "Con alertas activas",
            value: alertasCnt.toLocaleString(),
            unit: "fincas",
            color: alertasCnt > 0 ? C.r600 : C.g500,
          },
        ].map((k, i) => (
          <div
            key={i}
            style={{
              background: C.surface,
              border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              borderRadius: 12,
              padding: "12px 14px",
              boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
            }}
          >
            <div
              style={{
                fontSize: 10,
                textTransform: "uppercase",
                letterSpacing: "0.08em",
                color: C.txl,
                fontWeight: 500,
                fontFamily: F,
                marginBottom: 4,
              }}
            >
              {k.label}
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", gap: 5 }}>
              <span
                style={{
                  fontSize: 22,
                  fontWeight: 700,
                  color: C.tx,
                  fontFamily: F,
                }}
              >
                {k.value}
              </span>
              {k.unit && (
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 11,
                    color: C.txl,
                    fontWeight: 300,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  {k.unit}
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Filters bar */}
      <div
        style={{
          background: C.surface,
          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
          borderRadius: 12,
          padding: "10px 14px",
          display: "flex",
          gap: 10,
          alignItems: "center",
          flexWrap: "wrap",
        }}
      >
        <div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 180 }}>
          <input
            value={search}
            onChange={(e) => {
              setSearch(e.target.value);
              setPage(0);
            }}
            placeholder="Buscar finca, productor, cultivo…"
            style={{
              width: "100%",
              background: C.surfaceAlt,
              border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              borderRadius: 8,
              padding: "6px 10px",
              fontSize: 10.5,
              fontFamily: F,
              color: C.tx,
              outline: "none",
              boxSizing: "border-box",
            }}
          />
        </div>
        {(
          [
            {
              label: "Riesgo",
              val: filterRiesgo,
              set: (v: string) => {
                setFilterRiesgo(v);
                setPage(0);
              },
              opts: ["Todos", "Bajo", "Medio", "Alto"],
            },
            {
              label: "Actividad",
              val: filterActividad,
              set: (v: string) => {
                setFilterActividad(v);
                setPage(0);
              },
              opts: ["Todas", "Ganadería", "Cultivos"],
            },
            {
              label: "Región",
              val: filterRegion,
              set: (v: string) => {
                setFilterRegion(v);
                setPage(0);
              },
              opts: regiones,
            },
          ] as any[]
        ).map((f, i) => (
          <div
            key={i}
            style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}
          >
            <span
              style={{
                fontSize: 10,
                color: C.txl,
                fontWeight: 500,
                fontFamily: F,
              }}
            >
              {f.label}:
            </span>
            <select
              value={f.val}
              onChange={(e) => f.set(e.target.value)}
              style={{
                background: C.surfaceAlt,
                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                borderRadius: 8,
                padding: "5px 8px",
                fontSize: 10,
                fontFamily: F,
                color: C.tx,
                outline: "none",
                cursor: "pointer",
              }}
            >
              {f.opts.map((o: string) => (
                <option key={o}>{o}</option>
              ))}
            </select>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}>
          <span
            style={{
              fontSize: 10,
              color: C.txl,
              fontWeight: 500,
              fontFamily: F,
            }}
          >
            Orden:
          </span>
          <select
            value={`${sortKey}_${sortDir}`}
            onChange={(e) => {
              const [k, d] = e.target.value.split("_");
              setSortKey(k);
              setSortDir(d as "asc" | "desc");
              setPage(0);
            }}
            style={{
              background: C.surfaceAlt,
              border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              borderRadius: 8,
              padding: "5px 8px",
              fontSize: 10,
              fontFamily: F,
              color: C.tx,
              outline: "none",
              cursor: "pointer",
            }}
          >
            <option value="indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico_desc">IRA ↓</option>
            <option value="riesgo_desc">Riesgo ↓</option>
            <option value="ha_desc">Ha ↓</option>
            <option value="monto_desc">Monto ↓</option>
            <option value="co2BalanceNeto_asc">CO₂ ↑ (peor)</option>
            <option value="balanceCobertura_asc">Forestal ↑ (peor)</option>
            <option value="finca_asc">Finca A–Z</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span
          style={{
            fontSize: 10,
            color: C.txl,
            fontFamily: F,
            marginLeft: "auto",
          }}
        >
          {filtered.length} de {aprobados.length} fincas
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Table */}
      <div
        style={{
          background: C.surface,
          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
          borderRadius: 12,
          overflow: "hidden",
          boxShadow: "0 1px 4px rgba(15,31,20,0.04)",
        }}
      >
        <div style={{ overflowX: "auto" }}>
          <table style={{ width: "100%", borderCollapse: "collapse" }}>
            <thead>
              <tr
                style={{
                  background: C.surfaceAlt,
                  borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                }}
              >
                {(
                  [
                    { label: "Finca / Productor", key: "finca" },
                    { label: "Región", key: "region" },
                    { label: "Actividad", key: "subActividad" },
                    { label: "Ha", key: "ha" },
                    { label: "Monto", key: "monto" },
                    { label: "Riesgo", key: "riesgo" },
                    {
                      label: "IRA",
                      key: "indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico",
                      title: "Índice de Riesgo Agroclimatico",
                    },
                    { label: "CO₂ bal.", key: "co2BalanceNeto" },
                    { label: "Balance forestal", key: "balanceCobertura" },
                    { label: "Alertas", key: null },
                    { label: "Mora", key: "mora" },
                  ] as any[]
                ).map((col, ci) => (
                  <th
                    key={ci}
                    onClick={col.key ? () => handleSort(col.key) : undefined}
                    title={col.title}
                    style={{
                      textAlign: "left",
                      padding: "8px 10px",
                      fontSize: 9,
                      fontWeight: 700,
                      color: C.txm,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      textTransform: "uppercase",
                      letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                      cursor: col.key ? "pointer" : undefined,
                      whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                      userSelect: "none",
                    }}
                  >
                    {col.label}
                    {col.key && <SortIcon k={col.key} />}
                  </th>
                ))}
                <th style={{ width: 28 }} />
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {pageData.map((row: any, ri: number) => {
                const isExp = expanded === row.id;
                const lastRev =
