                  row.logRevisiones?.[row.logRevisiones.length - 1];
                const alertas = row.alertasDetectadas || [];
                return (
                  <React.Fragment key={row.id}>
                    <tr
                      onClick={() => setExpanded(isExp ? null : row.id)}
                      style={{
                        borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                        background: ri % 2 === 0 ? "transparent" : C.surfaceAlt,
                        cursor: "pointer",
                        transition: "background 0.1s",
                      }}
                      onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                        (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.g50)
                      }
                      onMouseLeave={(e) =>
                        (e.currentTarget.style.background =
                          ri % 2 === 0 ? "transparent" : C.surfaceAlt)
                      }
                    >
                      {/* Finca / Productor */}
                      <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px", minWidth: 160 }}>
                        <div
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 11,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            color: C.tx,
                            fontFamily: F,
                          }}
                        >
                          {row.finca}
                        </div>
                        <div
                          style={{ fontSize: 9.5, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          {row.productor}
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      {/* Región */}
                      <td
                        style={{
                          padding: "8px 10px",
                          fontSize: 10,
                          color: C.txm,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                        }}
                      >
                        {row.region}
                      </td>
                      {/* Actividad */}
                      <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
                        <div
                          style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txm, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          {row.subActividad || row.actividad}
                        </div>
                        <div
                          style={{ fontSize: 9, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          {row.actividad}
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      {/* Ha */}
                      <td
                        style={{
                          padding: "8px 10px",
                          fontSize: 11,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          color: C.tx,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          textAlign: "right",
                          whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                        }}
                      >
                        {row.ha.toLocaleString()}
                      </td>
                      {/* Monto */}
                      <td
                        style={{
                          padding: "8px 10px",
                          fontSize: 11,
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          color: C.tx,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          textAlign: "right",
                          whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                        }}
                      >
                        ${(row.monto / 1e6).toFixed(1)}M
                      </td>
                      {/* Riesgo */}
                      <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
                        <span
                          style={{
                            background: rBg[row.riesgo],
                            color: rCol[row.riesgo],
                            borderRadius: 6,
                            padding: "2px 8px",
                            fontSize: 9.5,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            fontFamily: F,
                          }}
                        >
                          {row.riesgo}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      {/* IRA */}
                      <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px", textAlign: "right" }}>
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 11,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            fontFamily: F,
                            color:
                              row.indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico >= 7
                                ? C.r600
                                : row.indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico >= 4
                                ? C.a500
                                : C.g500,
                          }}
                        >
                          {row.indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico?.toFixed(1)}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      {/* CO2 */}
                      <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px", textAlign: "right" }}>
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 11,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            fontFamily: F,
                            color: row.co2BalanceNeto < 0 ? C.r600 : C.g500,
                          }}
                        >
                          {row.co2BalanceNeto != null
                            ? (row.co2BalanceNeto > 0 ? "+" : "") +
                              row.co2BalanceNeto.toLocaleString()
                            : "—"}
                        </span>
                        <div
                          style={{ fontSize: 8.5, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          t CO₂e
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      {/* Forestal */}
                      <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px", textAlign: "right" }}>
                        <span
                          style={{
                            fontSize: 11,
                            fontWeight: 700,
                            fontFamily: F,
                            color:
                              row.balanceCobertura > 0
                                ? C.fReforest
                                : row.balanceCobertura < 0
                                ? C.fDeforest
                                : C.txl,
                          }}
                        >
                          {row.balanceCobertura != null
                            ? (row.balanceCobertura > 0 ? "+" : "") +
                              row.balanceCobertura.toFixed(1)
                            : "—"}
                        </span>
                        <div
                          style={{ fontSize: 8.5, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          ha
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      {/* Alertas */}
                      <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
                        {alertas.length > 0 ? (
                          <span
                            style={{
                              background: C.r100,
                              color: C.r600,
                              borderRadius: 10,
                              padding: "1px 7px",
                              fontSize: 9,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                            }}
                          >
                            ⚠ {alertas.length}
                          </span>
                        ) : (
                          <span
                            style={{
                              color: C.g500,
                              fontSize: 9,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              fontWeight: 600,
                            }}
                          >
                            ✓
                          </span>
                        )}
                      </td>
                      {/* Mora */}
                      <td style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
                        {row.mora === "Si" ? (
                          <span
                            style={{
                              background: C.a100,
                              color: C.a600,
                              borderRadius: 10,
                              padding: "1px 7px",
                              fontSize: 9,
                              fontWeight: 700,
                              fontFamily: F,
                            }}
                          >
                            {row.diasDeMora}d
                          </span>
                        ) : (
                          <span
                            style={{ color: C.txl, fontSize: 9, fontFamily: F }}
                          >
                            —
                          </span>
                        )}
                      </td>
                      {/* Expand toggle */}
                      <td style={{ padding: "8px 8px", textAlign: "center" }}>
                        <span
                          style={{ color: C.txl, fontSize: 10, fontFamily: F }}
                        >
                          {isExp ? "▲" : "▼"}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    {isExp && (
                      <tr
                        style={{
                          background: C.g50,
                          borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                        }}
                      >
                        <td colSpan={12} style={{ padding: "14px 16px" }}>
                          <div
                            style={{
                              display: "grid",
                              gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",
                              gap: 12,
                            }}
                          >
                            {/* Datos básicos */}
                            <div
                              style={{
                                background: C.surface,
                                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                borderRadius: 10,
                                padding: "12px 14px",
                              }}
                            >
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  fontSize: 10,
                                  fontWeight: 700,
                                  color: C.txm,
                                  fontFamily: F,
                                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                                  letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                                  marginBottom: 8,
                                }}
                              >
                                Datos de la Finca
                              </div>
                              {(
                                [
                                  ["Municipio", row.municipio],
                                  ["Tipo suelo", row.tipoSuelo],
                                  ["Vocación suelo", row.vocacionSuelo],
                                  ["Tiene riego", row.tieneRiego ? "Sí" : "No"],
                                  ["Tecnificación", row.nivelTecnificacion],
                                  ["Tenencia", row.tenenciaTierra],
                                  ["Inicio ciclo", row.inicioCiclo],
                                  ["Fin ciclo", row.finCiclo],
                                ] as any[]
                              ).map(([l, v]: any, i: number) => (
                                <div
                                  key={i}
                                  style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    alignItems: "baseline",
                                    gap: 6,
                                    marginBottom: 3,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10,
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      flexShrink: 0,
                                      minWidth: 96,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {l}
                                  </span>
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10.5,
                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                      color: C.tx,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {v || "—"}
                                  </span>
                                </div>
                              ))}
                            </div>
                            {/* Riesgo detalle */}
                            <div
                              style={{
                                background: C.surface,
                                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                borderRadius: 10,
                                padding: "12px 14px",
                              }}
                            >
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  fontSize: 10,
                                  fontWeight: 700,
                                  color: C.txm,
                                  fontFamily: F,
                                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                                  letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                                  marginBottom: 8,
                                }}
                              >
                                Riesgo Detallado
                              </div>
                              {(
                                [
                                  [
                                    "Riesgo climático",
                                    row.riesgoClimatico,
                                    rCol[row.riesgoClimatico],
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Riesgo de suelo",
                                    row.riesgoSuelo,
                                    rCol[row.riesgoSuelo],
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Riesgo de manejo",
                                    row.riesgoManejo,
                                    rCol[row.riesgoManejo],
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Plagas/Enf.",
                                    row.riesgoPlagasEnfermedades === "Si"
                                      ? "Sí"
                                      : "No",
                                    row.riesgoPlagasEnfermedades === "Si"
                                      ? C.r600
                                      : C.g500,
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Estrés térmico",
                                    row.estresTermicoCultivo === "Si" ||
                                    row.estresTermicoGanado === "Si"
                                      ? "Sí"
                                      : "No",
                                    row.estresTermicoCultivo === "Si" ||
                                    row.estresTermicoGanado === "Si"
                                      ? C.r600
                                      : C.g500,
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "IRA",
                                    row.indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico?.toFixed(2),
                                    row.indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico >= 7
                                      ? C.r600
                                      : row.indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico >= 4
                                      ? C.a500
                                      : C.g500,
                                  ],
                                ] as any[]
                              ).map(([l, v, col]: any, i: number) => (
                                <div
                                  key={i}
                                  style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    alignItems: "baseline",
                                    gap: 6,
                                    marginBottom: 3,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10,
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      flexShrink: 0,
                                      minWidth: 106,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {l}
                                  </span>
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10.5,
                                      fontWeight: 700,
                                      color: col || C.tx,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {v || "—"}
                                  </span>
                                </div>
                              ))}
                              {alertas.length > 0 && (
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    marginTop: 8,
                                    borderTop: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                    paddingTop: 6,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  <div
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10,
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      marginBottom: 4,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    Alertas detectadas:
                                  </div>
                                  {alertas.map((a: string, ai: number) => (
                                    <div
                                      key={ai}
                                      style={{
                                        background: C.r100,
                                        color: C.r600,
                                        borderRadius: 6,
                                        padding: "2px 7px",
                                        fontSize: 9.5,
                                        fontFamily: F,
                                        fontWeight: 600,
                                        marginBottom: 3,
                                        display: "inline-block",
                                        marginRight: 4,
                                      }}
                                    >
                                      ⚠ {a}
                                    </div>
                                  ))}
                                </div>
                              )}
                            </div>
                            {/* Ambiental */}
                            <div
                              style={{
                                background: C.surface,
                                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                borderRadius: 10,
                                padding: "12px 14px",
                              }}
                            >
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  fontSize: 10,
                                  fontWeight: 700,
                                  color: C.txm,
                                  fontFamily: F,
                                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                                  letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                                  marginBottom: 8,
                                }}
                              >
                                Huella Ambiental
                              </div>
                              {(
                                [
                                  [
                                    "CO₂ emisiones",
                                    row.co2Emisiones != null
                                      ? row.co2Emisiones.toLocaleString() + " t"
                                      : "—",
                                    C.cEmision,
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "CO₂ capturas",
                                    row.co2Capturas != null
                                      ? row.co2Capturas.toLocaleString() + " t"
                                      : "—",
                                    C.cCaptura,
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Balance CO₂",
                                    row.co2BalanceNeto != null
                                      ? (row.co2BalanceNeto > 0 ? "+" : "") +
                                        row.co2BalanceNeto.toLocaleString() +
                                        " t"
                                      : "—",
                                    row.co2BalanceNeto < 0 ? C.r600 : C.g500,
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Categoría CO₂",
                                    row.categoriaEmisionCO2 || "—",
                                    C.txm,
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Ganancia cobertura",
                                    row.haGananciaCobertura != null
                                      ? "+" +
                                        row.haGananciaCobertura.toFixed(1) +
                                        " ha"
                                      : "—",
                                    C.fReforest,
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Pérdida deforest.",
                                    row.haPerdidaDeforestacion != null
                                      ? "-" +
                                        row.haPerdidaDeforestacion.toFixed(1) +
                                        " ha"
                                      : "—",
                                    C.fDeforest,
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Balance forestal",
                                    row.balanceCobertura != null
                                      ? (row.balanceCobertura > 0 ? "+" : "") +
                                        row.balanceCobertura.toFixed(1) +
                                        " ha"
                                      : "—",
                                    row.balanceCobertura > 0
                                      ? C.fReforest
                                      : row.balanceCobertura < 0
                                      ? C.fDeforest
                                      : C.txl,
                                  ],
                                  [
                                    "Categoría forestal",
                                    row.categoriaDeforestacion || "—",
                                    C.txm,
                                  ],
                                ] as any[]
                              ).map(([l, v, col]: any, i: number) => (
                                <div
                                  key={i}
                                  style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    alignItems: "baseline",
                                    gap: 6,
                                    marginBottom: 3,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10,
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      flexShrink: 0,
                                      minWidth: 106,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {l}
                                  </span>
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10.5,
                                      fontWeight: 700,
                                      color: col || C.tx,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {v}
                                  </span>
                                </div>
                              ))}
                            </div>
                            {/* Última revisión teledetección */}
                            <div
                              style={{
                                background: C.surface,
                                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                borderRadius: 10,
                                padding: "12px 14px",
                              }}
                            >
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  fontSize: 10,
                                  fontWeight: 700,
                                  color: C.txm,
                                  fontFamily: F,
                                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                                  letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                                  marginBottom: 8,
                                }}
                              >
                                Última Revisión{" "}
                                {lastRev ? (
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontWeight: 400,
                                      textTransform: "none",
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    — {lastRev.fechaActualizacion}
                                  </span>
                                ) : null}
                              </div>
                              {lastRev ? (
                                <>
                                  {(
                                    [
                                      [
                                        "Fase fenológica",
                                        lastRev.faseFenologica,
                                      ],
                                      ["Estado de salud", lastRev.estadoSalud],
                                      [
                                        "NDVI",
                                        lastRev.indices?.ndvi?.toFixed(3),
                                      ],
                                      [
                                        "NDWI",
                                        lastRev.indices?.ndwi?.toFixed(3),
                                      ],
                                      [
                                        "Δ NDVI",
                                        lastRev.indices?.anomaliaNdvi != null
                                          ? (lastRev.indices.anomaliaNdvi > 0
                                              ? "+"
                                              : "") +
                                            lastRev.indices.anomaliaNdvi
                                          : null,
                                      ],
                                      [
                                        "Área siembra",
                                        lastRev.areaSiembraDetectadaHa != null
                                          ? lastRev.areaSiembraDetectadaHa +
                                            " ha"
                                          : null,
                                      ],
                                      [
                                        "Rend. estimado",
                                        lastRev.rendimientoEstimado,
                                      ],
                                      [
                                        "P. cosecha",
                                        lastRev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa !=
                                        null
                                          ? lastRev.probabilidadCosechaExitosa +
                                            "%"
                                          : null,
                                      ],
                                    ] as any[]
                                  ).map(
                                    ([l, v]: any, i: number) =>
                                      v != null && (
                                        <div
                                          key={i}
                                          style={{
                                            display: "flex",
                                            alignItems: "baseline",
                                            gap: 6,
                                            marginBottom: 3,
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          <span
                                            style={{
                                              fontSize: 10,
                                              color: C.txl,
                                              fontFamily: F,
                                              flexShrink: 0,
                                              minWidth: 96,
                                            }}
                                          >
                                            {l}
                                          </span>
                                          <span
                                            style={{
                                              fontSize: 10.5,
                                              fontWeight: 600,
                                              color: C.tx,
                                              fontFamily: F,
                                            }}
                                          >
                                            {v}
                                          </span>
                                        </div>
                                      )
                                  )}
                                  {lastRev.alertaTeledeteccion && (
                                    <div
                                      style={{
                                        marginTop: 6,
                                        background: C.r100,
                                        color: C.r600,
                                        borderRadius: 6,
                                        padding: "3px 8px",
                                        fontSize: 9.5,
                                        fontFamily: F,
                                        fontWeight: 600,
                                      }}
                                    >
                                      ⚠ {lastRev.alertaTeledeteccion}
                                    </div>
                                  )}
                                </>
                              ) : (
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    color: C.txl,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  Sin revisiones registradas
                                </div>
                              )}
                              {/* Agua */}
                              <div
                                style={{
                                  marginTop: 10,
                                  borderTop: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                  paddingTop: 8,
                                }}
                              >
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    fontSize: 10,
                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                    color: C.txm,
                                    fontFamily: F,
                                    marginBottom: 5,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  Huella Hídrica
                                </div>
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    alignItems: "baseline",
                                    gap: 6,
                                    marginBottom: 3,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10,
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      minWidth: 96,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    Agua disponible
                                  </span>
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10.5,
                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                      color: C.hOk,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {row.aguaDisponiblePrecipitacionM3 != null
                                      ? (
                                          row.aguaDisponiblePrecipitacionM3 /
                                          1000
                                        ).toFixed(0) + "K m³"
                                      : "—"}
                                  </span>
                                </div>
                                <div
                                  style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    alignItems: "baseline",
                                    gap: 6,
                                  }}
                                >
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10,
                                      color: C.txl,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                      minWidth: 96,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    Agua a suplir
                                  </span>
                                  <span
                                    style={{
                                      fontSize: 10.5,
                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                      color:
                                        row.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 > 0
                                          ? C.hDeficit
                                          : C.g500,
                                      fontFamily: F,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {row.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 != null
                                      ? (row.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 / 1000).toFixed(
                                          0
                                        ) + "K m³"
                                      : "—"}
                                  </span>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    )}
                  </React.Fragment>
                );
              })}
              {pageData.length === 0 && (
                <tr>
                  <td
                    colSpan={12}
                    style={{
                      textAlign: "center",
                      padding: "32px",
                      fontSize: 11,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontFamily: F,
                    }}
                  >
                    No se encontraron fincas con los filtros seleccionados
                  </td>
                </tr>
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
        {/* Pagination */}
        {totalPages > 1 && (
          <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              justifyContent: "center",
              gap: 8,
              padding: "10px 14px",
              borderTop: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              background: C.surfaceAlt,
            }}
          >
            <button
              onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.max(0, p - 1))}
              disabled={page === 0}
              style={{
                background: "none",
                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                borderRadius: 6,
                padding: "3px 10px",
                fontSize: 10,
                fontFamily: F,
                color: page === 0 ? C.txll : C.txm,
                cursor: page === 0 ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
              }}
            >
              ‹ Anterior
            </button>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}>
              Pág. {page + 1} de {totalPages} · {filtered.length} fincas
            </span>
            <button
              onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.min(totalPages - 1, p + 1))}
              disabled={page === totalPages - 1}
              style={{
                background: "none",
                border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                borderRadius: 6,
                padding: "3px 10px",
                fontSize: 10,
                fontFamily: F,
                color: page === totalPages - 1 ? C.txll : C.txm,
                cursor: page === totalPages - 1 ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
              }}
            >
              Siguiente ›
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const TABS = [
  { id: "resumen", label: "Resumen" },
  { id: "cartera", label: "Cartera" },
  { id: "teledeteccion", label: "Monitoreo" },
  { id: "fincas", label: "Fincas" },
];

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// MAIN COMPONENT
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export default function AgroclimaticaV7() {
  const [tab, setTab] = useState("resumen");
  const [activeNav, setActiveNav] = useState("analitica"); // "analitica" | "climap"
  const [carteraSubTab, setCarteraSubTab] = useState("cartera");
  const [modalOpen, setModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);
  const [chartConfig, setChartConfig] = useState({});
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState({
    desde: "2024-01-01",
    hasta: "2024-12-31",
    region: "Todas",
    sucursal: "Todas",
    agente: "",
    estadoSolicitud: "Aprobado",
  });

  // ─── Dynamic filter options ────────────────────────────────────────────
  const regionOptions = useMemo(
    () => [
      "Todas",
      ...Array.from(new Set(territoriosData.map((d) => d.region))).sort(),
    ],
    []
  );
  const sucursalOptions = useMemo(
    () => [
      "Todas",
      ...Array.from(new Set(territoriosData.map((d) => d.sucursal))).sort(),
    ],
    []
  );

  // ─── Global filtered dataset ───────────────────────────────────────────
  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {
    return territoriosData.filter((d) => {
      if (filters.region !== "Todas" && d.region !== filters.region)
        return false;
      if (filters.sucursal !== "Todas" && d.sucursal !== filters.sucursal)
        return false;
      if (
        filters.agente &&
        !d.agente?.toLowerCase().includes(filters.agente.toLowerCase())
      )
        return false;
      if (
        filters.estadoSolicitud !== "Todos" &&
        d.estadoSolicitud !== filters.estadoSolicitud
      )
        return false;
      if (filters.desde && d.fechaConsulta && d.fechaConsulta < filters.desde)
        return false;
      if (filters.hasta && d.fechaConsulta && d.fechaConsulta > filters.hasta)
        return false;
      return true;
    });
  }, [filters]);

  // ─── BASE: solo aprobados (from filtered) ─────────────────────────────
  const aprobados = useMemo(
    () => filteredData.filter((d) => d.estadoSolicitud === "Aprobado"),
    [filteredData]
  );
  const totalConsultas = useMemo(() => filteredData.length, [filteredData]);
  const totalAprobadas = useMemo(() => aprobados.length, [aprobados]);

  // ─── CARD 1: Ha Totales / Monto Total ─────────────────────────────────
  const haAprobadas = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const montoAprobado = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
    [aprobados]
  );

  // ─── CARD 2: Promedios ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const haPromedio = useMemo(
    () => (totalAprobadas > 0 ? Math.round(haAprobadas / totalAprobadas) : 0),
    [haAprobadas, totalAprobadas]
  );
  const montoPromedio = useMemo(
    () => (totalAprobadas > 0 ? Math.round(montoAprobado / totalAprobadas) : 0),
    [montoAprobado, totalAprobadas]
  );

  // ─── Mix Riesgo ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const mixRiesgoData = useMemo(() => {
    const _rBajo = aprobados.filter((d) => d.riesgo === "Bajo");
    const _rMedio = aprobados.filter((d) => d.riesgo === "Medio");
    const _rAlto = aprobados.filter((d) => d.riesgo === "Alto");
    return {
      consultas: [
        {
          name: "Bajo",
          value: _rBajo.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
          fill: C.g400,
        },
        {
          name: "Medio",
          value: _rMedio.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
          fill: C.a400,
        },
        {
          name: "Alto",
          value: _rAlto.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
          fill: C.r500,
        },
      ],
      monto: [
        {
          name: "Bajo",
          value: _rBajo.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
          fill: C.g400,
        },
        {
          name: "Medio",
          value: _rMedio.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
          fill: C.a400,
        },
        {
          name: "Alto",
          value: _rAlto.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
          fill: C.r500,
        },
      ],
    };
  }, [aprobados]);

  // ─── TREND DATA ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const trendData = useMemo(() => {
    const _trendMap = {};
    aprobados.forEach((d) => {
      if (!d.inicioCiclo) return;
      const mes = d.inicioCiclo.slice(0, 7);
      if (!_trendMap[mes])
        _trendMap[mes] = {
          mes,
          Bajo: 0,
          Medio: 0,
          Alto: 0,
          BajoM: 0,
          MedioM: 0,
          AltoM: 0,
        };
      _trendMap[mes][d.riesgo] = (_trendMap[mes][d.riesgo] || 0) + d.ha;
      _trendMap[mes][d.riesgo + "M"] =
        (_trendMap[mes][d.riesgo + "M"] || 0) + d.monto;
    });
    return Object.values(_trendMap)
      .sort((a, b) => a.mes.localeCompare(b.mes))
      .map((d) => ({
        ...d,
        label: d.mes.slice(5) + "/" + d.mes.slice(2, 4),
      }));
  }, [aprobados]);

  // ─── CARD 3: Mix Actividad ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  const aprobGanado = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.actividad === "Ganadería"),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const aprobCultivos = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.actividad === "Cultivos"),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const haGanado = useMemo(
    () => aprobGanado.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [aprobGanado]
  );
  const haCultivos = useMemo(
    () => aprobCultivos.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [aprobCultivos]
  );
  const montoGanado = useMemo(
    () => aprobGanado.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
    [aprobGanado]
  );
  const montoCultivos = useMemo(
    () => aprobCultivos.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
    [aprobCultivos]
  );
  const pctHaGanado = useMemo(
    () => (haAprobadas > 0 ? Math.round((haGanado / haAprobadas) * 100) : 0),
    [haGanado, haAprobadas]
  );
  const pctHaCultivos = useMemo(() => 100 - pctHaGanado, [pctHaGanado]);
  const pctMontoGanado = useMemo(
    () =>
      montoAprobado > 0 ? Math.round((montoGanado / montoAprobado) * 100) : 0,
    [montoGanado, montoAprobado]
  );
  const pctMontoCultivos = useMemo(
    () => 100 - pctMontoGanado,
    [pctMontoGanado]
  );

  // ─── HUELLA HÍDRICA ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const fincasDeficit = useMemo(
    () =>
      aprobados.filter(
        (d) =>
          d.alertasDetectadas &&
          d.alertasDetectadas.some((a) => a.toLowerCase().includes("hídr"))
      ),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const fincasSinDeficit = useMemo(
    () =>
      aprobados.filter(
        (d) =>
          !d.alertasDetectadas ||
          !d.alertasDetectadas.some((a) => a.toLowerCase().includes("hídr"))
      ),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const haDeficit = useMemo(
    () => fincasDeficit.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [fincasDeficit]
  );
  const haNoDeficit = useMemo(
    () => fincasSinDeficit.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [fincasSinDeficit]
  );
  const montoDeficit = useMemo(
    () => fincasDeficit.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
    [fincasDeficit]
  );
  const montoNoDeficit = useMemo(
    () => fincasSinDeficit.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
    [fincasSinDeficit]
  );
  const aguaTotalSuplir = useMemo(
    () => fincasDeficit.reduce((s, d) => s + (d.aguaASuplirRiegoM3 || 0), 0),
    [fincasDeficit]
  );
  const fincasConRiego = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.tieneRiego === true),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const fincasSinRiego = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.tieneRiego === false),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const haConRiego = useMemo(
    () => fincasConRiego.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [fincasConRiego]
  );
  const haSinRiego = useMemo(
    () => fincasSinRiego.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [fincasSinRiego]
  );
  const montoConRiego = useMemo(
    () => fincasConRiego.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
    [fincasConRiego]
  );
  const montoSinRiego = useMemo(
    () => fincasSinRiego.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
    [fincasSinRiego]
  );
  const pctHaConRiego = useMemo(
    () => (haAprobadas > 0 ? Math.round((haConRiego / haAprobadas) * 100) : 0),
    [haConRiego, haAprobadas]
  );
  const pctHaDeficit = useMemo(
    () => (haAprobadas > 0 ? Math.round((haDeficit / haAprobadas) * 100) : 0),
    [haDeficit, haAprobadas]
  );

  // ─── CO2 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const totalEmisiones = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.reduce((s, d) => s + (d.co2Emisiones || 0), 0),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const totalCapturas = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.reduce((s, d) => s + (d.co2Capturas || 0), 0),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const balanceNetoCO2 = useMemo(
    () => totalCapturas - totalEmisiones,
    [totalCapturas, totalEmisiones]
  );
  const autosEquiv = useMemo(
    () => Math.abs(Math.round(balanceNetoCO2 / 4.6)),
    [balanceNetoCO2]
  );
  const arbolesEquiv = useMemo(
    () => Math.abs(Math.round(balanceNetoCO2 / 0.022)),
    [balanceNetoCO2]
  );
  const fincasEmisoras = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.categoriaEmisionCO2 === "Emisor"),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const fincasCaptoras = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.categoriaEmisionCO2 === "Captura"),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const fincasNeutras = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.categoriaEmisionCO2 === "Neutro"),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const haEmisoras = useMemo(
    () => fincasEmisoras.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [fincasEmisoras]
  );
  const haCaptoras = useMemo(
    () => fincasCaptoras.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [fincasCaptoras]
  );
  const montoEmisoras = useMemo(
    () => fincasEmisoras.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
    [fincasEmisoras]
  );
  const montoCaptoras = useMemo(
    () => fincasCaptoras.reduce((s, d) => s + d.monto, 0),
    [fincasCaptoras]
  );

  // ─── FORESTAL ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const fincasDeforest = useMemo(
    () =>
      aprobados
        .filter((d) => d.categoriaDeforestacion === "Deforestación")
        .sort((a, b) => a.balanceCobertura - b.balanceCobertura),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const fincasReforest = useMemo(
    () =>
      aprobados
        .filter((d) => d.categoriaDeforestacion === "Reforestación")
        .sort((a, b) => b.balanceCobertura - a.balanceCobertura),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const haNetaDeforest = useMemo(
    () => fincasDeforest.reduce((s, d) => s + Math.abs(d.balanceCobertura), 0),
    [fincasDeforest]
  );
  const haNetaReforest = useMemo(
    () => fincasReforest.reduce((s, d) => s + d.balanceCobertura, 0),
    [fincasReforest]
  );
  const balanceForestal = useMemo(
    () => haNetaReforest - haNetaDeforest,
    [haNetaReforest, haNetaDeforest]
  );
  const pctDeforest = useMemo(
    () =>
      aprobados.length > 0
        ? Math.round((fincasDeforest.length / aprobados.length) * 100)
        : 0,
    [fincasDeforest, aprobados]
  );
  const pctReforest = useMemo(
    () =>
      aprobados.length > 0
        ? Math.round((fincasReforest.length / aprobados.length) * 100)
        : 0,
    [fincasReforest, aprobados]
  );

  // ─── RANKING RIESGO ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const rankingRiesgo = useMemo(
    () =>
      [...aprobados]
        .sort(
          (a, b) => b.indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico - a.indiceRiesgoAgroclimatico
        )
        .slice(0, 30),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const fincasAltoRiesgo = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.riesgo === "Alto"),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const haAltoRiesgo = useMemo(
    () => fincasAltoRiesgo.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [fincasAltoRiesgo]
  );

  // ─── CARD 4: Mora ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const enMora = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.mora === "Si"),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const fincasEnMora = useMemo(() => enMora.length, [enMora]);
  const haEnMora = useMemo(
    () => enMora.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [enMora]
  );
  const montoEnMoraTotal = useMemo(
    () => enMora.reduce((s, d) => s + (d.montoEnMora || 0), 0),
    [enMora]
  );
  const pctHaMora = useMemo(
    () =>
      haAprobadas > 0 ? ((haEnMora / haAprobadas) * 100).toFixed(1) : "0.0",
    [haEnMora, haAprobadas]
  );
  const pctMontoMora = useMemo(
    () =>
      montoAprobado > 0
        ? ((montoEnMoraTotal / montoAprobado) * 100).toFixed(1)
        : "0.0",
    [montoEnMoraTotal, montoAprobado]
  );
  const diasMoraPonderados = useMemo(
    () =>
      montoEnMoraTotal > 0
        ? Math.round(
            enMora.reduce(
              (s, d) => s + d.diasDeMora * (d.montoEnMora || 0),
              0
            ) / montoEnMoraTotal
          )
        : 0,
    [enMora, montoEnMoraTotal]
  );
  const mora30 = useMemo(
    () => enMora.filter((d) => d.diasDeMora > 0 && d.diasDeMora <= 30),
    [enMora]
  );
  const mora60 = useMemo(
    () => enMora.filter((d) => d.diasDeMora > 30 && d.diasDeMora <= 60),
    [enMora]
  );
  const mora90 = useMemo(
    () => enMora.filter((d) => d.diasDeMora > 60),
    [enMora]
  );
  const haMora30 = useMemo(
    () => mora30.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [mora30]
  );
  const haMora60 = useMemo(
    () => mora60.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [mora60]
  );
  const haMora90 = useMemo(
    () => mora90.reduce((s, d) => s + d.ha, 0),
    [mora90]
  );
  const montoMora30 = useMemo(
    () => mora30.reduce((s, d) => s + (d.montoEnMora || 0), 0),
    [mora30]
  );
  const montoMora60 = useMemo(
    () => mora60.reduce((s, d) => s + (d.montoEnMora || 0), 0),
    [mora60]
  );
  const montoMora90 = useMemo(
    () => mora90.reduce((s, d) => s + (d.montoEnMora || 0), 0),
    [mora90]
  );

  // ─── TELEDETECCIÓN ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const fincasConMonitoreo = useMemo(
    () => aprobados.filter((d) => d.monitoreoActivo === "Si"),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const fincasConLogRevisiones = useMemo(
    () =>
      aprobados.filter((d) => d.logRevisiones && d.logRevisiones.length > 0),
    [aprobados]
  );
  const todasRevisiones = useMemo(
    () =>
      fincasConLogRevisiones.flatMap((d) =>
        d.logRevisiones.map((r) => ({
          ...r,
          finca: d.finca,
          productor: d.productor,
          region: d.region,
          actividad: d.actividad,
          subActividad: d.subActividad,
          ha: d.ha,
          monto: d.monto,
          id: d.id,
        }))
      ),
    [fincasConLogRevisiones]
  );
  const ultimasRevisiones = useMemo(
    () =>
      fincasConLogRevisiones.map((d) => ({
        ...d.logRevisiones[d.logRevisiones.length - 1],
        finca: d.finca,
        productor: d.productor,
        telefono: d.telefono,
        region: d.region,
        actividad: d.actividad,
        subActividad: d.subActividad,
        ha: d.ha,
        monto: d.monto,
        riesgo: d.riesgo,
        inicioCiclo: d.inicioCiclo,
        finCiclo: d.finCiclo,
        alerta: d.alerta,
        id: d.id,
      })),
    [fincasConLogRevisiones]
  );
  const ndviPromedio = useMemo(
    () =>
      ultimasRevisiones.length > 0
        ? (
            ultimasRevisiones.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.indices?.ndvi || 0), 0) /
            ultimasRevisiones.length
          ).toFixed(2)
        : 0,
    [ultimasRevisiones]
  );
  const fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion = useMemo(
    () => ultimasRevisiones.filter((r) => r.alertaTeledeteccion),
    [ultimasRevisiones]
  );
  const saludRealData = useMemo(() => {
    const saludMap2 = {};
    ultimasRevisiones.forEach((r) => {
      saludMap2[r.estadoSalud] = (saludMap2[r.estadoSalud] || 0) + 1;
    });
    return [
      { name: "Óptimo", value: saludMap2["Óptimo"] || 0, fill: C.g500 },
      { name: "Bueno", value: saludMap2["Bueno"] || 0, fill: C.g400 },
      {
        name: "Requiere atención",
        value: saludMap2["Requiere atención"] || 0,
        fill: C.a400,
      },
      { name: "Crítico", value: saludMap2["Crítico"] || 0, fill: C.r500 },
    ].filter((d) => d.value > 0);
  }, [ultimasRevisiones]);
  const probCosechaPromedio = useMemo(
    () =>
      ultimasRevisiones.length > 0
        ? Math.round(
            ultimasRevisiones.reduce(
              (s, r) => s + (r.probabilidadCosechaExitosa || 0),
              0
            ) / ultimasRevisiones.length
          )
        : 0,
    [ultimasRevisiones]
  );
  const ndviFaseData = useMemo(() => {
    const ndviFaseMap = {};
    todasRevisiones.forEach((r) => {
      if (!ndviFaseMap[r.faseFenologica]) ndviFaseMap[r.faseFenologica] = [];
      ndviFaseMap[r.faseFenologica].push(r.indices?.ndvi || 0);
    });
    return Object.entries(ndviFaseMap).map(([fase, vals]) => ({
      fase,
      ndvi: parseFloat(
        (vals.reduce((s, v) => s + v, 0) / vals.length).toFixed(3)
      ),
    }));
  }, [todasRevisiones]);
  const [modalHidrica, setModalHidrica] = useState(false);
  const [modalDeforest, setModalDeforest] = useState(false);
  const [modalRiesgo, setModalRiesgo] = useState(false);
  const [modalMora, setModalMora] = useState(false);
  const [modalEmisoras, setModalEmisoras] = useState(false);
  const [modoGlobal, setModoGlobal] = useState("monto");
  const setF = (k, v) => setFilters((f) => ({ ...f, [k]: v }));
  const toggleChart = useCallback(
    (id, val) => setChartConfig((c) => ({ ...c, [id]: val })),
    []
  );
  const selectStyle = {
    background: "#f8faf9",
    border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
    borderRadius: 8,
    padding: "6px 10px",
    color: C.tx,
    fontSize: 10.5,
    fontFamily: F,
    outline: "none",
    cursor: "pointer",
  };
  const inputStyle = { ...selectStyle, cursor: "text" };

  const tabContent = {
    fincas: (
      <TabFincas aprobados={aprobados} territoriosData={territoriosData} />
    ),
    resumen: (
      <TabResumen
        cfg={chartConfig}
        filters={filters}
        setFilters={setFilters}
        modoGlobal={modoGlobal}
        setModoGlobal={setModoGlobal}
        setModalRiesgo={setModalRiesgo}
        setModalHidrica={setModalHidrica}
        setModalDeforest={setModalDeforest}
        setModalMora={setModalMora}
        setModalEmisoras={setModalEmisoras}
        aprobados={aprobados}
        mixRiesgoData={mixRiesgoData}
        trendData={trendData}
        haAprobadas={haAprobadas}
        montoAprobado={montoAprobado}
        haPromedio={haPromedio}
        montoPromedio={montoPromedio}
        totalAprobadas={totalAprobadas}
        totalConsultas={totalConsultas}
        pctHaGanado={pctHaGanado}
        pctHaCultivos={pctHaCultivos}
        pctMontoGanado={pctMontoGanado}
        pctMontoCultivos={pctMontoCultivos}
        haGanado={haGanado}
        haCultivos={haCultivos}
        montoGanado={montoGanado}
        montoCultivos={montoCultivos}
        fincasDeficit={fincasDeficit}
        haDeficit={haDeficit}
        montoDeficit={montoDeficit}
        haNoDeficit={haNoDeficit}
        montoNoDeficit={montoNoDeficit}
        aguaTotalSuplir={aguaTotalSuplir}
        fincasConRiego={fincasConRiego}
        fincasSinRiego={fincasSinRiego}
        haConRiego={haConRiego}
        haSinRiego={haSinRiego}
        montoConRiego={montoConRiego}
        montoSinRiego={montoSinRiego}
        pctHaConRiego={pctHaConRiego}
        pctHaDeficit={pctHaDeficit}
        totalEmisiones={totalEmisiones}
        totalCapturas={totalCapturas}
        balanceNetoCO2={balanceNetoCO2}
        autosEquiv={autosEquiv}
        arbolesEquiv={arbolesEquiv}
        fincasEmisoras={fincasEmisoras}
        fincasCaptoras={fincasCaptoras}
        fincasNeutras={fincasNeutras}
        haEmisoras={haEmisoras}
        haCaptoras={haCaptoras}
        montoEmisoras={montoEmisoras}
        montoCaptoras={montoCaptoras}
        fincasDeforest={fincasDeforest}
        fincasReforest={fincasReforest}
        haNetaDeforest={haNetaDeforest}
        haNetaReforest={haNetaReforest}
        balanceForestal={balanceForestal}
        pctDeforest={pctDeforest}
        pctReforest={pctReforest}
        rankingRiesgo={rankingRiesgo}
        fincasAltoRiesgo={fincasAltoRiesgo}
        haAltoRiesgo={haAltoRiesgo}
        enMora={enMora}
        fincasEnMora={fincasEnMora}
        haEnMora={haEnMora}
        montoEnMoraTotal={montoEnMoraTotal}
        pctHaMora={pctHaMora}
        pctMontoMora={pctMontoMora}
        diasMoraPonderados={diasMoraPonderados}
        mora30={mora30}
        mora60={mora60}
        mora90={mora90}
        haMora30={haMora30}
        haMora60={haMora60}
        haMora90={haMora90}
        montoMora30={montoMora30}
        montoMora60={montoMora60}
        montoMora90={montoMora90}
        ultimasRevisiones={ultimasRevisiones}
        fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion={fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion}
        territoriosData={territoriosData}
      />
    ),
    cartera: (
      <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 0 }}>
        {/* Sub-tab bar */}
        <div
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            gap: 0,
            borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
            marginBottom: 18,
            overflowX: "auto",
          }}
        >
          {(
            [
              { id: "cartera", label: "Cartera" },
              { id: "productores", label: "Productores" },
              { id: "cultivos", label: "Cultivos" },
              { id: "ganaderia", label: "Ganadería" },
              { id: "riesgos", label: "Riesgos y Suelo" },
              { id: "huella", label: "Huella Ambiental" },
            ] as { id: string; label: string }[]
          ).map(({ id, label }) => {
            const active = carteraSubTab === id;
            return (
              <button
                key={id}
                onClick={() => setCarteraSubTab(id)}
                style={{
                  padding: "8px 18px",
                  border: "none",
                  cursor: "pointer",
                  background: "transparent",
                  borderBottom: active
                    ? `2px solid ${C.accent}`
                    : "2px solid transparent",
                  color: active ? C.accent : C.txl,
                  fontSize: 11,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  fontWeight: active ? 600 : 400,
                  whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                  transition: "color 0.15s",
                  flexShrink: 0,
                  marginBottom: -1,
                }}
                onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                  if (!active) e.currentTarget.style.color = C.txm;
                }}
                onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                  if (!active) e.currentTarget.style.color = C.txl;
                }}
              >
                {label}
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
        {/* Sub-tab content */}
        {carteraSubTab === "cartera" && (
          <TabCartera
            cfg={chartConfig}
            modoGlobal={modoGlobal}
            setModoGlobal={setModoGlobal}
            aprobados={aprobados}
            haAprobadas={haAprobadas}
            montoAprobado={montoAprobado}
            totalAprobadas={totalAprobadas}
            territoriosData={territoriosData}
          />
        )}
        {carteraSubTab === "productores" && (
          <TabProductores
            cfg={chartConfig}
            modoGlobal={modoGlobal}
            setModoGlobal={setModoGlobal}
            territoriosData={territoriosData}
          />
        )}
        {carteraSubTab === "cultivos" && (
          <TabCultivos
            cfg={chartConfig}
            modoGlobal={modoGlobal}
            setModoGlobal={setModoGlobal}
            territoriosData={territoriosData}
          />
        )}
        {carteraSubTab === "ganaderia" && (
          <TabGanaderia
            cfg={chartConfig}
            modoGlobal={modoGlobal}
            setModoGlobal={setModoGlobal}
            territoriosData={territoriosData}
          />
        )}
        {carteraSubTab === "riesgos" && (
          <TabRiesgos
            cfg={chartConfig}
            modoGlobal={modoGlobal}
            setModoGlobal={setModoGlobal}
            territoriosData={territoriosData}
          />
        )}
        {carteraSubTab === "huella" && (
          <TabHuella
            cfg={chartConfig}
            modoGlobal={modoGlobal}
            setModoGlobal={setModoGlobal}
            territoriosData={territoriosData}
          />
        )}
      </div>
    ),

    teledeteccion: (
      <TabTeledeteccion
        cfg={chartConfig}
        modoGlobal={modoGlobal}
        setModoGlobal={setModoGlobal}
        fincasConMonitoreo={fincasConMonitoreo}
        fincasConLogRevisiones={fincasConLogRevisiones}
        ultimasRevisiones={ultimasRevisiones}
        todasRevisiones={todasRevisiones}
        aprobados={aprobados}
        ndviPromedio={ndviPromedio}
        fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion={fincasConAlertaTeledeteccion}
        saludRealData={saludRealData}
        probCosechaPromedio={probCosechaPromedio}
        ndviFaseData={ndviFaseData}
      />
    ),
  };
  const [modalDrillFinca, setModalDrillFinca] = React.useState<any>(null);
  const ModalLista = ({
    open,
    onClose,
    title,
    subtitle,
    columns,
    rows,
  }: any) => {
    const [mlSearch, setMlSearch] = React.useState("");
    const [mlFilterRiesgo, setMlFilterRiesgo] = React.useState("Todos");
    const [mlFilterActividad, setMlFilterActividad] = React.useState("Todas");
    const [mlFilterRegion, setMlFilterRegion] = React.useState("Todas");
    const [mlSort, setMlSort] = React.useState("riesgo_desc");
    const mlRegiones = React.useMemo(
      () => [
        "Todas",
        ...Array.from(
          new Set(rows.map((r: any) => r.region).filter(Boolean))
        ).sort(),
      ],
      [rows]
    );
    const filteredRows = React.useMemo(() => {
      let r = rows as any[];
      if (mlSearch.trim()) {
        const q = mlSearch.trim().toLowerCase();
        r = r.filter((row: any) =>
          Object.values(row).some((v: any) =>
            typeof v === "string"
              ? v.toLowerCase().includes(q)
              : typeof v === "number"
              ? String(v).includes(q)
              : false
          )
        );
      }
      if (mlFilterRiesgo !== "Todos")
        r = r.filter((row: any) => row.riesgo === mlFilterRiesgo);
      if (mlFilterActividad !== "Todas")
        r = r.filter((row: any) => row.actividad === mlFilterActividad);
      if (mlFilterRegion !== "Todas")
        r = r.filter((row: any) => row.region === mlFilterRegion);
      const rO2: Record<string, number> = { Alto: 0, Medio: 1, Bajo: 2 };
      if (mlSort === "riesgo_desc")
        r = [...r].sort(
          (a: any, b: any) => (rO2[a.riesgo] ?? 3) - (rO2[b.riesgo] ?? 3)
        );
      else if (mlSort === "ha_desc")
        r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => b.ha - a.ha);
      else if (mlSort === "monto_desc")
        r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => b.monto - a.monto);
      else if (mlSort === "mora_desc")
        r = [...r].sort(
          (a: any, b: any) => (b.diasDeMora || 0) - (a.diasDeMora || 0)
        );
      else if (mlSort === "finca_asc")
        r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => a.finca?.localeCompare(b.finca));
      else if (mlSort === "region_asc")
        r = [...r].sort((a: any, b: any) => a.region?.localeCompare(b.region));
      return r;
    }, [
      rows,
      mlSearch,
      mlFilterRiesgo,
      mlFilterActividad,
      mlFilterRegion,
      mlSort,
    ]);
    if (!open) return null;
    return (
      <>
        <div
          style={{
            position: "fixed",
            inset: 0,
            zIndex: 20000,
            background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.55)",
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            justifyContent: "center",
            padding: 24,
          }}
          onClick={onClose}
        >
          <div
            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
            style={{
              background: C.surface,
              border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
              borderRadius: 16,
              width: "min(1340px, 96vw)",
              maxHeight: "88vh",
              display: "flex",
              flexDirection: "column",
              overflow: "hidden",
              boxShadow: "0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
            }}
          >
            {/* Header */}
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                justifyContent: "space-between",
                alignItems: "flex-start",
                padding: "18px 24px 14px",
                borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                gap: 16,
              }}
            >
              <div>
                <p
                  style={{
                    margin: 0,
                    fontSize: 13,
                    fontWeight: 700,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    color: C.tx,
                  }}
                >
                  {title}
                </p>
                {subtitle && (
                  <p
                    style={{
                      margin: "3px 0 0",
                      fontSize: 10,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontFamily: F,
                    }}
                  >
                    {subtitle}
                  </p>
                )}
              </div>
              <div
                style={{
                  display: "flex",
                  alignItems: "center",
                  gap: 8,
                  flexShrink: 0,
                }}
              >
                <button
                  onClick={onClose}
                  style={{
                    background: "none",
                    border: "none",
                    cursor: "pointer",
                    fontSize: 20,
                    color: C.txl,
                    lineHeight: 1,
                    padding: "0 4px",
                    flexShrink: 0,
                  }}
                >
                  ×
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
            {/* Filter bar */}
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                gap: 8,
                alignItems: "center",
                flexWrap: "wrap",
                padding: "10px 24px",
                borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                background: C.surfaceAlt,
              }}
            >
              <div style={{ position: "relative", flex: 1, minWidth: 180 }}>
                <input
                  value={mlSearch}
                  onChange={(e) => setMlSearch(e.target.value)}
                  placeholder="Buscar finca, productor, región…"
                  style={{
                    width: "100%",
                    background: C.surface,
                    border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                    borderRadius: 8,
                    padding: "6px 10px 6px 28px",
                    fontSize: 10.5,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    color: C.tx,
                    outline: "none",
                  }}
                />
                <span
                  style={{
                    position: "absolute",
                    left: 9,
                    top: "50%",
                    transform: "translateY(-50%)",
                    fontSize: 12,
                    color: C.txl,
                    pointerEvents: "none",
                  }}
                >
                  🔍
                </span>
              </div>
              {(
                [
                  {
                    label: "Riesgo",
                    val: mlFilterRiesgo,
                    set: setMlFilterRiesgo,
                    opts: ["Todos", "Bajo", "Medio", "Alto"],
                  },
                  {
                    label: "Actividad",
                    val: mlFilterActividad,
                    set: setMlFilterActividad,
                    opts: ["Todas", "Ganadería", "Cultivos"],
                  },
                  {
                    label: "Región",
                    val: mlFilterRegion,
                    set: setMlFilterRegion,
                    opts: mlRegiones,
                  },
                ] as any[]
              ).map((f, i) => (
                <div
                  key={i}
                  style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}
                >
                  <span
                    style={{
                      fontSize: 10,
                      color: C.txl,
                      fontWeight: 500,
                      fontFamily: F,
                    }}
                  >
                    {f.label}:
                  </span>
                  <select
                    value={f.val}
                    onChange={(e) => f.set(e.target.value)}
                    style={{
                      background: C.surface,
                      border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                      borderRadius: 8,
                      padding: "5px 8px",
                      fontSize: 10,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      color: C.tx,
                      outline: "none",
                      cursor: "pointer",
                    }}
                  >
                    {f.opts.map((o: string) => (
                      <option key={o}>{o}</option>
                    ))}
                  </select>
                </div>
              ))}
              <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}>
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 10,
                    color: C.txl,
                    fontWeight: 500,
                    fontFamily: F,
                  }}
                >
                  Orden:
                </span>
                <select
                  value={mlSort}
                  onChange={(e) => setMlSort(e.target.value)}
                  style={{
                    background: C.surface,
                    border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                    borderRadius: 8,
                    padding: "5px 8px",
                    fontSize: 10,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    color: C.tx,
                    outline: "none",
                    cursor: "pointer",
                  }}
                >
                  <option value="riesgo_desc">Riesgo ↓</option>
                  <option value="ha_desc">Ha ↓</option>
                  <option value="monto_desc">Monto ↓</option>
                  <option value="mora_desc">Días mora ↓</option>
                  <option value="finca_asc">Finca A–Z</option>
                  <option value="region_asc">Región A–Z</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <span
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: C.txl,
                  fontFamily: F,
                  marginLeft: "auto",
                  whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                }}
              >
                {filteredRows.length} de {rows.length} fincas
              </span>
            </div>

            {/* Table */}
            <div style={{ overflowY: "auto", overflowX: "auto", flex: 1 }}>
              <table
                style={{
                  width: "100%",
                  borderCollapse: "collapse",
                  fontFamily: F,
                  minWidth: 900,
                }}
              >
                <thead
                  style={{
                    position: "sticky",
                    top: 0,
                    background: C.surface,
                    zIndex: 2,
                  }}
                >
                  <tr>
                    {columns.map((col: any) => (
                      <th
                        key={col.key}
                        style={{
                          padding: "10px 14px",
                          textAlign: col.align || "left",
                          fontSize: 9,
                          fontWeight: 600,
                          color: C.txl,
                          textTransform: "uppercase",
                          letterSpacing: "0.06em",
                          borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                          whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                          background: C.surfaceAlt,
                        }}
                      >
                        {col.label}
                      </th>
                    ))}
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {filteredRows.length === 0 ? (
                    <tr>
                      <td
                        colSpan={columns.length}
                        style={{
                          padding: "28px 0",
                          textAlign: "center",
                          color: C.txl,
                          fontSize: 11,
                          fontFamily: F,
                        }}
                      >
                        Sin resultados para "{mlSearch}"
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ) : (
                    filteredRows.map((row: any, i: number) => (
                      <tr
                        key={i}
                        onClick={() => {
                          const fincaData =
                            aprobados.find((d: any) => d.id === row.id) || row;
                          setModalDrillFinca(fincaData);
                        }}
                        style={{
                          borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                          background:
                            i % 2 === 0 ? "transparent" : C.surfaceAlt,
                          cursor: "pointer",
                          transition: "background 0.1s",
                        }}
                        onMouseEnter={(e) =>
                          (e.currentTarget.style.background = C.g50)
                        }
                        onMouseLeave={(e) =>
                          (e.currentTarget.style.background =
                            i % 2 === 0 ? "transparent" : C.surfaceAlt)
                        }
                      >
                        {columns.map((col: any) => (
                          <td
                            key={col.key}
                            style={{
                              padding: "9px 14px",
                              fontSize: 10.5,
                              color: C.tx,
                              textAlign: col.align || "left",
                              whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                            }}
                          >
                            {col.render ? col.render(row) : row[col.key]}
                          </td>
                        ))}
                      </tr>
                    ))
                  )}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
            {/* Footer hint */}
            <div
              style={{
                padding: "8px 24px",
                borderTop: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                display: "flex",
                alignItems: "center",
                gap: 6,
              }}
            >
              <span style={{ fontSize: 9.5, color: C.txl, fontFamily: F }}>
