                🖱 Haz clic en cualquier fila para ver la ficha completa
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        {/* Drilldown: FincaModal on top of ModalLista */}
        {modalDrillFinca && (
          <FincaModal
            finca={modalDrillFinca}
            onClose={() => setModalDrillFinca(null)}
            ultimasRevisiones={ultimasRevisiones}
          />
        )}
      </>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        minHeight: "100vh",

  @import url('https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css');

  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html, body { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; background: #f4f7f6; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; height: 4px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #f4f7f6; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: ${C.borderStrong}; border-radius: 3px; }
  input[type=date]::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator { opacity: 0.4; cursor: pointer; }
  button:focus, select:focus, input:focus { outline: none; }
  text { text-shadow: none !important; filter: none !important; }
  .leaflet-container { z-index: 1; }
  @keyframes atlas-glow {
    0%   { box-shadow: 0 0 0px 0px rgba(34,197,94,0); border-color: ${C.border}; }
    12%  { box-shadow: 0 0 8px 3px rgba(34,197,94,0.35); border-color: ${C.g400}; }
    75%  { box-shadow: 0 0 8px 3px rgba(34,197,94,0.35); border-color: ${C.g400}; }
    100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0px 0px rgba(34,197,94,0); border-color: ${C.border}; }
  }
  .atlas-input-glow {
    animation: atlas-glow 9s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  .atlas-input-glow:focus-within {
    animation: none;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px ${C.g400}44;
    border-color: ${C.g400} !important;
  }
`}</style>

                  d="M1267.5,253.7c-9.2,0.6-18.4,0.7-27.8,0.4c-7.6-0.2-14.9-0.7-21.8-1.7c-6.9-1-13-2.9-18.4-5.8c-5.3-2.9-9.6-7-12.8-12.2c-3.2-5.3-4.8-12.3-4.8-21.1c0-9.9,2.6-17.5,7.8-22.7c5.2-5.2,11.8-8.9,19.8-11.3c8-2.3,16.8-3.6,26.4-3.8c9.6-0.2,18.8-0.4,27.7-0.4c0-5-0.2-9.2-0.5-12.8c-0.3-3.6-1.5-6.6-3.5-8.9c-2-2.3-5.1-4-9.3-5.2c-4.2-1.1-10.2-1.7-17.8-1.7c-8.4,0-16.5,0.5-24.2,1.6c-7.7,1-13.7,2-18,3v-23.2c2.5-0.6,5.7-1.2,9.4-1.7c3.7-0.6,7.6-1,11.6-1.4c4-0.4,8-0.7,12.1-0.9c4.1-0.2,7.8-0.3,11.1-0.3c7.5,0,15,0.4,22.5,1.1c7.5,0.7,14.2,2.5,20.3,5.3c6,2.8,10.9,7,14.7,12.5c3.7,5.6,5.6,13.2,5.6,22.9v85.7C1286.6,252.2,1276.6,253.1,1267.5,253.7z M1263.6,197.2c-1.1,0-2.6,0-4.4-0.1c-1.8-0.1-3.7-0.1-5.6-0.1c-1.9,0-3.8,0-5.5,0s-3.1,0-4.1,0c-3.5,0-6.8,0.1-10,0.4c-3.2,0.2-6,1-8.5,2.1s-4.4,3-5.8,5.4c-1.4,2.4-2.1,5.6-2.1,9.8c0,4.1,0.7,7.4,2.1,9.8c1.4,2.4,3.4,4.2,5.8,5.4c2.5,1.2,5.3,1.9,8.5,2.1c3.2,0.2,6.5,0.4,10,0.4c3.7,0,7-0.1,10-0.4c3-0.2,6.2-0.6,9.6-1.1V197.2z"
                />
                <path
                  className="st1"
                  d="M1376.7,150.4v64.9c0,4.9,1.3,8.2,3.9,9.7c2.6,1.5,5.5,2.3,8.7,2.3h22.9v24.1h-27.2c-5.4,0-10.6-0.2-15.5-0.5c-4.9-0.3-9.3-1.6-13.1-3.7c-3.8-2.1-6.8-5.5-9.1-10.2c-2.2-4.6-3.3-11.1-3.3-19.6v-67.1h-25.3v-24.3h25.3v-33c5.7-1.9,10.5-3.5,14.2-4.8c3.7-1.3,7.4-2.5,11-3.7c3.6-1.2,6.1-2,7.5-2.5v43.9h38.2v24.3H1376.7z"
                />
                <path
                  className="st1"

                />
                <path
                  className="st1"
                  d="M1597.8,253.2c-5.9,0.6-11.9,0.8-17.9,0.8c-10.3,0-19.9-1.4-28.7-4.2c-8.8-2.8-16.3-7-22.7-12.6c-6.4-5.7-11.3-12.7-14.8-21.1c-3.5-8.4-5.2-18.3-5.2-29.6c0-10.2,1.9-19.2,5.6-27.1c3.7-7.9,8.8-14.5,15.2-19.8c6.4-5.3,13.8-9.3,22.2-12.1c8.4-2.7,17.4-4.1,27-4.1c6,0,12.1,0.3,18.3,0.8c6.1,0.6,12.1,1.5,18,2.7v22.4c-4.1-0.5-8-0.9-11.7-1.2c-3.7-0.3-7.5-0.5-11.5-0.5c-8,0-14.9,0.7-20.9,2c-6,1.4-10.9,3.6-14.8,6.8c-3.9,3.2-6.8,7.3-8.8,12.4c-2,5.1-3,11.5-3,19.1c0,15.3,3.9,25.9,11.8,32c7.9,6,19.8,9.1,35.7,9.1c5.6,0,10.1-0.2,13.6-0.6c3.5-0.4,7-0.8,10.5-1.3V250C1609.7,251.6,1603.7,252.6,1597.8,253.2z"
                />
                <path
                  className="st1"
                  d="M1718,253.7c-9.2,0.6-18.4,0.7-27.8,0.4c-7.6-0.2-14.9-0.7-21.8-1.7c-6.9-1-13-2.9-18.4-5.8c-5.3-2.9-9.6-7-12.8-12.2c-3.2-5.3-4.8-12.3-4.8-21.1c0-9.9,2.6-17.5,7.8-22.7c5.2-5.2,11.8-8.9,19.8-11.3c8-2.3,16.8-3.6,26.4-3.8c9.6-0.2,18.8-0.4,27.7-0.4c0-5-0.2-9.2-0.5-12.8c-0.3-3.6-1.5-6.6-3.5-8.9c-2-2.3-5.1-4-9.3-5.2c-4.2-1.1-10.2-1.7-17.8-1.7c-8.4,0-16.5,0.5-24.2,1.6c-7.7,1-13.7,2-18,3v-23.2c2.5-0.6,5.7-1.2,9.4-1.7c3.7-0.6,7.6-1,11.6-1.4c4-0.4,8-0.7,12.1-0.9c4.1-0.2,7.8-0.3,11.1-0.3c7.5,0,15,0.4,22.5,1.1c7.5,0.7,14.2,2.5,20.3,5.3c6,2.8,10.9,7,14.7,12.5c3.7,5.6,5.6,13.2,5.6,22.9v85.7C1737.2,252.2,1727.2,253.1,1718,253.7z M1714.1,197.2c-1.1,0-2.6,0-4.4-0.1c-1.8-0.1-3.7-0.1-5.6-0.1c-1.9,0-3.8,0-5.5,0c-1.7,0-3.1,0-4.1,0c-3.5,0-6.8,0.1-10,0.4c-3.2,0.2-6,1-8.5,2.1s-4.4,3-5.8,5.4c-1.4,2.4-2.1,5.6-2.1,9.8c0,4.1,0.7,7.4,2.1,9.8c1.4,2.4,3.4,4.2,5.8,5.4c2.5,1.2,5.3,1.9,8.5,2.1c3.2,0.2,6.5,0.4,10,0.4c3.7,0,7-0.1,10-0.4c3-0.2,6.2-0.6,9.6-1.1V197.2z"
                />
              </g>
            </g>
          </svg>
        </div>

        {/* Nav items */}
        <nav style={{ flex: 1, padding: "12px 0" }}>
          {[
            {
              id: "analitica",
              label: "Analítica de Datos",
              icon: (
                <svg
                  width="16"
                  height="16"
                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                  fill="none"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  strokeWidth="2"
                >
                  <rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1" />
                  <rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1" />
                  <rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1" />
                  <rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1" />
                </svg>
              ),
            },
            {
              id: "climap",
              label: "CliMap",
              icon: (
                <svg
                  width="16"
                  height="16"
                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                  fill="none"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  strokeWidth="2"
                >
                  <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
                  <line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12" />
                  <path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z" />
                </svg>
              ),
            },
            {
              id: "nueva-consulta",
              label: "Nueva Consulta",
              icon: (
                <svg
                  width="16"
                  height="16"
                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                  fill="none"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  strokeWidth="2"
                >
                  <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8" />
                  <line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65" />
                </svg>
              ),
            },
            {
              id: "solicitudes",
              label: "Solicitudes de Riesgo",
              icon: (
                <svg
                  width="16"
                  height="16"
                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                  fill="none"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  strokeWidth="2"
                >
                  <path d="M4 19.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 17H20" />
                  <path d="M6.5 2H20v20H6.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 4 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 2z" />
                </svg>
              ),
            },
          ].map(({ id, label, icon }) => {
            const active = activeNav === id;
            return (
              <div
                key={id}
                onClick={() => setActiveNav(id)}
                style={{
                  display: "flex",
                  alignItems: "center",
                  gap: 10,
                  padding: "9px 18px",
                  margin: "1px 8px",
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  background: active ? "#2d6a6a" : "transparent",
                  color: active ? "#fff" : "#4a7070",
                  cursor: "pointer",
                  transition: "background 0.15s",
                }}
                onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                  if (!active) e.currentTarget.style.background = "#f0f7f7";
                }}
                onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                  if (!active) e.currentTarget.style.background = "transparent";
                }}
              >
                <span
                  style={{ color: active ? "#fff" : "#4a7070", flexShrink: 0 }}
                >
                  {icon}
                </span>
                <span
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 11.5,
                    fontWeight: active ? 600 : 400,
                    fontFamily: F,
                    lineHeight: 1.3,
                  }}
                >
                  {label}
                </span>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </nav>
      </div>

      {/* ── RIGHT SIDE: topbar + dashboard ── */}
      <div
        style={{
          flex: 1,
          minWidth: 0,
          display: "flex",
          flexDirection: "column",
        }}
      >
        {/* ── AGROCLIMATICA TOP BAR ── */}
        <div
          style={{
            height: 48,
            background: "#fff",
            borderBottom: "1px solid #e5e9ec",
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            justifyContent: "flex-end",
            padding: "0 24px",
            flexShrink: 0,
            position: "sticky",
            top: 0,
            zIndex: 290,
          }}
        >
          <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              gap: 6,
              cursor: "pointer",
            }}
          >
            <span
              style={{
                fontSize: 12,
                fontWeight: 500,
                color: "#1a4040",
                fontFamily: F,
              }}
            >
              Cliente Perú
            </span>
            <svg
              width="14"
              height="14"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              fill="none"
              stroke="#4a7070"
              strokeWidth="2.5"
            >
              <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9" />
            </svg>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* ── CONTENT ROW: main column + sidebar drawer side by side ── */}
        <div
          style={{
            flex: 1,
            minWidth: 0,
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "row",
            overflow: "hidden",
          }}
        >
          {activeNav === "climap" ? (
            <div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0, overflow: "hidden" }}>
              <CliMap riskData={riskData} geoData={geoData} />
            </div>
          ) : (
            <>
              {/* ── MAIN COLUMN: grows, shrinks when drawer opens ── */}
              <div
                style={{
                  flex: 1,
                  minWidth: 0,
                  display: "flex",
                  flexDirection: "column",
                  transition: "all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)",
                  overflow: "hidden",
                }}
              >
                {/* ────────── STICKY HEADER ────────── */}
                <div
                  style={{
                    position: "sticky",
                    top: 0,
                    zIndex: 200,
                    background: C.hdrBg,
                    borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.hdrBorder}`,
                    boxShadow: "0 2px 12px rgba(15,31,20,0.06)",
                  }}
                >
                  {/* ── UNIFIED SINGLE-ROW NAV: tabs left · controls right ── */}
                  <div
                    style={{
                      maxWidth: 1560,
                      margin: "0 auto",
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "stretch",
                      padding: "0 16px",
                      minHeight: 44,
                      gap: 0,
                    }}
                  >
                    {/* LEFT: scrollable tabs */}
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        alignItems: "stretch",
                        overflowX: "auto",
                        flex: 1,
                        minWidth: 0,
                        scrollbarWidth: "none",
                        msOverflowStyle: "none",
                      }}
                    >
                      {TABS.map(({ id, label }) => {
                        const active = tab === id;
                        const hasHidden = (CHART_REGISTRY[id] || []).some(
                          (c) => chartConfig[c.id] === false
                        );
                        return (
                          <button
                            key={id}
                            onClick={() => setTab(id)}
                            style={{
                              padding: "0 16px",
                              border: "none",
                              cursor: "pointer",
                              background: "transparent",
                              borderBottom: active
                                ? `2px solid ${C.accent}`
                                : "2px solid transparent",
                              color: active ? C.accent : C.txl,
                              fontSize: 11,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              fontWeight: active ? 600 : 400,
                              whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                              transition: "color 0.15s",
                              position: "relative",
                              flexShrink: 0,
                            }}
                            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                              if (!active) e.currentTarget.style.color = C.txm;
                            }}
                            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                              if (!active) e.currentTarget.style.color = C.txl;
                            }}
                          >
                            {label}
                            {hasHidden && (
                              <span
                                style={{
                                  position: "absolute",
                                  top: 8,
                                  right: 6,
                                  width: 4,
                                  height: 4,
                                  borderRadius: "50%",
                                  background: C.a500,
                                }}
                              />
                            )}
                          </button>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>

                    {/* RIGHT: controls — collapse labels on small screens */}
                    <div
                      style={{
                        display: "flex",
                        alignItems: "center",
                        gap: 6,
                        flexShrink: 0,
                        paddingLeft: 8,
                        borderLeft: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                      }}
                    >
                      {/* Montos / Hectáreas pill toggle */}
                      <div
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "center",
                          background: C.surfaceAlt,
                          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                          borderRadius: 8,
                          padding: 2,
                          gap: 1,
                        }}
                      >
                        {[
                          ["monto", "Montos"],
                          ["consultas", "Hás"],
                        ].map(([m, lbl]) => (
                          <button
                            key={m}
                            onClick={() => setModoGlobal(m)}
                            style={{
                              background:
                                modoGlobal === m ? C.accent : "transparent",
                              color: modoGlobal === m ? "#fff" : C.txl,
                              border: "none",
                              borderRadius: 6,
                              padding: "4px 10px",
                              cursor: "pointer",
                              fontSize: 10,
                              fontFamily: F,
                              fontWeight: 600,
                              transition: "all 0.15s",
                              whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                            }}
                          >
                            {lbl}
                          </button>
                        ))}
                      </div>

                      {/* EN VIVO */}
                      <div
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "center",
                          gap: 5,
                          background: C.g50,
                          border: `1px solid ${C.g200}`,
                          borderRadius: 7,
                          padding: "4px 10px",
                          flexShrink: 0,
                        }}
                      >
                        <div
                          style={{
                            width: 5,
                            height: 5,
                            borderRadius: "50%",
                            background: C.g500,
                            flexShrink: 0,
                          }}
                        />
                        <span
                          style={{
                            color: C.g600,
                            fontSize: 10,
                            fontWeight: 600,
                            fontFamily: F,
                            whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                          }}
                        >
                          EN VIVO
                        </span>
                      </div>

                      {/* Exportar — icon only on mobile */}
                      <button
                        style={{
                          background: "transparent",
                          border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                          borderRadius: 8,
                          padding: "4px 12px",
                          cursor: "pointer",
                          color: C.tx,
                          fontSize: 10,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          fontWeight: 600,
                          whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                        }}
                      >
                        Exportar
                      </button>

                      {/* Filtros */}
                      <button
                        onClick={() => setFiltersOpen((v) => !v)}
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          alignItems: "center",
                          gap: 5,
                          background: filtersOpen ? C.g50 : "transparent",
                          border: `1px solid ${
                            filtersOpen ? C.accent : C.border
                          }`,
                          borderRadius: 8,
                          padding: "4px 12px",
                          cursor: "pointer",
                          color: filtersOpen ? C.accent : C.txm,
                          fontSize: 10,
                          fontFamily: F,
                          fontWeight: 600,
                          transition: "all 0.15s",
                          whiteSpace: "nowrap",
                        }}
                      >
                        <svg
                          width="12"
                          height="12"
                          viewBox="0 0 16 16"
                          fill="none"
                          style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}
                        >
                          <path
                            d="M2 4h12M4 8h8M6 12h4"
                            stroke="currentColor"
                            strokeWidth="1.6"
                            strokeLinecap="round"
                          />
                        </svg>
                        Filtros
                        {(filters.region !== "Todas" ||
                          filters.sucursal !== "Todas" ||
                          filters.agente ||
                          filters.desde !== "2024-01-01" ||
                          filters.hasta !== "2024-12-31" ||
                          filters.estadoSolicitud !== "Todos") && (
                          <span
                            style={{
                              width: 5,
                              height: 5,
                              borderRadius: "50%",
                              background: C.a500,
                              flexShrink: 0,
                            }}
                          />
                        )}
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                {/* ────────── CONTENT ────────── */}
                <div
                  style={{
                    maxWidth: 1560,
                    margin: "0 auto",
                    padding: "22px 28px",
                    minWidth: 0,
                    width: "100%",
                    boxSizing: "border-box",
                    overflow: "hidden",
                  }}
                >
                  {tabContent[tab]}

                  <p
                    style={{
                      color: C.txll,
                      fontSize: 10.5,
                      fontFamily: F,
                      fontWeight: 300,
                      textAlign: "center",
                      paddingTop: 24,
                      paddingBottom: 8,
                    }}
                  >
                    {/* ── MODAL: Alto Riesgo ── */}
                    <ModalLista
                      open={modalRiesgo}
                      onClose={() => setModalRiesgo(false)}
                      title="Fincas en Alto Riesgo Agroclimático"
                      subtitle={`${
                        fincasAltoRiesgo.length
                      } fincas · ${haAltoRiesgo.toLocaleString()} ha`}
                      columns={[
                        { key: "productor", label: "Productor" },
                        { key: "telefono", label: "Teléfono" },
                        { key: "finca", label: "Finca" },
                        { key: "region", label: "Región" },
                        { key: "actividad", label: "Actividad" },
                        { key: "genetica", label: "Genética" },
                        {
                          key: "ha",
                          label: "Ha",
                          align: "right",
                          render: (r) => r.ha?.toLocaleString(),
                        },
                        {
                          key: "monto",
                          label: "Monto",
                          align: "right",
                          render: (r) => `$${(r.monto / 1e6).toFixed(2)}M`,
                        },
                        {
                          key: "riesgo",
                          label: "Riesgo",
                          render: (r) => (
                            <span
                              style={{
                                background:
                                  r.riesgo === "Alto"
                                    ? C.r100
                                    : r.riesgo === "Medio"
                                    ? C.a100
                                    : C.g50,
                                color:
                                  r.riesgo === "Alto"
                                    ? C.r600
                                    : r.riesgo === "Medio"
                                    ? C.a600
                                    : C.g600,
                                borderRadius: 5,
                                padding: "2px 7px",
                                fontSize: 10,
                                fontWeight: 700,
                                fontFamily: F,
                              }}
                            >
                              {r.riesgo}
                            </span>
                          ),
                        },
                        {
                          key: "alerta",
                          label: "Alerta Activa",
                          render: (r) =>
                            r.alerta ? (
                              <span
                                style={{
                                  background: C.r100,
                                  color: C.r600,
                                  borderRadius: 5,
                                  padding: "2px 7px",
                                  fontSize: 10,
                                  fontWeight: 600,
                                  fontFamily: F,
                                }}
                              >
                                {r.alerta}
                              </span>
                            ) : (
                              <span style={{ color: C.txll, fontSize: 10 }}>
                                —
                              </span>
                            ),
                        },
                        { key: "inicioCiclo", label: "Inicio Ciclo" },
                        { key: "finCiclo", label: "Fin Ciclo" },
                        { key: "sucursal", label: "Sucursal" },
                        { key: "agente", label: "Agente" },
                        {
                          key: "geo",
                          label: "Georeferencia",
                          render: (r) => (
                            <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: C.txm }}>
                              {r.lat?.toFixed(4)}, {r.lng?.toFixed(4)}
                            </span>
                          ),
                        },
                      ]}
                      rows={fincasAltoRiesgo.map((d) => ({
                        ...d,
                        genetica:
                          d.tipoSemilla ||
                          (d.razas && d.razas.map((r) => r.raza).join(", ")) ||
                          "—",
                      }))}
                    />
                    {/* ── MODAL: Déficit Hídrico ── */}
                    <ModalLista
                      open={modalHidrica}

      {/* end right-side */}
    </div>
  );
}
